name: Donald J. Trump
subject: A very long list of wins!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
On nearly every single issue, we’re LEADING. | | | [](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=fdc4ccf4380b441b9e47f2278fddce8b&_e=foayp-VN6yOHqe6xX20ucCaVzVDA2xDlR3CViQJDWoM6dUcFPtfvE7uakGvkqtAkOWVMp1X-c6_yA53d36zjnCKD5HE14nwD33aCzduNCEW37ssXt4L6qgMsttIKgEQmVnmxCezmGYrxDkgFCIOamgEb-amK9Y_a5qHNBlRy2UGnT9khrpbAthdKEQyZSwZO0NLzJklaYDNVGn9bboDvfanlT1M2T8jDUpL3vD7dttc6VNIuXn7rYPaSOYjy28a4hzIIPk6P7tl292zta6WYWBXCn0zcCjV4kNPwiMMkazlog-1MTvPyzh5KAo-XbdS9OY7b-yBO5eAlx9Pnc23IVf030p6nSvX3L5xzvixsxVipZInMZn_2CQ6FSdIy_kM5TwpDIFmN3sFP8gUus5OJrYa-8Ru8kYFWcTw3v68zugV4qOLmX7wXv_4qNaVwaoX1ti3r3b9bN6WNlBrh2UKnQkI8BVvpL988dmsx5qb7snEQ5lNgSryAdWR0xZkF9phi)
---
Patriot,

---
A new poll conducted by Bloomberg/Monmouth just came out showing that we’re once again beating Crooked Joe Biden in the battleground states that will decide the outcome of the 2024 election.
---
Voters also got to say which issues they prefer me to handle rather than Crooked Joe. Take a look at the long list of issues:
---
**_Immigration_** **_Economy_**** _Crime_**** _US-China relations_**** _Guns_**** _Russia-Ukraine war_** **_Regulation of tech companies_**** _Infrastructure_**** _Housing_**** _Labor and unions_**
---
Voters prefer _our campaign_ on just about every single issue. In fact, a Republican presidential candidate winning on the issue of labor and unions is completely unheard of!
---
(Sadly, voters were not asked which candidate would excel at taking bribes and engaging in corruption. If such an option had been provided, Biden would’ve led by 99 points.)
---
Our campaign platform is very simple. It’s called Make America Great Again!
---
No one in their right mind could ever disagree with that.
---
Voters remember what life was like when I was your president – and they’re not too happy to see what’s happened ever since that very tragic day when the Biden Crime Family moved into the White House.
---
I know these are troubling times for our country. Wars are breaking out all over the world. Our economy is in peril. Inflation is showing no signs of slowing down. Our Southern border ceases to exist and has become a point of entry for radical terrorists.
---
But, please do me (and your fellow citizens) this one favor: **_NEVER GIVE UP ON AMERICA_**.
---
Today may be dark. We may even find that the first 11 months of 2024 will be darker.
---
But on November 5, 2024, you will have a renewed sense of hope as Americans everywhere unite to take back our country and Make America Great Again!
---
That is... _only if_ you don’t give up on America!
---
If you are doing poorly right now as so many Americans sadly are, then please stop reading here. Let my message of hope inspire you for the rest of your day as you head into the weekend!
---
Otherwise, there is more work to be done in these very important battleground states – and our campaign could certainly use your support.
---

clean_body: On nearly every single issue, we’re LEADING. | | | Patriot, A new poll conducted by Bloomberg/Monmouth just came out showing that we’re once again beating Crooked Joe Biden in the battleground states that will decide the outcome of the 2024 election. Voters also got to say which issues they prefer me to handle rather than Crooked Joe. Take a look at the long list of issues: Immigration Economy Crime US-China relations Guns Russia-Ukraine war Regulation of tech companies Infrastructure Housing Labor and unions Voters prefer our campaign on just about every single issue. In fact, a Republican presidential candidate winning on the issue of labor and unions is completely unheard of! (Sadly, voters were not asked which candidate would excel at taking bribes and engaging in corruption. If such an option had been provided, Biden would’ve led by 99 points.) Our campaign platform is very simple. It’s called Make America Great Again! No one in their right mind could ever disagree with that. Voters remember what life was like when I was your president – and they’re not too happy to see what’s happened ever since that very tragic day when the Biden Crime Family moved into the White House. I know these are troubling times for our country. Wars are breaking out all over the world. Our economy is in peril. Inflation is showing no signs of slowing down. Our Southern border ceases to exist and has become a point of entry for radical terrorists. But, please do me (and your fellow citizens) this one favor: NEVER GIVE UP ON AMERICA. Today may be dark. We may even find that the first 11 months of 2024 will be darker. But on November 5, 2024, you will have a renewed sense of hope as Americans everywhere unite to take back our country and Make America Great Again! That is... only if you don’t give up on America! If you are doing poorly right now as so many Americans sadly are, then please stop reading here. Let my message of hope inspire you for the rest of your day as you head into the weekend! Otherwise, there is more work to be done in these very important battleground states – and our campaign could certainly use your support. | | Thank you, Donald J. Trump45th President of the United States | | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. | Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and Save America.

name: Josh Hawley
subject: This time next year...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | Peter, I can’t believe it - 2023 has absolutely _flown_ by.

This time next year, we’ll be in the final month before the most important election of our lifetime.

**And while the Democrats will be pushing for more far-left socialist control, I’ll be fighting to defend the freedoms we still have left.**

The last thing we need is two more years of Democrat control, Friend.

They’ve done enough damage to our country -it’s time to get things back on track.

_That’s why I’m asking for your support today._

clean_body: | | | Peter, I can’t believe it - 2023 has absolutely flown by. This time next year, we’ll be in the final month before the most important election of our lifetime. And while the Democrats will be pushing for more far-left socialist control, I’ll be fighting to defend the freedoms we still have left. The last thing we need is two more years of Democrat control, Friend. They’ve done enough damage to our country -it’s time to get things back on track. That’s why I’m asking for your support today. Chuck Schumer, George Soros, and their billionaire socialist friends are targeting my seat for 2024, and we need EVERY grassroots patriot to step up if we’re going to defeat them. Thank you, Josh Hawley | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | |

name: Kristan Hawkins, Students for Life Action
subject: leading the charge!
body:
Dear Pro-Life Friend,

With voting on the Abortion Lobby’s _Issue 1_ abortion referendum coming down to the wire on Tuesday, November 7th, the battle for Ohio gets more and more heated every single day.

In fact, the Abortion Lobby believes this battle is so important that Illinois’ Democrat Governor JB Pritzker just launched a national organization focused on expanding abortion "rights" in states across the country.

Governor Pritzker's _Think Big America_ plans to fund massive ballot measures that would codify abortion up until birth, _no questions asked_ , into law in several states including Ohio, Nevada, Florida, and Arizona.

You probably already know by now that Ohio has become one of the top battlegrounds for the pro-life movement, which is exactly why _Students for Life Action_ has been working non-stop to ensure it remains one of the top pro-life states in America.

Thanks to your support, we’ve registered over 500 pro-life students to vote in the Buckeye State _– in just a handful of campus stops._

Not only that, but _Students for Life Action_ has the HIGHEST call total of any group involved in this state battle BY FAR.

In just one day, our student volunteers are able to make 4,000 calls to Ohio voters, committing them to VOTE NO on _Issue 1!_

**[_But to see this through, could you please make your most generous contribution of $250, $100, $75, or $50 to _Students for Life Action_ so we can continue to STOP the Abortion Lobby’s radical scheme to take over Ohio_](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sykajk-duchtdja-y/)?**

Or if what I’m asking is just too much right now, **[even $25 or $10 will help us defeat the Abortion Lobby in Ohio](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sykajk-duchtdja-j/).**

Sadly, Pro-Life Friend, the biggest problem we’ve identified in Ohio is that most voters don’t know what _Issue 1_ would do.

_In fact,**HALF** of voters for _Issue 1_ are self-described pro-lifers_!

Of course, this confusion is all by the Abortion Lobby’s design. . .

**So, allow me to clear the air with the _TRUTH_!**

If passed, Ohio’s _Issue 1_ abortion referendum would:

******* Enshrine abortion-on-demand in Ohio’s state Constitution throughout all nine months of a pregnancy;
******* Allow abortionists to commit abortions on pregnant minors without parents knowing anything about it; and
******* Allow surgeons to mutilate the bodies of minors with sex change surgeries and allow Planned Parenthood to dispense hormone treatment to these same minors with zero parental involvement.
This referendum would spell disaster for Ohioan mothers and their preborn babies, which is why _Students for Life Action_ is fighting back **_HARD**_ to:

**>>>** Continue hosting pro-life political workshops all across Ohio to train and mobilize over 200 pro-life activists;
**>>>** Target Ohio’s Christian colleges and universities to drive up pro-life turnout;
**>>>** Launch an all-out traditional media and social media effort; and
**>>>** Unleash an all-out voter contact blitz targeting 18-35 year-olds with our PROVEN program.

These efforts are what we need to continue hammering on if we’re going to win in Ohio.

**[But they’re also why I need you to make your most generous contribution to _Students for Life Action_ before the November 7th vote](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sykajk-duchtdja-i/)!**

Pro-Life Friend, even as we hit all these stops in Ohio, there’s one major caveat to everything we’ve done. . .

**_Many so-called “pro-life” Republicans have been missing in action_.**

In fact, if I’m being honest, **_MOST_** Republicans have been running away from the abortion issue _– all at the expense of the pro-life movement._

At this point, I’ve come to expect this kind of behavior from our Republican “Representatives” in D.C., but Ohio Republicans are following the same playbook as them.

This has made me. . . well. . . _frankly, I’m disappointed._

And while Ohio Republicans are asleep at the wheel, the entirety of Ohio’s future is resting on our shoulders.

But I’ve never been one to shy away from a challenge.

And I know you aren’t one to either, Pro-Life Friend.

**[That’s why I’m asking for your most generous contribution of $250, $100, $75, or $50 as the November 7th _Issue 1_ election](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sykajk-duchtdja-d/).**

Of course, if that’s just not possible right now, **[even $25 or $10 will be a huge help to us as we fight the Abortion Lobby in Ohio](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sykajk-duchtdja-h/).**

Thank you for everything you continue to do for Life.

For Life,

Kristan Hawkins
President, Students for Life Action

Students for Life Action is a non-profit, tax-exempt advocacy organization under section 501(c)(4) of the IRC. Contributions or gifts to Students for Life Action are not tax deductible for IRS purposes; they do, however, avoid recognition of gain on appreciated assets. Students for Life Action's mailing address is 600 Princess Anne St #7667, Fredericksburg, VA 22401. Any donations raised above or short of the goal will be used in the next area of greatest need towards our mission, as determined by the organization.

[update preferences](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.updatemyprofile.com/j-sykajk-026154D2-duchtdja-k) | [unsubscribe](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-u-sykajk-duchtdja-u/)

name: 4Patriots
subject: Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning...

**The Truth About The Coming Crisis** **This might be your only warning...** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **" Food shortages are coming."** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z2r5u35ce76mjje66mg5337e19dupr3hor1de3do_rp22sh2s8i66p77cjhmep72cdh2bs). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z73ng4e4gghqqijlhu1usj7i7ckgvcrdn6pfrhhg_rp22sh2s8i66p77cjhmep72cdh2bs) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. Stock up now on these survival food kits while you can.
---

American Briefing
---

name: Tim Holbert, American Veterans Center
subject: Support our WWII heroes at this year's Conference
body:
I wouldn't ask for your help if it weren't urgent.

| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24402%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kdpf9nsajttQDW6pwyOyWA&sysid=1)
---
Fellow American, I wouldn't ask for your help if it weren't urgent. **This year, the American Veterans Center is expecting our BIGGEST gathering of World War II heroes for our Annual Veterans Conference in nearly 20 years.** And while the budget for this year's Annual Veterans Conference has already been spent, the American Veterans Center team is _still_ hearing from World War II veterans who would like to attend. The **Gary Sinise Foundation** is generously providing lodging ... **American Airlines** is providing flights ... and I hope that you, Fellow American, would consider helping to cover lunch and dinner for our World War II heroes during this year's Veterans' Conference.
---
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24402%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kdpf9nsajttQDW6pwyOyWA&sysid=1)
---
**[Can I count on your urgent gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, or more before Wednesday, October 25 to help cover the meals for our World War II heroes at this year's Conference?](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24403%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JNQXTx7DypTz5TZ%2bIRjjEw&sysid=1)** On average, it costs $100 for each day of meals we provide to a World War II veteran. To make sure we can cover all the meals for the veterans we expect, I'm urgently raising $3,000 before Wednesday, October 25.
---
[Give $25 -- Cover 1 Veteran's Breakfast](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24404%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1SQZtio5jSHzPaSzUKq7EQ&sysid=1)
---
[Give $50 -- Cover 1 Veteran's Dinner ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24415%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VGNK11vycDcHK0dBXiR8Rg&sysid=1)
---
[Give $100 -- Cover 1 Veteran's Day](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24416%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qQDJZ1ZaoRWcxMCB6Lenqw&sysid=1)
---
[Give ANY amount to help](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24417%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HBomxzEC5ToDS8VRiq2DLA&sysid=1)
---
Every year, generous and patriotic Americans like YOU help the American Veterans Center honor our nation's heroes, from World War II to today, at the Annual Veterans Conference. At this special, one-of-a-kind event, veterans have the opportunity to share their stories with young people and military cadets in attendance. They can reconnect with their brothers- and sisters-in-arms. And, just as important, they can know that their stories are professionally recorded and preserved by AVC, so their legacy is passed on to the next generation.
---
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24402%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kdpf9nsajttQDW6pwyOyWA&sysid=1)
---
The AVC Annual Veterans Conference is a monumental occasion for veterans of every generation. _But it's particularly moving for our World War II heroes, who will see firsthand how their service and sacrifices are still being honored, 80 years later._ **[Before Wednesday, October 25, the American Veterans Center is urgently raising $3,000 to provide all the meals to our World War II heroes at this year's Conference. If these WWII veterans can count on your support, please make your generous gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more right now.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24418%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=f3UPLfixualWsE%2fxHmjlRg&sysid=1)**
---
[Support a WWII hero at AVC's Annual Veterans Conference](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24419%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6j90kJ1ACyLO917jKt9TyA&sysid=1)
---
Your generosity today will ensure the Greatest Generation's legacy lives on, making their bravery immortal and safeguarding the firsthand accounts of their valor and service for generations to come. **[Please -- if you'd like to help support a WWII hero at this year's Conference -- make your most generous gift right now.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24410%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SQu8y5xjBMeI%2bIHsqnQTtQ&sysid=1)** Thank you for your support and thank you for playing a critical role in honoring our World War II heroes at this year's Conference. Tim Holbert President American Veterans Center P.S. Your contribution to this special mission doesn't just make a difference -- it makes history. Let's ensure every World War II veteran who wishes to attend this year's Annual Veterans Conference can have all their costs fully covered! **[Please make your most generous gift today.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24411%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PH%2b7w3Wli%2bgOOIRDTe93yQ&sysid=1)**
---
[Support a WWII hero at AVC's Annual Veterans Conference](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24419%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6j90kJ1ACyLO917jKt9TyA&sysid=1)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---

Your America News
---

subject: Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning...

**The Truth About
The Coming Crisis** This might be your only warning... According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite the severity of the situation, the mainstream media has chosen to remain silent. And our own government has ignored the dire warnings of industry experts. Experts like a fourth-generation American farmer who warns of the impending crisis: **"Food shortages are coming."** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Well, no need to worry anymore... When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of best-selling survival food kits.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z25t19b01fv1btr7dq7mmpku2vtgnfepb2j9ojs0_rp22sh2s8i66p77cjhm1o71c9h2bs) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. name: Bob Carlstrom
subject: Have you seen the polls?
body:
Fellow Patriot, Have you seen the latest polls?

| |
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zoh1vccqvdfg85qb5b26lr02hnvhh40betmo44vo_rp22sh2s8i66p77cjhm1o73c9h2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot,Have you seen the latest polls?
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs6904p2fct4n5a97ns5h66p1q6o4cspbihm2ur8_rp22sh2s8i66p77cjhm1o73c9h2bs)
---
Recent polls show Joe Biden losing to any Republican candidate. But you and I know that polls like this will mean nothing if the radical left is allowed to cheat and steal their way into office.That’s why we need to stand up and act now to restore and protect the integrity of our elections. **_NO_**** _mass, unverified voting from home..._**** _ _** **_NO_**** _remote drop boxes...._****_NO_**** _vote harvesting..._**** _NO_**** _manipulation of the vulnerable elderly voters in nursing homes...._** **_NO_**** _extended registration deadlines..._**** _ _****_And NO counting late ballots AFTER the polls have closed. _****_ _** **[If you stand with me, I need you to make a special contribution of $24 to secure our elections immediately.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9d4q1usm4qe2m2pmq5pr04romfr2tseavie04eo_rp22sh2s8i66p77cjhm1o73c9h2bs)** Friend, my name is Bob Carlstrom – President of AMAC Action. You may have heard of AMAC Action before – we’re the #1 most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative seniors like you. If you’ve ever heard of AMAC Action, you may know that unlike the left-leaning AARP, we’ve been fighting AGAINST “Obamacare”, AGAINST “Medicare for All,” and AGAINST all of these radical schemes to “transform” America. That’s why we have 75 chapters and 328 delegates fighting to preserve and protect our Constitution and our traditional values and heritage. AMAC Action and its volunteer advocates pound on the doors of every member of the U.S. House of Representatives and the U.S. Senate to fight for you. Friend, I’m reaching out to you today because we only have one year to make sure our elections are secure for the 2024 presidential election. As you know, the 2024 presidential election is shaping up to be one of the most important elections of our lifetime.If we don’t secure our elections now, we might have to suffer through a fourth term of Obama-Biden that could be even worse than the first three.That’s why AMAC Action needs your help. The only way we can help ensure that our country’s future elections are free, fair, and honest is with the help of generous, patriotic Americans like you. **_[That’s why today, I’m asking you to make a contribution of $24 or more to AMAC Action.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zta76ve7vt7pb0d023b7arjgag421lm8opv5kq9g_rp22sh2s8i66p77cjhm1o73c9h2bs)_******_We the People_** , should decide the **outcomes** of our elections – NOT the “Fake News” media; **** **_We the People_** , should decide the **rules** of our elections – NOT the Democrats who love to change the rules to suit their needs; **_We the People_** , govern ourselves and won’t surrender our freedom to 3rd-world style Socialist banana-republic tyranny. And if** _We the People, you and I, Friend,_** don’t step up right now – our children and grandchildren simply won’t get to experience the same country you and I grew up in. **[Please, make your best possible contribution to AMAC Action today to defend the integrity of our elections.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zuae8870ngo6cbv3p3rd3na1ndlegteamumg7lh8_rp22sh2s8i66p77cjhm1o73c9h2bs)** Thank you in advance for your generous support.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
Bob Carlstrom, PresidentAMAC Action

Every time I've reached out to you for help, you've stepped up.

_**Now, I 'm humbly asking you again for your support -- and this time, EVERYTHING is on the line.**_

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: In what order do the end-times events take place?
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjk1LWNmMzhkZmY1NGUxZjQ2MWZhOTc1ZDA2ZWE4MzkwNjllIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZS5wdHYub3JnL3BlcmZlY3QtZW5kaW5nLWdlbmVyb3VzLWdpZnQ_c291cmNlX2NvZGU9V0VCJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249cGVyZmVjdF9lbmRpbmcmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QUVfRkFMUjQzNjgwIn0/NqGg5DNMh9eLh2CvTQRyjw)
---
Hello Friend,Have you been watching what is going on in our world? Do you need help to encourage you in your faith and fortify your hope in these dark days?When anxiety over inflation, wars, and uncertainty strikes, you need hope immediately. That's why God has given you His Word. He doesn't want you to have to wait for the peace that comes from knowing He's in control of the future.God's Word says that he knows how the end will happen.. Jesus rules victoriously over evil, and you'll spend an eternity in glory - free from pain and suffering - in His presence. That is such good news!While we wait for that ending, perhaps you or someone you love might have questions about what is happening now in our world and how it fits in with what God says is coming. Those are legitimate questions, and God's Word has answers!I've written a book that outlines the end of your story. That ending is powerful and perfect. You won't be disappointed, and believe me, you won't want to change a thing. The name of my book is _Perfect Ending: Why Your Eternal Future Matters Today_.This book will help you face your tomorrows, not in fear, but in absolute confidence, to prepare you for the soon and certain return of Christ. As you read, you'll:
---
* Gain valuable insight into how future biblical events affect you in the here and now.
* Find the answers to the 10 most frequently asked questions about heaven.
* Discover how some of our government's policies are paving the way for the Antichrist.
* Come to understand the crucial, but often confusing and overwhelming subject of Bible prophecy.
* Understand the precise sequence and importance of prophetic events like the rapture, tribulation, and millennium.

---
_Perfect Ending_ will be mailed to you as a way of saying thanks for whatever donation you are able to give to the ministry of Pathway to Victory. And as an added bonus, we will include our informative Bible Prophecy Chart to help you visualize end-times events.
---
| | [](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjk1LWNmMzhkZmY1NGUxZjQ2MWZhOTc1ZDA2ZWE4MzkwNjllIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZS5wdHYub3JnL3BlcmZlY3QtZW5kaW5nLWdlbmVyb3VzLWdpZnQ_c291cmNlX2NvZGU9V0VCJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249cGVyZmVjdF9lbmRpbmcmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QUVfRkFMUjQzNjgwIn0/kJj1SIWDY1BH9WwF3BacGg)
---
Both of these resources are yours when you give here: **[https://secure.ptv.org/perfect-ending-generous-gift](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjk1LWNmMzhkZmY1NGUxZjQ2MWZhOTc1ZDA2ZWE4MzkwNjllIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZS5wdHYub3JnL3BlcmZlY3QtZW5kaW5nLWdlbmVyb3VzLWdpZnQ_c291cmNlX2NvZGU9V0VCJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249cGVyZmVjdF9lbmRpbmcmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QUVfRkFMUjQzNjgwIn0/IBxttmh_GgdsmBsNnUeTKw)** Each day is one day closer to the day when Christ returns. Let's be watching and waiting - and learning all we can from God's Word about our role in the days ahead.Eagerly awaiting His return, Dr. Robert JeffressSenior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---
Faith & Liberty PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjk1LWNmMzhkZmY1NGUxZjQ2MWZhOTc1ZDA2ZWE4MzkwNjllIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/sLUJvTPSJib3iJDg1A29sQ) to unsubscribe.

name: Ryan Zinke [MT-01]
subject: I thought it best if you heard it from me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by ZINKE FOR CONGRESS
body:
They think you are all bark & no bite.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhh4beug9qhctibmsmqqcoa3frp360gfu2fgk4gg_rp22sh2s8i66p77cjjm4ob2c3h2bs)
---
Friend,

Democrats and their overlords on Wall Street are so filthy rich, they think that people like you and me are all bark & no bite.

They spend all of their time in the swamp, living like royalty & raising millions for their campaigns while folks like us get stuck with the tab.

But I spent most of my life in war zones.

And when I joined the Navy, I took an oath to defend America & I have every intention of upholding that very oath in all that I do.

Right now that way is by defending our House Majority & sending Joe Biden back to retirement in one of his many mansions on the east coast.

If I've learned one thing- it's that the last place you ever want to be standing is between a Democrat & political power.

And as a Navy SEAL- there is nothing I won't do & no place I won't go to defend our great nation.
---
| | [STAND WITH RYAN ZINKE](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrivb7p6boosj614gsmj1gmd3cqmc953m0n4du58_rp22sh2s8i66p77cjjm4ob2c3h2bs)
---

But right now Joe Biden & the radical left have made removing me from Congress their party's crowning glory.

They've been hellbent on putting the kibosh on my campaign from DAY ONE.

**[So I'll cut to the chase: I'm humbly asking if you could give just $7 to help win this race?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ze7dbcqa81bmedjighhab28gljeh6d0fghfppeg0_rp22sh2s8i66p77cjjm4ob2c3h2bs "So I’ll cut to the chase: I'm humbly asking if you could give just $7 to help win this race?")**

---
| | [STAND WITH RYAN ZINKE](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z33a1l7d672ifimd233qi9qnpdsu1l8gs03e90go_rp22sh2s8i66p77cjjm4ob2c3h2bs)
---

I'm not the kind of person who usually asks like this, but if we lose this race, we lose everything. America will never be the same.

**[Can a former Navy SEAL like myself count on you to have my back for the rest of this mission?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrvj1dccdhkin724abft1c6ol8cl8nlr1t4sr26g_rp22sh2s8i66p77cjjm4ob2c3h2bs "Can a former Navy SEAL like myself count on you to have my back for the rest of this mission?")**

Thank you,

Ryan Zinke (MT-01)
Ret. Navy SEAL
SEAL Team 6 Commander
* * *
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zuekpcsvc2a7rm6p19dnbdu6hj297cl73rvvacp8_rp22sh2s8i66p77cjjm4ob2c3h2bs)
---
| | Ryan Zinke is a fifth generation Montanan who has dedicated his life to serving our great nation. Ryan is a decorated U.S. Navy SEAL officer who retired after 23 years of military service. After the military, Ryan served two terms as a State Senator, was twice elected as Montana's Congressman, and served two years as U.S. Secretary of the Interior under President Trump. Now after a couple quiet years spent with his family, he is serving again in Congress to help save America from threats we face both foreign and domestic.

**[SUPPORT HIS FIGHT TODAY](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpnceij5im7ujqicn7td4rrsk61j5qn38l6498dg_rp22sh2s8i66p77cjjm4ob2c3h2bs "SUPPORT HIS FIGHT TODAY")**

Navy SEAL SEAL Team 6 Commander | | | Ryan Zinke is a fifth generation Montanan who has dedicated his life to serving our great nation. Ryan is a decorated U.S. Navy SEAL officer who retired after 23 years of military service. After the military, Ryan served two terms as a State Senator, was twice elected as Montana's Congressman, and served two years as U.S. Secretary of the Interior under President Trump. Now after a couple quiet years spent with his family, he is serving again in Congress to help save America from threats we face both foreign and domestic. "SUPPORT HIS FIGHT TODAY"** | | Paid for by ZINKE FOR CONGRESS GOP Presidential 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: 4Patriots
subject: Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning...

**The Truth About The Coming Crisis** **This might be your only warning...** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **“Food shortages are coming.”** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24420%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=n%2fcZTLu91FBoP74mwaJPIw&sysid=1). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24421%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZhuPhheaz%2bIdtXdGLI5S6w&sysid=1) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. Stock up now on these survival food kits while you can.
---

Your America News
---
_Your America News • 625 First Street #183 • Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: George Logan
subject: I play in a Jimi Hendrix tribute band
body:
=
I’m the frontman for a Jimi Hendrix tribute band that plays in some of Connecticut’s most rockin’ venues... but that’s not all!

| |
---
| | | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c671711%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aps3uaLJthNeQJ49Y%2bm6%2bQ&sysid=1)
---

Friend - Have you heard the news?

**[I’m running for Congress in the most important battleground race in the entire country.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c671712%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8cznGY2trYwmaNkvYoGbcQ&sysid=1 "I’m running for Congress
in the most important battleground race in the entire country.")**

**My name is George Logan.** I’m a proud family man, engineer, community leader, small business owner, and frontman for Electric Lady Band, a Jimi Hendrix tribute band that plays in some of Connecticut’s most rockin’ venues.
---
| | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c671711%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aps3uaLJthNeQJ49Y%2bm6%2bQ&sysid=1)
---
Although, it’s more likely you know me from my 2022 campaign for Congress, where **we narrowly missed flipping Connecticut's 5th Congressional District red by fewer than 2,000 votes.**

When handed a tough defeat, you have two choices - you can give up, or you can regroup and come back stronger than before.

But if we are going to be successful in this rematch, then I’m going to need your help right now! **Last time, we were outraised by over $1,000,000,** **[so I need your help to make sure our campaign starts strong and closes the gap!](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c671713%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=D%2be0VTwtovL%2fJXJFHgIk9A&sysid=1 "so I need your help to
make sure our campaign starts strong and closes the gap!")**
| | [HELP GEORGE FLIP THIS SEAT
CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT »](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c671711%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aps3uaLJthNeQJ49Y%2bm6%2bQ&sysid=1)
---

Look, I’m the son of immigrants. My grandparents left Jamaica for Guatemala during the Great Depression, and like so many other American families, my parents left Guatemala and came to America to grow a family and build a better life. **I’ve seen that it takes hard work to overcome challenges.**
| | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c671711%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aps3uaLJthNeQJ49Y%2bm6%2bQ&sysid=1)
---
This is a photo of my mom and dad. They instilled the values I live by today: to **put your family first, give back to your community, value your education, and always work hard.**

They worked day and night at factory jobs and office administrative work to ensure I was getting the education to land a better job **so that I could pursue my American dream. **
---
| | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c671711%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aps3uaLJthNeQJ49Y%2bm6%2bQ&sysid=1)
---
I am a first-generation college graduate, and I even earned my master’s degree. I had to take out a good amount of student loans, but as my parents taught me, my hard work would pay off.

I soon met my wife, Lisa, and we fell in love. She has always been my rock. She spent her career working as a nurse, helping those struggling with their mental health and addiction.**Together we did what every family strives to do, make sure the American Dream lives on for our children.**
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c671711%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aps3uaLJthNeQJ49Y%2bm6%2bQ&sysid=1)
---
Lisa and I could not be prouder of our kids. But my goal is to continue making them proud of me; **my job as their role model is not done yet.**

I am living proof that the American dream is alive and well, but that dream cannot end with me. I want my children and future generations to have the opportunity to reach their full potential in life.

I have seen the mess that Joe Biden and the Democrats’ policies have brought upon our nation, and I have seen firsthand the struggles it has placed on my community. **I can’t stand the fact that this is the environment our children have to start their lives in**.

Our country has lost sight of our founding principles due to poor leadership and a culture that looks down on patriotism, and **[I’m ready to do something about it.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c671714%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mCTTLQeZaUj7tLkqbGr%2bhQ&sysid=1 "I’m ready to do something
about it.")**

Looking at these photos brought back some great memories, and I hope to keep making more in a country that we all can be proud of.

I know times are hard in Biden’s economy, but if you are in the position to give, **[please consider chipping in just $5, $10, or even $25 to help our campaign start strong!](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c671725%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=b9t3498n12WPsIa0CVUk4A&sysid=1 "please consider chipping
in just $5, $10, or even $25 to help our campaign start strong!")**

---
| | | [ HELP GEORGE FLIP THIS SEAT
CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT »](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c671711%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aps3uaLJthNeQJ49Y%2bm6%2bQ&sysid=1)
---
**The early days of this race will be critical in our fight to retake this seat for Republicans**. My incumbent Democrat opponent is a rubber stamp for every one of President Biden's bad ideas, and she has chosen to stand with The Squad rather than stand up for us. **[I’m going to need your continued support to win.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c671726%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JbtZRQHfjQ6%2bRvr4znhALQ&sysid=1 "I’m going to need your
continued support to win. ")**

Sincerely,
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c671711%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aps3uaLJthNeQJ49Y%2bm6%2bQ&sysid=1)
---
George Logan

---
|
---
| Paid for George Logan For Congress
---

26 Catoonah Street Box 72
Ridgefield, CT, 06877

[Privacy Policy](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c671727%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XJw05BMOrsKi08W0McPp1g&sysid=1)

American Update
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c2784%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=hAB%2bOEDzf%2bgqVZd092BmLg&sysid=1)
_[**unsubscribe**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c671728%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DDzz980BWUEupZxrtFBFnQ&sysid=1)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c671729%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GLgczoc%2bAZuC7LTlNSPO%2fg&sysid=1)_
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c2784%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=hAB%2bOEDzf%2bgqVZd092BmLg&sysid=1)

I know times are hard in Biden’s economy, but if you are in the position to give, "please consider chipping in just $5, $10, or even $25 to help our campaign start strong!" | | | The early days of this race will be critical in our fight to retake this seat for Republicans. My incumbent Democrat opponent is a rubber stamp for every one of President Biden's bad ideas, and she has chosen to stand with The Squad rather than stand up for us. "I’m going to need your continued support to win. " Sincerely, | George Logan | | Paid for George Logan For Congress 26 Catoonah Street Box 72 Ridgefield, CT, 06877 American Update 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Nikki Haley
subject: The importance of a dollar.
body:
I’m running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zq0sduorhs65hl5jqvim8tf7pi6sn0ehaiphdebg_rp22sh2s8i66p77cjjm6o32clh2bs)
---

I am a mom and an accountant, Friend, which means I know how to stretch a dollar.

That's why, on day one, I made sure our team knew that the success of our movement relies on grassroots supporters like YOU. With that, comes a responsibility to make every dollar count and spend your donations wisely.

Unlike other campaigns that are burning through money on private planes, fancy dinners, and country clubs, **we are a lean and mean operation.**

We stretch every dollar as far as it can go and know it's important to spend our money when it counts. But even covering basic expenses to host town halls and travel to battleground states to meet with voters adds up.

**[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $20.24 today to help fund my grassroots efforts so we can get my message out and win!](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zd730knlvhrodt0ouaafcv9kir4mfm1fnmaui8ag_rp22sh2s8i66p77cjjm6o32clh2bs "That’s why I’m asking you to contribute $20.24 today to help fund my grassroots efforts so we can get my message out and win! ")**

Here are just a couple meaningful ways your contribution has helped our team:

**-> TRAVELING:** From day one, I've prioritized meeting with voters, shaking every hand, and amplifying my message everywhere I can. In order to do that, my team and I are flying all over the country, and we're doing it while spending money wisely.

I can tell you firsthand, we're not out here lighting money on fire with private planes and extravagant luxury hotels like some campaigns. We're flying a lot of Spirit and JetBlue. We're getting to New Hampshire, Iowa, and everywhere else we need to go with the most affordable options we can find.

---
| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zc9ujapugcj1s0n06k15q5a4vh54fpmctkdm1u98_rp22sh2s8i66p77cjjm6o32clh2bs)
---

**-> EVENTS:** We're running a true grassroots campaign, and that means being on the ground, holding as many grassroots events as possible. Every time we hold a town hall in Iowa, South Carolina, or New Hampshire, it's an opportunity to share my vision, answer questions, and gain the confidence of voters.

But what you may not realize is that all of the costs can quickly add up to rent the event space, chairs, and sound equipment. In order to spend your money wisely, we're holding these events at places like bakeries, local venues, and farms.

---
| | | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zq6ko0qthe5mfk9f86a0ghcrmubknj6a5p8k35l8_rp22sh2s8i66p77cjjm6o32clh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zt5tbqo8ea7brh2voa57r3u2g81vfnu2ss388rqg_rp22sh2s8i66p77cjjm6o32clh2bs)
---
At the end of the day, this is a tried and true grassroots operation. Our staff is lean and mean and you better believe we're working every hour of the day and spending every dollar wisely. But all of this still costs money, which is why we need your help.

Once the first-in-the-nation caucus is here, it's only a matter of time before the rest of the country begins to cast their ballots.

It's a marathon and we've got to stay on pace to win each and every day. **[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $20.24 today to help fund my grassroots efforts so we can get my message out and win!](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zv34cfnrdsdgj18ce8upfc4vmpjvunssabevi69g_rp22sh2s8i66p77cjjm6o32clh2bs "That’s why I’m asking you to contribute $20.24 today to help fund my grassroots efforts so we can get my message out and win!")**

---
| | [CONTRIBUTE $20.24](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zj9v8937blagltj3c06p019blh91qkmqlc20is48_rp22sh2s8i66p77cjjm6o32clh2bs)
---

**It 's crunch time, Friend!** There's no room for holding back. With just **88 days** left until voting begins every single day matters which is why I appreciate your generous support today when it matters most.
---

My very best,

---
| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zq6hfrjv7jd0r6a7390inf65fvgqs7qnd2sfj020_rp22sh2s8i66p77cjjm6o32clh2bs)
---
Nikki Haley
---
| | [DONATE](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4q0iedtb8d0919cmd0f0s3bp791k0uroa4820n0_rp22sh2s8i66p77cjjm6o32clh2bs)
---
| | | | |
---
| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmh3il1nnh0v3c2cdkk3ei72m0jm705jbqqmbvso_rp22sh2s8i66p77cjjm6o32clh2bs "NikkiHaley_Merch")
---
| | [GET YOUR HAT NOW](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zldmklq3a2g8q5nnt728asmbfoerithb39fvg818_rp22sh2s8i66p77cjjm6o32clh2bs "Claim Your Mug")
---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrag3uin23pd977munkp14e8gkqk2gic6n9kp3bo_rp22sh2s8i66p77cjjm6o32clh2bs "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.
**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlpjh8041pfbu2ihpk82sb6g2dsje7mmjpnmnof0_rp22sh2s8i66p77cjjm6o32clh2bs "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

---
| | [DONATE](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdcbjkht9slrct53dpmvip9b7rel7087uupkbnng_rp22sh2s8i66p77cjjm6o32clh2bs "DONATE")
---
| | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc.

[www.TeamStandForAmerica.com](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z33fk1h1gjce83v8u6n28rovhp6k0l1g3aiiqu50_rp22sh2s8i66p77cjjm6o32clh2bs)
---

Texts may be sent via an automated telephone dialing system. Consent not required to contribute. Message frequency varies. Message and data rates may apply. You can opt out at any time. Text STOP to end. Text HELP for help. [Privacy Policy](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zu13aje8ccqa6s2qjnelu77mnv4b5ltrj5j4r650_rp22sh2s8i66p77cjjm6o32clh2bs). [Terms and conditions](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo09vg6td71rjp8e3c44gos9sarais72do29agf0_rp22sh2s8i66p77cjjm6o32clh2bs).

Contributions are not tax-deductible. Team Stand For America does not accept contributions from foreign nationals.

name: Tim Sheehy, Navy SEAL
subject: Down by 4 points
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
I know we will win in November, but I can’t do it without you.

---

Friend - did you see this NEW Montana Senate Poll?

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zi7gqumhmk38o1i5ap4fgfhshvj9vch10gbdavp0_rp22sh2s8i66p77cjjm6o36cjh2bs)
We're GAINING FAST on an 18-year incumbent, Democrat career politician Jon Tester.

I haven't been in this race long - _just three and a half months_ - but what we're doing is working.

Friend, I am new to politics. I've never run for office before. And I'm not a career politician. I'm a former Navy SEAL, aerial firefighter, and job creator ready to bring a new generation of conservative leadership to Washington.

But I cannot do this without conservative patriots like you.

**[Before the day is over, can I count on you to chip in $4 or even $40 to help us catch up to entrenched Democrat Jon Tester?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zkis7v5i0n22gfsc7akd2tasccq737ea2vi0h4e8_rp22sh2s8i66p77cjjm6o36cjh2bs)**

**We cannot win a Republican Senate majority without winning in Montana, friend.**

**[I wouldn't ask for your help today if this wasn't the top priority.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrm1l4bcucna7i2eqtmnebgqdm05fvpt2b7sfln8_rp22sh2s8i66p77cjjm6o36cjh2bs)**

For America's Future,
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zoeoc6q958v9kd56eiolfsdaar869jvniigueql8_rp22sh2s8i66p77cjjm6o36cjh2bs)
Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL
Republican for U.S. Senate

[**SEND IN THE SEAL
CHIP IN TODAY**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zk1ao9i1b675nk7s0abr2m2m44frvfati9jamr0o_rp22sh2s8i66p77cjjm6o36cjh2bs)

|
* * *

"
"I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL."

Friend, I am new to politics. I've never run for office before. And I'm not a career politician. I'm a former Navy SEAL, aerial firefighter, and job creator ready to bring a new generation of conservative leadership to Washington. But I cannot do this without conservative patriots like you. We cannot win a Republican Senate majority without winning in Montana, friend. For America's Future, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL Republican for U.S. Senate | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. ICYMI News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Congresswoman Jen Kiggans
subject: Have I shown you this picture before?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kiggans for Congress
body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ To unsubscribe from the Kiggans for Congress, click here Hi, for those I haven’t met yet, I’m Jen Kiggans and this picture is me, doing the job I love. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=2d0ae5b0c752162328d822c7e29ad68ce95e961a84e9aa5a35aa39a88d4de4e68aca3b5c347d69bcd9c167dbd92e2e830a0238e9fc0f36bacd4d06c28f65b3e3 I’m nothing special…just a Mom, Veteran, and Nurse Practitioner, who is lucky enough to represent my hometown in Congress. I’m sure you’ve been getting plenty of emails asking for your money…I promise this isn’t one of those. I’m not here to beg you for money or to make you pay to submit a survey…all I’m asking for is a moment of your time to tell you my story. I served in the Navy for 10 years as a helicopter pilot flying H-46 and H-3 helicopters, completing two deployments to the Persian Gulf. I also met my wonderful husband in the Navy, and together we have four amazing children. When I got out of the Navy, I went back to school and became a Nurse Practitioner. I have always loved caring for others, and it is an honor to have been able to dedicate my career to it. But one day, as I was watching the same stories about dysfunction in politics on TV, I realized something else: I was fed up with the empty promises and lies from career politicians. I think the American people deserve better than half-truths and promises that are never followed through. Because I’ve never seen a challenge too big—I decided to not sit on the sidelines but to do something about it. That’s when I decided to run for Virginia State Senate, where I used my real-world experience to actually solve problems. I was proud to champion legislation to promote election security, establish a Military Spouse Liaison, and advocate for patients, families, and caregivers in long-term care facilities. I quickly realized that many of our problems were coming directly from Washington, D.C. So, I took a leap of faith and decided to run for Congress! This wasn’t easy though, the odds were stacked against me and my team. I was running in a district represented by a Democrat who voted with Nancy Pelosi 99% of the time. My Liberal opponent was backed by far-Left D.C. elites who poured $10 million into her campaign, and big money PACs spent even more attacking me. But I did my best, worked hard, and never gave up. I traveled to every corner of our district, I looked voters in the eyes, and I asked for their vote. On election night, my race was one of the closest in the nation…and we only won by 10,000 votes. Now, I am proudly serving in Congress and working hard to make a REAL difference for the American people. I promise to do whatever it takes to protect the future of our great country. But this fight isn’t over yet, Peter. The Democrats have already unleashed their attacks, and have spent MILLIONS of dollars to unseat me. I’m fighting tooth and nail to protect my seat from the far-Left’s power grabs— https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=2d0ae5b0c752162328d822c7e29ad68ce95e961a84e9aa5a35aa39a88d4de4e68aca3b5c347d69bcd9c167dbd92e2e830a0238e9fc0f36bacd4d06c28f65b3e3 and I’m hoping you’ll join me in the fight by endorsing my campaign with your e-signature today! We can’t afford to let VA-02 fall into the wrong hands or lose the House Majority. If we do, our country will be right back where we were—with more career politicians who only care about their OWN agendas. Thank you for taking the time to read my message, Congresswoman Jen Kiggans https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=2d0ae5b0c752162328d822c7e29ad68ce95e961a84e9aa5a35aa39a88d4de4e68aca3b5c347d69bcd9c167dbd92e2e830a0238e9fc0f36bacd4d06c28f65b3e3 ENDORSE JEN KIGGANS https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=2d0ae5b0c7521623906cf3b58e31adcd8b4f5df326c39418505c5db68abe46315ffb73a8790d395b40cff2f604115d16e7508cf22832660d34a1d619fde46bfa JEN KIGGANS is running for Congress in the most competitive House race in the entire country, and she needs our urgent support. Can you spare just $5 or $10 today to protect her vulnerable seat? If we are going to defeat the Democrats and keep the Republican Majority, then we MUST support tough conservatives like Jen Kiggans right now. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=2d0ae5b0c752162303796ad6fbf8604927294b110b751772fabdd2a57a9f0bad16e25137bb6a09636aa345b81dbe6ed302e26d3a61c8e3300bb72c5169449731 >">Give your endorsement to this Navy Pilot, Nurse Practitioner, and Mom >> To ensure you are receiving emails from Kiggans for Congress with minimum to no interruption, please add mailto:info@contact.jenforcongress.com info@contact.jenforcongress.com to your safe sender list, for instructions on how to add a contact, please click https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=2d0ae5b0c752162370afb81acd15aa895737d059fa2c513100d6141e4960d0846a7f5619e7f5fdf5aff63ba28a0e0a0ca6eec05ecb22d0013797d4cf7d23b3ca here . name: Riley Gaines
subject: Join Me in Standing Up for Women’s Sports and American Values
body:
Below is an email I’m circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you.

| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24437%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DJdO32%2fZRzSIMYuk521Hkg&sysid=1)
Hi Fellow American,

Below is an email I’m circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you. I think you may be interested in seeing it.

Please review the message at your earliest convenience and let me know if you would like to participate.

Best wishes,

Riley Gaines

P.S. The deadline is approaching to raise $1.5 million to host my upcoming college campus tour. If you’d like to give online, here’s a secure link for you:
**[https://secured.leadershipinstitute.org/rgc-082424/](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24438%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ub148m8jRgy9BvBwNaDlEA&sysid=1)**

* * *

From: Riley Gaines <rileygaines@email.leadershipinstitute.org>
Send Date: August 9, 2023 9:55 AM
Subject: Did you see my announcement?

Dear Friend,

I hope you saw my announcement on Sean Hannity’s show that I’ve partnered with the Leadership Institute to launch the Riley Gaines Center.

I’m the 12-time All-American swimmer who speaks out against transgender ideology and fights to defend basic truths - that men are men and women are women.

The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute is now the exclusive headquarters of my work to lead conservatives of all types - patriots who will not be silenced by the weight of the left’s cultural pressure and who want to learn how to defend America’s freedoms.

When the left tries to shout you down profanely, when they viciously attack you - that’s when you know you’re saying the right things.

For those who are attacked, vilified, and persecuted for their support of America’s founding principles and traditional American values, the Riley Gaines Center sends a message that they are not alone - because I will stand bravely with them.

To train as many young people as I can to stand up for conservative principles, I must have the help of strong Leadership Institute supporters like you.

**[Will you help turn young men and women into Leaders for America?](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24439%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SVLGpw8pxkzTnT87mAyyjQ&sysid=1)**

The Riley Gaines Center is the exclusive home of my work to lead this crucial cause through:

* Speaking events and media appearances to rally everyday Americans to defend women’s identity and uphold vital truths.

* A coalition of women, student athletes, parents, and those who have been harmed by radical transgender ideology, to join me in speaking out across the country.

* A fast-growing team of speakers and grassroots organizers, who will help turn those ready to defend freedom into champions who put their principles into action.

---
Through the Riley Gaines Center, my fellow Leadership Institute colleagues and I will identify, recruit, train, mentor, and empower students, athletes, and parents across the country to become campus, community, and national Leaders for America.

Not only will these young leaders help our country right now. They will stand up for our principles for decades to come.

**[By joining me and the Leadership Institute team with your contribution to this new effort, you make a powerful difference for conservatives across the country, from college campuses to the halls of power.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24430%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=M9tJVZDGEn3muUPenlyYQg&sysid=1)**

Thank you for your support and dedication to preserving commonsense truths and conservative principles in our country.

Stand bravely with me,

Riley Gaines
The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute
---
The Leadership Institute, 1101 N. Highland St., Steven P.J. Wood Building, Arlington, VA 22201, United States

---

Your America News
---
_Your America News • 625 First Street #183 • Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Riley Gaines
subject: Help me train the next generation of leaders…
body:
Below is an email I'm circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you.

| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=dea6f5f506bd464ba6addc9f1789aece&_e=loPUpb7pQG_aezyT-JvvxsluOTILXTqleylkuZge4AZ6c4UuL2Q7Xsrdkotr7msItG00L3gXH3HA9c2HuwL5x3ZubNmxRZSHB4KrLAJAA-O9kjj2PA65SNlIVaAbjAUSRTiEZRwdJgp6dRHZDG5IqDP-nP5f8rXYOGepiPrXcWvcuOoCPRDgHK09et_36YCZlwwGTBGMQGKaxLQnx6wpx-_VOafjYJNVb14PwCkUoOQJW8nfLcmuP2fEvy-4ZA--EiWQ6k8y4QJgHgBoqD5LpMk9HvUYpNebw-04-l4AvFCsbXAUARmjl5q0PXYZBzNujLBVebBDtBHEjJsyPp9lXkRS-kiyd37NpphcDKzM25Q%3D)
Hi Fellow American,

Below is an email I'm circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you. I think you may be interested in seeing it.

Please review the message at your earliest convenience and let me know if you would like to participate.

Best wishes,

Riley Gaines

P.S. The deadline is approaching to raise $1.5 million to host my upcoming college campus tour. If you'd like to give online, here's a secure link for you:
**[https://secured.leadershipinstitute.org/rgc-082424/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=dea6f5f506bd464ba6addc9f1789aece&_e=loPUpb7pQG_aezyT-JvvxsluOTILXTqleylkuZge4AZ6c4UuL2Q7Xsrdkotr7msItG00L3gXH3HA9c2HuwL5x3ZubNmxRZSHB4KrLAJAA-O9kjj2PA65SNlIVaAbjAUSRTiEZRwdJgp6dRHZDG5IqDP-nP5f8rXYOGepiPrXcWvcuOoCPRDgHK09et_36YCZlwwGTBGMQGKaxLQnx6wpxyVPXOptGC-UvNwJvQjIq2Il83GNCcuwh6xgaPDB3U-hUtOGbP3DQyeHIdIt-UknPOEF3yDp_FV70ftJzZ6beM_JuuwPAdU53TWa9ulpmJ7osha3ZLrGk_AgKKJ7s3UfUveO9K6gR2zCxjuqtfdY3I8%3D)**

* * *

From: Riley Gaines <rileygaines@email.leadershipinstitute.org>
Send Date: August 9, 2023 9:55 AM
Subject: Did you see my announcement?

Dear Friend,

I hope you saw my announcement on Sean Hannity's show that I've partnered with the Leadership Institute to launch the Riley Gaines Center.

I'm the 12-time All-American swimmer who speaks out against transgender ideology and fights to defend basic truths - that men are men and women are women.

The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute is now the exclusive headquarters of my work to lead conservatives of all types - patriots who will not be silenced by the weight of the left's cultural pressure and who want to learn how to defend America's freedoms.

When the left tries to shout you down profanely, when they viciously attack you - that's when you know you're saying the right things.

For those who are attacked, vilified, and persecuted for their support of America's founding principles and traditional American values, the Riley Gaines Center sends a message that they are not alone - because I will stand bravely with them.

To train as many young people as I can to stand up for conservative principles, I must have the help of strong Leadership Institute supporters like you.

**[Will you help turn young men and women into Leaders for America?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=dea6f5f506bd464ba6addc9f1789aece&_e=loPUpb7pQG_aezyT-JvvxsluOTILXTqleylkuZge4AZ6c4UuL2Q7Xsrdkotr7msItG00L3gXH3HA9c2HuwL5x3ZubNmxRZSHB4KrLAJAA-O9kjj2PA65SNlIVaAbjAUSRTiEZRwdJgp6dRHZDG5IqDP-nP5f8rXYOGepiPrXcWvcuOoCPRDgHK09et_36YCZlwwGTBGMQGKaxLQnx6wpxwOGSlgXUOq7ec_YGOQRfSXeXLchCuPbn8CkM5ri4gBbCm1gL08aTRZNltYXSFcMNBFWmWSWZcmsYsarg9CX8iIxisBdhCnAa1gb-An9lAF2_NsF5FqpDyAOcBbfU0k0YPUBDZxdfWTyTTvEI9qJVyg%3D)**

The Riley Gaines Center is the exclusive home of my work to lead this crucial cause through:
* Speaking events and media appearances to rally everyday Americans to defend women's identity and uphold vital truths.

* A coalition of women, student athletes, parents, and those who have been harmed by radical transgender ideology, to join me in speaking out across the country.

* A fast-growing team of speakers and grassroots organizers, who will help turn those ready to defend freedom into champions who put their principles into action.

---
Through the Riley Gaines Center, my fellow Leadership Institute colleagues and I will identify, recruit, train, mentor, and empower students, athletes, and parents across the country to become campus, community, and national Leaders for America.

Not only will these young leaders help our country right now. They will stand up for our principles for decades to come.

**[By joining me and the Leadership Institute team with your contribution to this new effort, you make a powerful difference for conservatives across the country, from college campuses to the halls of power.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=dea6f5f506bd464ba6addc9f1789aece&_e=loPUpb7pQG_aezyT-JvvxsluOTILXTqleylkuZge4AZ6c4UuL2Q7Xsrdkotr7msItG00L3gXH3HA9c2HuwL5x3ZubNmxRZSHB4KrLAJAA-O9kjj2PA65SNlIVaAbjAUSRTiEZRwdJgp6dRHZDG5IqDP-nP5f8rXYOGepiPrXcWvcuOoCPRDgHK09et_36YCZlwwGTBGMQGKaxLQnx6wpx7DuSs1dNaM9N4BQ6_9WMYA6AHLQX0jtG7mxdeb8vzubR3Ynh_RFJjgssByk6eOMvYSyiZa0Th_iuMkpbrRjOl76kqTf3Y6xSJHdIzRty7w9Dsznh72_zEVEVC0iNXZ5UR0eO5gSBXHR4DX9Q-HjQD8%3D)**

Thank you for your support and dedication to preserving commonsense truths and conservative principles in our country.

Stand bravely with me,

Riley Gaines
The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute
---
The Leadership Institute, 1101 N. Highland St., Steven P.J. Wood Building, Arlington, VA 22201, United States

---

Reclaiming American Freedom
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[**unsubscribe**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_s=dea6f5f506bd464ba6addc9f1789aece&_t=vm9-ASiCH9uVQn1KNv6d8kxiDtKO3xET9QqvZUuW43O8L0pwTvCGUsz75HUTKnT-HVw1oNYFi9l5P_I9lPSb3qGIVGVxmVKzmW3IvWmfHHU%3D)

name: Riley Gaines
subject: Help me train the next generation of leaders…
body:
Below is an email I'm circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you.

| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9a9d70c0627f402d88f1e882d99c562c&_e=TrQurqA7hiCSSmY5H5QRntUvjoSCBSGsBrPbjC5CQiCvGsl3QFjvOKLduSLgcqo1ELjlpGjq4VQ80mkmZTiA_9aoL3E-ryIhnw9Q3iZ3b8V1avxairPNdzYCXCqzNX9GsxmwhjX4k1E7OIf3rii4xMAvZ2_htynyH-b2IwUi1NodREelliu058UOqnHyMKg1Jt7OCDDDCPoSJKmOVclOll3-sY6eDG2VIvLByPB7F5W7TI1GaCfMe5U3MKBKNxS6KOzWVf-V5SIiz-guIgBTtzOZEpEHsEcdiHTJnqkdYSlgLlXtpzH4AVWWCXfZq6oGeIeAk-Weif2ZqhifT2Qe-AzbLi4WipX8dElCddf0mZk%3D)
Hi Fellow American,

Below is an email I'm circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you. I think you may be interested in seeing it.

Please review the message at your earliest convenience and let me know if you would like to participate.

Best wishes,

Riley Gaines

P.S. The deadline is approaching to raise $1.5 million to host my upcoming college campus tour. If you'd like to give online, here's a secure link for you:
**[https://secured.leadershipinstitute.org/rgc-082424/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9a9d70c0627f402d88f1e882d99c562c&_e=TrQurqA7hiCSSmY5H5QRntUvjoSCBSGsBrPbjC5CQiCvGsl3QFjvOKLduSLgcqo1ELjlpGjq4VQ80mkmZTiA_9aoL3E-ryIhnw9Q3iZ3b8V1avxairPNdzYCXCqzNX9GsxmwhjX4k1E7OIf3rii4xMAvZ2_htynyH-b2IwUi1NodREelliu058UOqnHyMKg1Jt7OCDDDCPoSJKmOVclOlpbj4vSNKLlZJ6ris8OS4YERqIFZGtnew1O9wvVHY9v55yVSVELAu5cTZCxnOTiT8bwxQ9fM93ouzTkAMlj7bqHVZBgvyDqPh1_d1ySmfVZauNaF214E080bbDBAImKT985PP8xatrYEBB3UyMGedis%3D)**

* * *

From: Riley Gaines <rileygaines@email.leadershipinstitute.org>
Send Date: August 9, 2023 9:55 AM
Subject: Did you see my announcement?

Dear Friend,

I hope you saw my announcement on Sean Hannity's show that I've partnered with the Leadership Institute to launch the Riley Gaines Center.

I'm the 12-time All-American swimmer who speaks out against transgender ideology and fights to defend basic truths - that men are men and women are women.

The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute is now the exclusive headquarters of my work to lead conservatives of all types - patriots who will not be silenced by the weight of the left's cultural pressure and who want to learn how to defend America's freedoms.

When the left tries to shout you down profanely, when they viciously attack you - that's when you know you're saying the right things.

For those who are attacked, vilified, and persecuted for their support of America's founding principles and traditional American values, the Riley Gaines Center sends a message that they are not alone - because I will stand bravely with them.

To train as many young people as I can to stand up for conservative principles, I must have the help of strong Leadership Institute supporters like you.

**[Will you help turn young men and women into Leaders for America?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9a9d70c0627f402d88f1e882d99c562c&_e=TrQurqA7hiCSSmY5H5QRntUvjoSCBSGsBrPbjC5CQiCvGsl3QFjvOKLduSLgcqo1ELjlpGjq4VQ80mkmZTiA_9aoL3E-ryIhnw9Q3iZ3b8V1avxairPNdzYCXCqzNX9GsxmwhjX4k1E7OIf3rii4xMAvZ2_htynyH-b2IwUi1NodREelliu058UOqnHyMKg1Jt7OCDDDCPoSJKmOVclOllPsPb7dMTwq3V-eLGp6hAImnOxKApmjyJVCjUg5RnlhV18pFG9Nubynocwl9S-vkxAJbY91tlDdid-W0jtg_o-perUHipCpcWpKbJG6vGabsv8ANkwNGXtGck8GaMcOWVsTLXv-4NSWVAtXNy-8nlg%3D)**

The Riley Gaines Center is the exclusive home of my work to lead this crucial cause through:
* Speaking events and media appearances to rally everyday Americans to defend women's identity and uphold vital truths.

* A coalition of women, student athletes, parents, and those who have been harmed by radical transgender ideology, to join me in speaking out across the country.

* A fast-growing team of speakers and grassroots organizers, who will help turn those ready to defend freedom into champions who put their principles into action.

---
Through the Riley Gaines Center, my fellow Leadership Institute colleagues and I will identify, recruit, train, mentor, and empower students, athletes, and parents across the country to become campus, community, and national Leaders for America.

Not only will these young leaders help our country right now. They will stand up for our principles for decades to come.

**[By joining me and the Leadership Institute team with your contribution to this new effort, you make a powerful difference for conservatives across the country, from college campuses to the halls of power.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9a9d70c0627f402d88f1e882d99c562c&_e=TrQurqA7hiCSSmY5H5QRntUvjoSCBSGsBrPbjC5CQiCvGsl3QFjvOKLduSLgcqo1ELjlpGjq4VQ80mkmZTiA_9aoL3E-ryIhnw9Q3iZ3b8V1avxairPNdzYCXCqzNX9GsxmwhjX4k1E7OIf3rii4xMAvZ2_htynyH-b2IwUi1NodREelliu058UOqnHyMKg1Jt7OCDDDCPoSJKmOVclOlkEkxooQLWqdtj9VaPeGbjrF8wiJdZwYEY26M49GtvB9i0QVjMjnwQXlg5jNenB2sPhV6byDebaRD2Tcc_4A-GhsNaDHUGcyqkm5XiOc9ykVuL5MsfModXpW20jBHW3NESsV8t07G1mvzjqSHWMR094%3D)**

Thank you for your support and dedication to preserving commonsense truths and conservative principles in our country.

Stand bravely with me,

Riley Gaines
The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute
---
The Leadership Institute, 1101 N. Highland St., Steven P.J. Wood Building, Arlington, VA 22201, United States

---

Defend the Constitution
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
