name: Tim Holbert, American Veterans Center
subject: Sponsor meals for our WWII heroes
body:
I wouldn't ask for your help if it weren't urgent.

| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0c4db896e63d4b92a5e48d6cc2c4a94c&_e=kBm2_e0rsUi8iDso6apr2jDyqIy-revtCsPrtFZtq4KQH-Ca6BIVr2eH1mqRUYyYNgQJUz7y6fQxUWqfIiK4X_fANE4mPi0MJcehRlO0ajGlGuch8wvGfIe4BG_hzE6CIBcUX1Ca1jkOoxBEjd79QaV59OWIeick_EzSKInmXucaD2QLugGNDCVgXLMsaGKbmgaLB8nzy6nigetI2QJBHRR606JC3DX8e-FrOX-LHCKZCkbLx7_aG_P-EEdCof9HLkY-jWK04_kYxDwyxwT96DhkK5SPPtrtmKvVq5ZHdVMzDaUnwzXsgsQAhZ4ehR9o)
---
Fellow American, I wouldn't ask for your help if it weren't urgent. **This year, the American Veterans Center is expecting our BIGGEST gathering of World War II heroes for our Annual Veterans Conference in nearly 20 years.** And while the budget for this year's Annual Veterans Conference has already been spent, the American Veterans Center team is _still_ hearing from World War II veterans who would like to attend. The **Gary Sinise Foundation** is generously providing lodging ... **American Airlines** is providing flights ... and I hope that you, Fellow American, would consider helping to cover lunch and dinner for our World War II heroes during this year's Veterans' Conference.
---
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0c4db896e63d4b92a5e48d6cc2c4a94c&_e=kBm2_e0rsUi8iDso6apr2jDyqIy-revtCsPrtFZtq4KQH-Ca6BIVr2eH1mqRUYyYNgQJUz7y6fQxUWqfIiK4X_fANE4mPi0MJcehRlO0ajGlGuch8wvGfIe4BG_hzE6CIBcUX1Ca1jkOoxBEjd79QaV59OWIeick_EzSKInmXuffHVLBHZiTWjMQCilBRq0shdscKq_EZ54GmPhgmJQW1x8yLsP8Rv7MbN5cpKqEzjXuNEi6X2NjT1ugrt4XKNfByPLmOvgyoTqAjBxVYmwj1y5fBso5yHO2ZalwcK26CGsldY_COVfafqRwWOYS8dW-)
---
**[Can I count on your urgent gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, or more before Wednesday, October 25 to help cover the meals for our World War II heroes at this year's Conference?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0c4db896e63d4b92a5e48d6cc2c4a94c&_e=kBm2_e0rsUi8iDso6apr2jDyqIy-revtCsPrtFZtq4KQH-Ca6BIVr2eH1mqRUYyYNgQJUz7y6fQxUWqfIiK4X_fANE4mPi0MJcehRlO0ajGlGuch8wvGfIe4BG_hzE6CIBcUX1Ca1jkOoxBEjd79QaV59OWIeick_EzSKInmXudH5dUsgKqvnGgW3oTk49hGHujbkK18QBYJ4-CxRMCgZrS78Tu0E7GTkz8eRb5GEaR7khBVQinbcBM-HBrcfwTEVdf46GXadnawmJYBj3tLzqy-2iD-rIgxUzZS-ZssWvPVF5zH0a0jysVVA41e1fQ6)** On average, it costs $100 for each day of meals we provide to a World War II veteran. To make sure we can cover all the meals for the veterans we expect, I'm urgently raising $3,000 before Wednesday, October 25.
---
[Give $25 -- Cover 1 Veteran's Breakfast](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0c4db896e63d4b92a5e48d6cc2c4a94c&_e=kBm2_e0rsUi8iDso6apr2jDyqIy-revtCsPrtFZtq4KQH-Ca6BIVr2eH1mqRUYyYNgQJUz7y6fQxUWqfIiK4X_fANE4mPi0MJcehRlO0ajGlGuch8wvGfIe4BG_hzE6CIBcUX1Ca1jkOoxBEjd79QUB8y_3KqieYSLAbSGoervmDxlSqWs8y0YldgLlEvNki3hRczJwNcfVOWz_8KhngaBjqswpy6TbnEOoevEAqfl9CWLXPLd6oXwoGBIWimeGRxXDXnxydFbDDVyUoxEM5a6pjR5LbbDV3wvtfcNgLOfFFjPQo4LklurJKrcNDo9pAUdYed95QBA1NYTgoHdGiLQ%3D%3D)
---
[Give $50 -- Cover 1 Veteran's Dinner ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0c4db896e63d4b92a5e48d6cc2c4a94c&_e=kBm2_e0rsUi8iDso6apr2jDyqIy-revtCsPrtFZtq4KQH-Ca6BIVr2eH1mqRUYyYNgQJUz7y6fQxUWqfIiK4X_fANE4mPi0MJcehRlO0ajGlGuch8wvGfIe4BG_hzE6CIBcUX1Ca1jkOoxBEjd79Qb8ePbz_odL4JYsxJrRHZkn9-l_qXz3NemotsRJfvjrsq5oTJFYvsNfRP5Pjt8BJ_2IpVC5-Ej1d7_CRjsGUQnpBYRoEhYQIY4uEIWWkQ7ovhYvJPlXUHJo8ULiC5uxjG8sKhoG9vgDxOipxuAAjtz2sAdxv6V0UL9UdFp2Dh3v99Ly-WYYndJLDqJsdLxuYYQ%3D%3D)
---
[Give $100 -- Cover 1 Veteran's Day](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0c4db896e63d4b92a5e48d6cc2c4a94c&_e=kBm2_e0rsUi8iDso6apr2jDyqIy-revtCsPrtFZtq4KQH-Ca6BIVr2eH1mqRUYyYNgQJUz7y6fQxUWqfIiK4X_fANE4mPi0MJcehRlO0ajGlGuch8wvGfIe4BG_hzE6CIBcUX1Ca1jkOoxBEjd79QdFFPWciHHa1j9CtUq9E8hgzNDk81UTP6WbxENQK-aoPH94P8uesEw2Jaq7IRoh6Su7lubIvE1WwHbcuyUO3S3OlCSYXyo9M40FtJ67TCLHujhCdkGlAiQqJCWK8kPLRxeQHkHsRaSjUuAZnWg85R0biP7OlLdUeaHMCytQgWcDf9cqHezeRTq7vCIgAff1j2g%3D%3D)
---
[Give ANY amount to help](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0c4db896e63d4b92a5e48d6cc2c4a94c&_e=kBm2_e0rsUi8iDso6apr2jDyqIy-revtCsPrtFZtq4KQH-Ca6BIVr2eH1mqRUYyYNgQJUz7y6fQxUWqfIiK4X_fANE4mPi0MJcehRlO0ajGlGuch8wvGfIe4BG_hzE6CIBcUX1Ca1jkOoxBEjd79QaV59OWIeick_EzSKInmXudSyWCxYjsz344OUF5HmTcOiJrsDuvTujpcS2YMZqVuDAXSCjc6YRUAPqIVf4tvUNeh0g1s04FCnSDNFG5_RCJ3Q6Shu5Gi16aFYMbvKAOm5AjgGqifBWV1NQ-WVN_X0hYt6lrv8fOrvWGHxubZCSK6)
---
Every year, generous and patriotic Americans like YOU help the American Veterans Center honor our nation's heroes, from World War II to today, at the Annual Veterans Conference. At this special, one-of-a-kind event, veterans have the opportunity to share their stories with young people and military cadets in attendance. They can reconnect with their brothers- and sisters-in-arms. And, just as important, they can know that their stories are professionally recorded and preserved by AVC, so their legacy is passed on to the next generation.
---

clean_body: I wouldn't ask for your help if it weren't urgent. | | | Fellow American, I wouldn't ask for your help if it weren't urgent. This year, the American Veterans Center is expecting our BIGGEST gathering of World War II heroes for our Annual Veterans Conference in nearly 20 years. And while the budget for this year's Annual Veterans Conference has already been spent, the American Veterans Center team is still hearing from World War II veterans who would like to attend. The Gary Sinise Foundation is generously providing lodging ... American Airlines is providing flights ... and I hope that you, Fellow American, would consider helping to cover lunch and dinner for our World War II heroes during this year's Veterans' Conference. - On average, it costs $100 for each day of meals we provide to a World War II veteran. To make sure we can cover all the meals for the veterans we expect, I'm urgently raising $3,000 before Wednesday, October 25. Every year, generous and patriotic Americans like YOU help the American Veterans Center honor our nation's heroes, from World War II to today, at the Annual Veterans Conference. At this special, one-of-a-kind event, veterans have the opportunity to share their stories with young people and military cadets in attendance. They can reconnect with their brothers- and sisters-in-arms. And, just as important, they can know that their stories are professionally recorded and preserved by AVC, so their legacy is passed on to the next generation. The AVC Annual Veterans Conference is a monumental occasion for veterans of every generation. But it's particularly moving for our World War II heroes, who will see firsthand how their service and sacrifices are still being honored, 80 years later. Your generosity today will ensure the Greatest Generation's legacy lives on, making their bravery immortal and safeguarding the firsthand accounts of their valor and service for generations to come. Thank you for your support and thank you for playing a critical role in honoring our World War II heroes at this year's Conference. Tim Holbert President American Veterans Center P.S. Your contribution to this special mission doesn't just make a difference -- it makes history. Let's ensure every World War II veteran who wishes to attend this year's Annual Veterans Conference can have all their costs fully covered! The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center 1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201 Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Riley Gaines
subject: Help me train the next generation of leaders…
body:
Below is an email I'm circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you.

| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8475c3aabe2340adb74ecebcee1a75b4&_e=HjCnc_glI5VfsRICvBpODwff-uqSYmRBYma4j-VPO0RTWHs_4_ztYVjcMkyvB4f9mJGQUDb7RvPkrGUd73IZUqmIYr0OYVc0RCZ-TBZULFZ5UUWOIRPFwwU67VXhIqj-JCUGpvPMoSw6dCHAtZvm44P4JazW78pHQLmYHKEi88omwf9eFHXfB3lrulWMabv4-mdXUWU4KDUJ9ckReS2SJ-sKctoSGqtl-kmxyyW4n3pGpWKEq0Hu-yNZLYmiLU5S0zFuDGwE2W5GdsaaewTmxJNQHbRIia5mwnKdVBewvuEDG85SvRDf5YqMd44uHLc_8WttFrnXAvQ6MXM8S5IGyKNY4MiGXbBCeHHBqnHq3Fg%3D)
Hi Fellow American,

Below is an email I'm circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you. I think you may be interested in seeing it.

Please review the message at your earliest convenience and let me know if you would like to participate.

Best wishes,

Riley Gaines

P.S. The deadline is approaching to raise $1.5 million to host my upcoming college campus tour. If you'd like to give online, here's a secure link for you:
**[https://secured.leadershipinstitute.org/rgc-082424/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8475c3aabe2340adb74ecebcee1a75b4&_e=HjCnc_glI5VfsRICvBpODwff-uqSYmRBYma4j-VPO0RTWHs_4_ztYVjcMkyvB4f9mJGQUDb7RvPkrGUd73IZUqmIYr0OYVc0RCZ-TBZULFZ5UUWOIRPFwwU67VXhIqj-JCUGpvPMoSw6dCHAtZvm44P4JazW78pHQLmYHKEi88omwf9eFHXfB3lrulWMabv4-mdXUWU4KDUJ9ckReS2SJyIDK39YbR7lycQ-qQ2iEIVdSoV3sCSSNiGdpVsFVsjWXwusryAFI3tYRATI9dR43cLHJz5NH3oMsZugxAQcdNUEG8fBh4zx3C3_lTzZmvWVkZq88wKgJokCNqHk4f1V4Z66gIxQhSC3qm7DYNdb1ks%3D)**

* * *

From: Riley Gaines <rileygaines@email.leadershipinstitute.org>
Send Date: August 9, 2023 9:55 AM
Subject: Did you see my announcement?

Dear Friend,

I hope you saw my announcement on Sean Hannity's show that I've partnered with the Leadership Institute to launch the Riley Gaines Center.

I'm the 12-time All-American swimmer who speaks out against transgender ideology and fights to defend basic truths - that men are men and women are women.

The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute is now the exclusive headquarters of my work to lead conservatives of all types - patriots who will not be silenced by the weight of the left's cultural pressure and who want to learn how to defend America's freedoms.

When the left tries to shout you down profanely, when they viciously attack you - that's when you know you're saying the right things.

For those who are attacked, vilified, and persecuted for their support of America's founding principles and traditional American values, the Riley Gaines Center sends a message that they are not alone - because I will stand bravely with them.

To train as many young people as I can to stand up for conservative principles, I must have the help of strong Leadership Institute supporters like you.

**[Will you help turn young men and women into Leaders for America?](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8475c3aabe2340adb74ecebcee1a75b4&_e=HjCnc_glI5VfsRICvBpODwff-uqSYmRBYma4j-VPO0RTWHs_4_ztYVjcMkyvB4f9mJGQUDb7RvPkrGUd73IZUqmIYr0OYVc0RCZ-TBZULFZ5UUWOIRPFwwU67VXhIqj-JCUGpvPMoSw6dCHAtZvm44P4JazW78pHQLmYHKEi88omwf9eFHXfB3lrulWMabv4-mdXUWU4KDUJ9ckReS2SJ6GXqpqjrzEJnnYiJ1ae9wTnYt-YkhRQRlYCHpzhhIDSi6KPZd2XrS6Pe_Qkv40Odhyga32aDZEi6WvFG-fWWOhj7qe4cCpoTVFyxyw8hoEHqbFjJ658l3hHpLTXHiJqR80TDqdk4WwqamADKk9jRLU%3D)**

The Riley Gaines Center is the exclusive home of my work to lead this crucial cause through:
* Speaking events and media appearances to rally everyday Americans to defend women's identity and uphold vital truths.

* A coalition of women, student athletes, parents, and those who have been harmed by radical transgender ideology, to join me in speaking out across the country.

* A fast-growing team of speakers and grassroots organizers, who will help turn those ready to defend freedom into champions who put their principles into action.

---
Through the Riley Gaines Center, my fellow Leadership Institute colleagues and I will identify, recruit, train, mentor, and empower students, athletes, and parents across the country to become campus, community, and national Leaders for America.

Not only will these young leaders help our country right now. They will stand up for our principles for decades to come.

**[By joining me and the Leadership Institute team with your contribution to this new effort, you make a powerful difference for conservatives across the country, from college campuses to the halls of power.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8475c3aabe2340adb74ecebcee1a75b4&_e=HjCnc_glI5VfsRICvBpODwff-uqSYmRBYma4j-VPO0RTWHs_4_ztYVjcMkyvB4f9mJGQUDb7RvPkrGUd73IZUqmIYr0OYVc0RCZ-TBZULFZ5UUWOIRPFwwU67VXhIqj-JCUGpvPMoSw6dCHAtZvm44P4JazW78pHQLmYHKEi88omwf9eFHXfB3lrulWMabv4-mdXUWU4KDUJ9ckReS2SJy53DCrUtGTXXnyy9LR8JqC9bVluyEuTwhn4Be16QylYmBlb26QaO9e4trBbfaW2M4YT4B_Ie_dm9cDUGxlW3lslHhae_anNzBeM22XmpxNeVMDwq3XakhSha6Jx3s4WrFlYo6J8NK1LEg3jOIVWAVg%3D)**

Thank you for your support and dedication to preserving commonsense truths and conservative principles in our country.

Stand bravely with me,

Riley Gaines
The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute
---
The Leadership Institute, 1101 N. Highland St., Steven P.J. Wood Building, Arlington, VA 22201, United States

---

Conservative Liberty Wire

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Greedy energy companies vs. rare threatened ecosystem
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2065769?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **_APPROVE NATIONAL MONUMENT:_ Tell President Biden to permanently protect a rare, threatened ecosystem by designating it as a National Monument! [_Act now!_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2065770?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** Rocky outcroppings. Towering pine forests. Sprawling wildflower meadows. Mountain lions. Pacific fishers. More than 30 rare plant species. There aren’t many places in the world where you can find such a unique combination of terrain and wildlife, Friend. California’s Condor Ridge, known as Molok Luyuk to the Yocha Dehe Wintun Nation, is truly one of a kind. But this region is a **frequent target of greedy energy developers** looking to make a quick buck. Indigenous communities are trying to protect Molok Luyuk and their cultural ties to the land – now **_you have a chance to support their demands!_ [_Tell President Biden to expand Berryessa National Monument to include and permanently protect this unique ecosystem form greedy energy developers! >_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2065771?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2065772?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Important species like elk and black bears use Molok Luyuk to migrate between their designated habitats. Without protections, energy **developers could disrupt this critical corridor for animals** and threaten the connections between some of California’s most unique ecosystems.
The Yocah Dehe Wintun Nation’s history and livelihood are deeply connected to this land. It’s central to their origin stories. But right now, there’s nothing stopping energy developers from scarring the land with new projects. [_**Friend, will you support the demands of Indigenous communities and help protect Molok Luyuk? We need 1,398 more signatures to hit our MIDNIGHT goal!**_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2065773?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2065774?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Raena Garcia
Senior Fossil Fuel and Lands Campaigner,
Friends of the Earth**
|

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: $17.9 Billion to Be Paid Out to People Across America
body:
You have until January 2 to be part of it.

| | Dear Reader, It's been 34 years since Reagan sat in the Oval Office... And yet a nearly forgotten law he enacted is about to payout $17.9 billion to income investors across America ... __this year__. You have until **January 2** to be part of it. [**Watch this presentation now to see how.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2e044ae5365547c2bb422ff458d2ac4f&_e=rBrkcsQUT-iKdLkM9wndvEyBtXJBWskp4qlDUF8Bfca6DNxqytQZoJVJ8szVAKGwcI7WjUUdy08nkik62drc4lLyWCkxmuyGuGUYG5uUCG7wNMAf9afaXi5kq9o3T5e_zxsf6s9klFVdAoAY528AguC6Ih-cw3z9zNVv8-5xuvyY2eqz5UoWt3Jtg01xMYt77h9rJ_WBjebIMK3ng49yHJNqeSzjD1jdtSuq9dhayqz6hKIg1AlcqQwLKm4TopKKNeHdtHoozRge-4AqSwF7U3pZiN0sHdUglqzTZcsKpk0%3D) [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2e044ae5365547c2bb422ff458d2ac4f&_e=rBrkcsQUT-iKdLkM9wndvEyBtXJBWskp4qlDUF8Bfca6DNxqytQZoJVJ8szVAKGwcI7WjUUdy08nkik62drc4lLyWCkxmuyGuGUYG5uUCG7wNMAf9afaXi5kq9o3T5e_zxsf6s9klFVdAoAY528AgjW5PZl30YWxTc9HxcmZnPZA63k3Mhv7ugyFrM00PGgQ3uxPi6sqJyf1Bt_A37Q9Gkne0phCQpUo_vdGgN8oe7BqbYTiZ4pesv5A5OZl7U-o69bpM6bGXsf4c1wLQO0YvIT_2f3ZVx9OoGLX4XA-6XM%3D) Regards, Charles Mizrahi Founder, _Alpha Investor_ P.S [**Just watch it now**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2e044ae5365547c2bb422ff458d2ac4f&_e=rBrkcsQUT-iKdLkM9wndvEyBtXJBWskp4qlDUF8Bfca6DNxqytQZoJVJ8szVAKGwcI7WjUUdy08nkik62drc4lLyWCkxmuyGuGUYG5uUCG7wNMAf9afaXi5kq9o3T5e_zxsf6s9klFVdAoAY528Agg51e1mWCy7B-KzbskUNoluAmuudVyMJGUUIBtDGkZuBRe_2U4UogE9bguqmVFhHqFwZyHHibtrUU5YZEHSg4AVxeLW6Yfy40VynOS1guW6v8qKlOgu4o7ffkrYnMrWJwleDDLWZnJ4due7yixQueOw%3D); you can thank me later. body:
Below is an email I'm circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you.

| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=03709f6917404092977323a3a43e2a77&_e=r4JVB6ppSL_a4yaKWNRnSy3YnF5-M6tvmdz3Zov0-SYYA550C29eoUTE7FkPHmxHAndJSSoo_nv2APR9jybHgoaLo8ujvfovQ61kfMje0F49vdConaiRi8OANl3rLiz32NT7_9EZetJ9p0dSjv3WQLlrmfz81CissVwL0gkzcFb7XA2NGmT_75lPFPeHvzOPNkkM31efFX4tZWnujfnOFtMd1ErZyi_FbDJvAPzQNl1wwmm4wsmJxzcYolFW8HV3ERmL5KypJzBkkHmKt2-vRe4AEdq-3YyNy7EqdulvAj4CMYWRHugnNPEyXAr9M6t_jpX0E_WZUzmsX_-D9kFDd1MnY1WBXieNCDuyAynPFXg%3D)
Hi Fellow American,

Below is an email I'm circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you. I think you may be interested in seeing it.

Please review the message at your earliest convenience and let me know if you would like to participate.

Best wishes,

Riley Gaines

P.S. The deadline is approaching to raise $1.5 million to host my upcoming college campus tour. If you'd like to give online, here's a secure link for you:
**[https://secured.leadershipinstitute.org/rgc-082424/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=03709f6917404092977323a3a43e2a77&_e=r4JVB6ppSL_a4yaKWNRnSy3YnF5-M6tvmdz3Zov0-SYYA550C29eoUTE7FkPHmxHAndJSSoo_nv2APR9jybHgoaLo8ujvfovQ61kfMje0F49vdConaiRi8OANl3rLiz32NT7_9EZetJ9p0dSjv3WQLlrmfz81CissVwL0gkzcFb7XA2NGmT_75lPFPeHvzOPNkkM31efFX4tZWnujfnOFr6QQPJ0mgRty1kOXXBTvi9YDsmCluRMX8Bmaq_nhHjq5TnYIiQ4Y_yaQULnN5VA00t38FzbC9AnHaoIOreORQEVnb8vV6Z9xq2vRvGXULq_vovQW0mD_hq4ceHV584H-UCaDpZr-22ChZfjqdmrkMs%3D)**

* * *

From: Riley Gaines <rileygaines@email.leadershipinstitute.org>
Send Date: August 9, 2023 9:55 AM
Subject: Did you see my announcement?

Dear Friend,

I hope you saw my announcement on Sean Hannity's show that I've partnered with the Leadership Institute to launch the Riley Gaines Center.

I'm the 12-time All-American swimmer who speaks out against transgender ideology and fights to defend basic truths - that men are men and women are women.

The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute is now the exclusive headquarters of my work to lead conservatives of all types - patriots who will not be silenced by the weight of the left's cultural pressure and who want to learn how to defend America's freedoms.

When the left tries to shout you down profanely, when they viciously attack you - that's when you know you're saying the right things.

For those who are attacked, vilified, and persecuted for their support of America's founding principles and traditional American values, the Riley Gaines Center sends a message that they are not alone - because I will stand bravely with them.

To train as many young people as I can to stand up for conservative principles, I must have the help of strong Leadership Institute supporters like you.

**[Will you help turn young men and women into Leaders for America?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=03709f6917404092977323a3a43e2a77&_e=r4JVB6ppSL_a4yaKWNRnSy3YnF5-M6tvmdz3Zov0-SYYA550C29eoUTE7FkPHmxHAndJSSoo_nv2APR9jybHgoaLo8ujvfovQ61kfMje0F49vdConaiRi8OANl3rLiz32NT7_9EZetJ9p0dSjv3WQLlrmfz81CissVwL0gkzcFb7XA2NGmT_75lPFPeHvzOPNkkM31efFX4tZWnujfnOFrurmgiSHs3uN1RVmdAoyjZRxi__AoV-4ik9RwWjnMEJcMpl2vbT7t-3mofJ56rzXDdiqbBdDv7kYXA53GTRc8RFHKW99JxSPUm-StcpTBlRjlosjuw41tdyFKxz8xi5elvCRwT_gF3nvRa113GKBuA%3D)**

The Riley Gaines Center is the exclusive home of my work to lead this crucial cause through:
* Speaking events and media appearances to rally everyday Americans to defend women's identity and uphold vital truths.

* A coalition of women, student athletes, parents, and those who have been harmed by radical transgender ideology, to join me in speaking out across the country.

* A fast-growing team of speakers and grassroots organizers, who will help turn those ready to defend freedom into champions who put their principles into action.

---
Through the Riley Gaines Center, my fellow Leadership Institute colleagues and I will identify, recruit, train, mentor, and empower students, athletes, and parents across the country to become campus, community, and national Leaders for America.

Not only will these young leaders help our country right now. They will stand up for our principles for decades to come.

**[By joining me and the Leadership Institute team with your contribution to this new effort, you make a powerful difference for conservatives across the country, from college campuses to the halls of power.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=03709f6917404092977323a3a43e2a77&_e=r4JVB6ppSL_a4yaKWNRnSy3YnF5-M6tvmdz3Zov0-SYYA550C29eoUTE7FkPHmxHAndJSSoo_nv2APR9jybHgoaLo8ujvfovQ61kfMje0F49vdConaiRi8OANl3rLiz32NT7_9EZetJ9p0dSjv3WQLlrmfz81CissVwL0gkzcFb7XA2NGmT_75lPFPeHvzOPNkkM31efFX4tZWnujfnOFlC09Ro6bvAdV8xaLuioHHaxRl2QKoae1YkmCSV0xognV5YSaxU4b9Sljk6ZcTvf0KXHXSI2qRbRg4r7ez0hySSaAxCi6m8IOkTZACRLEmrplBmCgZo5AqdENhTlbTQp_gYJo5-wMKNFgJOX5FJxe-M%3D)**

Thank you for your support and dedication to preserving commonsense truths and conservative principles in our country.

Stand bravely with me,

Riley Gaines
The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute
---
The Leadership Institute, 1101 N. Highland St., Steven P.J. Wood Building, Arlington, VA 22201, United States

If the message didn't come across already, I'll list out the stakes for you again -

I'm the most outspoken, Pro-Trump Conservative in Congress. And I've served 5 wartime deployments as a Navy SEAL, including 3 with SEAL Team 3.

**So if Biden 's hand-picked candidate can out-spend and out-raise a battle-tested conservative warrior like me in the biggest House race in the nation, _no other Republican running for office will have a chance._**

Biden and Democrats know that beating me is their golden ticket to full control in Washington - which is why they're throwing all they have at me.

**[We can still win this race and fend off the Democrats' attempt to unseat me & take back the House Majority. But it's going to take everyone reading this to stand with me today to make that happen. Even just $5 goes a long way.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3ff229d3776f4323b6133ef4b04e4054&_e=uFY_q0_IlqVRIZch1KbNKOr6Nwj7joOk447cZQu59oMYMNi0lmAP5DO9rec_JdiEPvAR29xtm0nW_nRo_jOJITdTJ9E5Oae7zZnatbwuJBIkcXW_v1SA5rRHh4T1KsJGBqI5FvVFeBXI3FRtSbzD7lijspokP0bfE1B0JmZINVIsV_F7Ve_AaTy1eqQwMSEFSMak7VNfz5XZzdgdGkx1eMEi24oRRlP4hwMohzR18njPbOGExPIij_lJxNvk33BwTuOq2ag78wheWRDPiTWIaiMmni2Ve5BHXR6BESgLf9g_YV08UzSjuEpMkmttjwpSTLQSZxSHHPMWztH0RLmoYnl_Hbfj2pHKK7WvoI5br10OA_hSpyJQzUSohfAjWFmfP1qw5eR2Uf33fhoEAeb_w9xrErOylNts05zF_TCeDfAbxfJ-Kj24jaCkL9iKoeuq4MBayaiUZp8Ql4X9enIE7E3bDJrUXy_D5sTr0gLSzxc%3D "We can still win this race and fend off the Democrats’ attempt to unseat me & take back the House Majority. But it’s going to take everyone reading this to stand with me today to make that happen. Even just $5 goes a long way.")**

So, are you with me? I hope so.

God bless,
Eli Crane

name: Shift WA
subject: Top News: New Inslee Admin Controversy
body:
The Shift WA team has been working to shift the political debate
in Washington state since 2013. We've spent the last decade
providing people like you with the facts and perspectives needed
to make a difference in your community.

The team here at Shift WA has
been working to shift the political debate in Washington state
since 2013. We've spent the last decade providing people like you
with the facts and perspectives needed to hopefully make a
difference in your community. So, as always, we will help keep
you-up-to-date with an item or two of interest from your own
backyard. Read on...

This week's Newsmaker
Interview...
This week we talked with Andrea
Suarez, Founder and Executive Director of the non-profit
volunteer organization We Heart Seattle. In a very short time the
group has made a significant impact in cleaning up encampments
and helping people get off the streets. Created during the
height of the COVID pandemic in 2020 when homeless encampments
were filling Seattle's parks, sidewalks, and other public places,
We Heart Seattle challenged the status quo regarding how best to
help those struggling with drugs and homelessness. Along the
way, they have encountered protests by a small group of
extremists as volunteers have cleaned up encampments and
attempted to help those who were suffering. Read more...

This week's top story…
We assume part of Governor
Inslee's decision to take a carbon polluting flight to the U.N.
was to get away from the increasingly louder local noise over his
costly cap-and-tax scheme and the Washington Policy Center's case
that "Governor Inslee's office and others in his administration
are upset that we and others refer to the cost of the CO2
allowances in the law as a 'tax.' The governor's office and
others have resorted to some very convoluted language and logic
to avoid using that politically powerful word." Read more...

In case you missed it…
Leave it to the local paper to
put the finishing touches on the Democrat plan to let the courts
do their re-districting dirty work. That's the take from the
Yakima Herald editorial page, which writes that "(W)hatever
happens with the District 15 boundaries from here, somebody won't
be happy, so more suits or appeals could be in the works soon. We
wouldn't be surprised if the courts were still haggling over this
one when the next census comes around." However, the local paper
takes a dim view of the Dems' motivation for the lawsuit,
pointing out that "some Democrats - particularly those who live
west of the Cascade Range - seem confident that a clear Latino
majority in the 15th would automatically add a nice hue of blue
to Central Washington. But they're living in a fantasy world if
they take for granted that Latinos will lean left." Read more...

Governor Inslee's pennies can
sure add up...

DONATE

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com and sent from Shift
Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of
your friends, you can click here to do so.

You can also stay up to date on
our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following
us on Facebook & Twitter.
If you believe you received this message
in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift
Washington, click to unsubscribe.

For more than 25 years, AVC's Annual Veterans Conference has been a monumental experience for every generation of America's heroes. **But I'm sure you can understand why the Annual Veterans Conference means so much to our World War II heroes in particular this year.** At the Conference, they will have the opportunity to reconnect with their brothers- and sisters-in-arms, share their stories, and impart powerful lessons learned from serving our country to the young people and military academy and ROTC students in attendance. (_Imagine being a 22-year-old student in 2023 and having the honor to spend a weekend surrounded by dozens of legends from World War II - an experience they will never forget!_) Veterans will be able to record a Hollywood-studio-quality interview about their World War II service -- and past interviews have been seen on PBS and Netflix, in museums across the country, and watched 100 MILLION times on the AVC's YouTube channel. _But perhaps most important, these World War II veterans will see firsthand how their service and sacrifice are still being honored by a grateful nation 80 years later._ **[Fellow American, if you can't join us in-person for AVC's Annual Veterans Conference, I hope you'll consider a generous gift to support our World War II heroes this year.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f03d14d80d47487d86cbaa5d6715d94e&_e=GwKUTYZg9ypViN9F6QRmbYSyvcHM5ko-UM34yyfRI7lfimsSX47tYrPDgz3jdXeLqz78eye7qSJ4RnTMoRgeT6TVQF6kfkKSJLzVL1-qNKdWdK_ew7IyYPMYmKfFlFnZwdZBKyP0q_o1zqHw4_tFtSouObhBdpoE-FpkV-rp2eEtGjatzjg_7XZq4SswGQU1-33PO6AnLJFQfobdMQJX5Xd6GPhwAJGzLOj2Tub2mIa7LH5O_LEXE_d1WaHnO0J5UC_Ckla5rchn_sEGVNH-gKLHWPYzwIarOKcr3kw6HNtL4jK5XcwmV4ANcLxKhSA9)**

clean_body: You've likely never been asked this before... | | | Fellow American, You've likely never been asked this before... This year, the American Veterans Center is expecting our LARGEST gathering of World War II heroes for our Annual Veterans Conference in nearly 20 years. The Gary Sinise Foundation is generously covering our WWII heroes' lodging ... American Airlines is providing our WWII veterans' flights ... and I invite you, Fellow American, to chip in a round for the living legends of the Greatest Generation. For more than 25 years, AVC's Annual Veterans Conference has been a monumental experience for every generation of America's heroes. But I'm sure you can understand why the Annual Veterans Conference means so much to our World War II heroes in particular this year. At the Conference, they will have the opportunity to reconnect with their brothers- and sisters-in-arms, share their stories, and impart powerful lessons learned from serving our country to the young people and military academy and ROTC students in attendance. (Imagine being a 22-year-old student in 2023 and having the honor to spend a weekend surrounded by dozens of legends from World War II - an experience they will never forget!) Veterans will be able to record a Hollywood-studio-quality interview about their World War II service -- and past interviews have been seen on PBS and Netflix, in museums across the country, and watched 100 MILLION times on the AVC's YouTube channel. But perhaps most important, these World War II veterans will see firsthand how their service and sacrifice are still being honored by a grateful nation 80 years later. Your contribution to this special mission doesn't just make a difference -- it truly makes history. Thank you for your support of America's World War II heroes for this year's special event. Tim Holbert President American Veterans Center The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center 1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201 Conservative Liberty Wire 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

subject: Help me train the next generation of leaders…
body:
Below is an email I'm circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you.

| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5ca99580ebcd4732aa775cc9417021a9&_e=a02QytiVlp1Whw-LMZ9RyeTN6b_x2sVvD7Tf8BdCHYofEsv2cgezJBdJ8bVPf16gYNkPW3ECWoV-l0W98OkEjzS9_xidBhrKs2F3zL2bY1Sa50LZDJ72GqnqEdhqstyfGRu9wC4MN9l6hx27vSwVPmqJyQJZJ1TqTI_yBMdhlwv1HnI6-da-2QKbjHBxMmDDNj0oBQM1jlKK85RB_gJXkmnkLN3IknWZU6uuwvuV9RvMhe5iA_HJbil_YwfY-tg9SShclnf5n8Yc9LnAcjNRYOZuxQlKgJ9hx481bXP_qy0-QQiiOEi3x-2ea5kM4iTBwIpGeI1wdI3ojgslwlcUILLyC3EZKq1mw1p_IpdP5Hk%3D)
Hi Fellow American,

Below is an email I'm circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you. I think you may be interested in seeing it.

Please review the message at your earliest convenience and let me know if you would like to participate.

Best wishes,

Riley Gaines

P.S. The deadline is approaching to raise $1.5 million to host my upcoming college campus tour. If you'd like to give online, here's a secure link for you:
**[https://secured.leadershipinstitute.org/rgc-082424/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5ca99580ebcd4732aa775cc9417021a9&_e=a02QytiVlp1Whw-LMZ9RyeTN6b_x2sVvD7Tf8BdCHYofEsv2cgezJBdJ8bVPf16gYNkPW3ECWoV-l0W98OkEjzS9_xidBhrKs2F3zL2bY1Sa50LZDJ72GqnqEdhqstyfGRu9wC4MN9l6hx27vSwVPmqJyQJZJ1TqTI_yBMdhlwv1HnI6-da-2QKbjHBxMmDDNj0oBQM1jlKK85RB_gJXklTVOZHJ_clHl-H1h5VR67wmIqSVLgPbU1u6XSmuib-5B8l-S12534wuczH6YDgYzfqCA5ta1ETEXSHfPvgmRX5K2P0ofr6qLWvD_eY7wZ0fUAk0CviaIaKd9COxO_YFx3tMepjb3tIKv4JMtW9OYg8%3D)**

* * *

From: Riley Gaines <rileygaines@email.leadershipinstitute.org>
Send Date: August 9, 2023 9:55 AM
Subject: Did you see my announcement?

Dear Friend,

I hope you saw my announcement on Sean Hannity's show that I've partnered with the Leadership Institute to launch the Riley Gaines Center.

I'm the 12-time All-American swimmer who speaks out against transgender ideology and fights to defend basic truths - that men are men and women are women.

The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute is now the exclusive headquarters of my work to lead conservatives of all types - patriots who will not be silenced by the weight of the left's cultural pressure and who want to learn how to defend America's freedoms.

When the left tries to shout you down profanely, when they viciously attack you - that's when you know you're saying the right things.

For those who are attacked, vilified, and persecuted for their support of America's founding principles and traditional American values, the Riley Gaines Center sends a message that they are not alone - because I will stand bravely with them.

To train as many young people as I can to stand up for conservative principles, I must have the help of strong Leadership Institute supporters like you.

**[Will you help turn young men and women into Leaders for America?](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5ca99580ebcd4732aa775cc9417021a9&_e=a02QytiVlp1Whw-LMZ9RyeTN6b_x2sVvD7Tf8BdCHYofEsv2cgezJBdJ8bVPf16gYNkPW3ECWoV-l0W98OkEjzS9_xidBhrKs2F3zL2bY1Sa50LZDJ72GqnqEdhqstyfGRu9wC4MN9l6hx27vSwVPmqJyQJZJ1TqTI_yBMdhlwv1HnI6-da-2QKbjHBxMmDDNj0oBQM1jlKK85RB_gJXkrVYq_moB007TdsomxrH8YbWn3oNRa8MKanUTAc3yKIR5secmTmw0hSGSW0S4cmpKeZzo5Q4861ITPz3az5njVRUlLx-4MdoVRLuF-LzfUMWM7KDs1ocD993afKwhNM10Wh4Q-lwe9Gm1XtFCRVTqUQ%3D)**

The Riley Gaines Center is the exclusive home of my work to lead this crucial cause through:
* Speaking events and media appearances to rally everyday Americans to defend women's identity and uphold vital truths.

* A coalition of women, student athletes, parents, and those who have been harmed by radical transgender ideology, to join me in speaking out across the country.

* A fast-growing team of speakers and grassroots organizers, who will help turn those ready to defend freedom into champions who put their principles into action.

---
Through the Riley Gaines Center, my fellow Leadership Institute colleagues and I will identify, recruit, train, mentor, and empower students, athletes, and parents across the country to become campus, community, and national Leaders for America.

Not only will these young leaders help our country right now. They will stand up for our principles for decades to come.

**[By joining me and the Leadership Institute team with your contribution to this new effort, you make a powerful difference for conservatives across the country, from college campuses to the halls of power.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5ca99580ebcd4732aa775cc9417021a9&_e=a02QytiVlp1Whw-LMZ9RyeTN6b_x2sVvD7Tf8BdCHYofEsv2cgezJBdJ8bVPf16gYNkPW3ECWoV-l0W98OkEjzS9_xidBhrKs2F3zL2bY1Sa50LZDJ72GqnqEdhqstyfGRu9wC4MN9l6hx27vSwVPmqJyQJZJ1TqTI_yBMdhlwv1HnI6-da-2QKbjHBxMmDDNj0oBQM1jlKK85RB_gJXkgiJy3Kx7zcetspk6l5vrCw3GwVwl9xroCIGfacVT8pxcxNtwUSbs6pRVfIp9ie2Pt7lamYwHcb2HQgLnsRpYyM3U-FY0FZvCiTBEuKiKqzNHTHeK14kkVTbRry63NLqjAgn9sq5Pt5R6vn-zt3EhJM%3D)**

Thank you for your support and dedication to preserving commonsense truths and conservative principles in our country.

Stand bravely with me,

Riley Gaines
The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute

| | | Hey, Friend - I only have a minute, but this is important:

**Can I get your raw, unfiltered feedback on your concerns with the following issues:**
_\- The Border Crisis
\- Election Integrity
\- State of the Economy
\- Weaponization of Government
\- Corruption in the White House
\- Chinese Purchases of U.S. Farmland
\- The Strength of Our Military
\- Crime
\- Free Speech_
As your Majority Leader, it's my job to serve you, the American People - and I can't effectively do that without hearing your opinion.

House Republicans are unrelenting in the pursuit of a more perfect Union. But with so many problems to tackle and so many mountains to climb, knowing where your main concerns lie is essential to help shape our agenda.

_**[You're an essential part of the team and I trust what you have to say. name: Brandon Presley
subject: this race is keeping me awake
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brandon Presley Campaign
body:
Sorry to email so early on a Sunday. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71980535/433890806/17860314?refcode=ea.08bfbc72-d070-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=ea.08bfbc72-d070-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDhiZmJjNzItZDA3MC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-PjNt2QqHnUpoVBzkv-53rzGAnVK4V0FbDwDp2mRiyI=)
---
Sorry to email so early, Peter – this race is keeping me up at all hours. We have a lot of ground to cover to hit our last public filing deadline of the election and to be honest, it’s stressing me out. **So I’m asking you to give me some peace of mind before the day really kicks off. "
"I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. clean_body: I know we will win in November, but I can't do it without you. | Friend - did you see this NEW Montana Senate Poll? We're GAINING FAST on an 18-year incumbent, Democrat career politician Jon Tester. I haven't been in this race long - just three and a half months - but what we're doing is working. Friend, I am new to politics. I've never run for office before. And I'm not a career politician. I'm a former Navy SEAL, aerial firefighter, and job creator ready to bring a new generation of conservative leadership to Washington. But I cannot do this without conservative patriots like you. We cannot win a Republican Senate majority without winning in Montana, friend. For America's Future, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL Republican for U.S. Senate | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. Friend,

BREAKING: Innocent Americans and Israelis are being held hostage as we speak, and Biden is spending $100 million of YOUR hard-earned tax dollars on "humanitarian aid" that is all but guaranteed to be hijacked by Hamas terrorists.

Ron DeSantis is the first Republican presidential candidate to stand up and condemn Biden's latest failure of showering these terrorists with money.
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=04beebc7ebdf0fcca1c8ac98211b0c25ca9dfe283f805632ab7b49d5027623498af20bab846e042675efcad30d9074ab9661bc72835abc4bf86f8454a583a15a
If you oppose showering these terrorists with your money, we need to let Joe Biden know NOW.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=04beebc7ebdf0fcca1c8ac98211b0c25ca9dfe283f805632ab7b49d5027623498af20bab846e042675efcad30d9074ab9661bc72835abc4bf86f8454a583a15a
RESPOND NOW

By the hands of Hamas terrorists: More than 3,785 deaths. At least 12,500 injuries—including nearly 4,000 children and 3,300 women. 22 American lives lost. There is NO justification for Joe Biden sending these murderers a $100 million gift.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=04beebc7ebdf0fcca1c8ac98211b0c25ca9dfe283f805632ab7b49d5027623498af20bab846e042675efcad30d9074ab9661bc72835abc4bf86f8454a583a15a
SUBMIT YOUR RESPONSE

In Freedom,

Team DeSantis

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=04beebc7ebdf0fccb9400cb507b8bbc55311b092918dfdadb27b9515fc5321ff197d2931f44bcfba33a51e9eadfb6083aab9804f2a4491b8b7f6b6e5ae537b5a
here.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=04beebc7ebdf0fcc1196ffb5486e2bc2cdbdeae58ab8af0505c68f79fe4ba53f29e46fc81a9d659383a860c96fd0fa821ba3cd5dfa0df566f56349409a0d03b4
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=04beebc7ebdf0fcca1c8ac98211b0c25ca9dfe283f805632ab7b49d5027623498af20bab846e042675efcad30d9074ab9661bc72835abc4bf86f8454a583a15a

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=04beebc7ebdf0fcca1c8ac98211b0c25ca9dfe283f805632ab7b49d5027623498af20bab846e042675efcad30d9074ab9661bc72835abc4bf86f8454a583a15a

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.

body:
UPDATE: New Date - Mark Your Calendar for Nov 8th! | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/2199bcb6f0c9/conforti-for-congress-8248100?e=25f4fa3311)
---
| | |
---
| | | Dear Peter,

It came to our attention that the _Salute to Veterans_ is scheduled the same night as the Conforti for Congress fundraiser at Emmett's in Downers Grove.

In honor of our veterans, the date has been changed for the Conforti for Congress Fundraiser to **Wednesday, November 8th. **

**Help bring common sense back to Congress. Come out and support Niki Conforti in her run for IL Congressional District 6!**

**We kindly request an rsvp. Please rsvp to:**

**[diane@conforti4congress.com](mailto:diane@conforti4congress.com)**

**See you there! **

Your support is greatly appreciated.
Stay strong!
---
| Thank you,

Niki Conforti
Candidate
Illinois 6th Congressional District

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Virginia election officials have purged voter rolls
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
As a result, Virginia's elected officials can unilaterally manipulate voting accessibility for political convenience. Just last week, Virginia election officials purged voter rolls.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71982215/433895518/1394218223?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20231022-Z-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDQ5Y2ExNWEtZGE3MC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=904fQzNRXxiKSEjLuefRXh5zf86T1gPsdg13Ix98aD8=)
---
| Peter, Attacks on voting rights are unacceptable, but they are happening in Virginia, and we must continue pushing legislation to protect the right to vote – in Virginia and across the country. That’s why I co-sponsored the _Voting Rights Advancement Act_ , but unfortunately, many of my far-right colleagues have blocked efforts to defend this fundamental right.

As a result, Virginia's elected officials can unilaterally manipulate voting accessibility for political convenience. _**This month, Virginia election officials purged voter rolls. **_ Virginia Governor Glenn Youngkin has been tight-lipped about the number of Virginians removed from the voting rolls by his Department of Elections. This lack of transparency is concerning, especially considering these voter purges occurred weeks before a pivotal election that could secure total Republican control in Virginia. We must elect officials who will protect the right to vote. I hope you will join my team and me in our efforts to strengthen our democracy. clean_body: As a result, Virginia's elected officials can unilaterally manipulate voting accessibility for political convenience. Just last week, Virginia election officials purged voter rolls. | = | Peter, Attacks on voting rights are unacceptable, but they are happening in Virginia, and we must continue pushing legislation to protect the right to vote – in Virginia and across the country. That’s why I co-sponsored the Voting Rights Advancement Act , but unfortunately, many of my far-right colleagues have blocked efforts to defend this fundamental right. As a result, Virginia's elected officials can unilaterally manipulate voting accessibility for political convenience. This month, Virginia election officials purged voter rolls. Virginia Governor Glenn Youngkin has been tight-lipped about the number of Virginians removed from the voting rolls by his Department of Elections. This lack of transparency is concerning, especially considering these voter purges occurred weeks before a pivotal election that could secure total Republican control in Virginia. We must elect officials who will protect the right to vote. I hope you will join my team and me in our efforts to strengthen our democracy. = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for standing up for democracy, Abigail * | | = Paid for by Spanberger for Congress Spanberger for Congress P.O. name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Can I explain?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS
body:
#
Friend — In just a moment, [_I’m going to ask you to split a donation between my campaign and Zak Malamed's team._](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-tb-split?amount=10?source=em231022-zm-tb-split&refcode2=524_8507_ZR4d-N&akid=524%2E8507%2EZR4d-N) But before I do, I hope you’ll take a few minutes to let me explain why your support matters so much in a race like ours.

Our campaign is preparing to face a flood of GOP spending in Wisconsin. The NRSC has hand-picked two megamillionaires who have pledged to spend up to _**$20 million**_ out of their own pockets to defeat me.

That much cash could break the record for the most personal wealth any candidate has ever spent in Wisconsin — and it gets worse... Neither of my potential wealthy opponents are _officially_ in the race yet, but they are c**ampaigning in secret to skirt around FEC disclosure rules and avoid answering questions about their personal wealth and radical agendas** **— all to put our campaign at a huge financial disadvantage.**

It’s the same playbook Ron Johnson used to flip Wisconsin’s other Senate seat from blue to red: get in late, pour millions of dollars into the race, and then win a narrow victory.

We cannot let that happen again. But the only way to ensure our campaign has the resources to fight back against the colossal amount of GOP spending coming our way is for us to hit every one of our fundraising goals — that’s where you come in:

[_Will you split a donation between Zak Malamed's team and my campaign today? Folks, I can’t do this alone — I’m counting on you to help me keep Wisconsin and our Senate majority blue._](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-tb-split?amount=10?source=em231022-zm-tb-split&refcode2=524_8507_ZR4d-N&akid=524%2E8507%2EZR4d-N)

If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Split $20 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-tb-split?amount=10?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=em20231022-tb-split-el&refcode2=524_8507_ZR4d-N&akid=524%2E8507%2EZR4d-N) [Split $50 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-tb-split?amount=10?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em20231022-tb-split-el&refcode2=524_8507_ZR4d-N&akid=524%2E8507%2EZR4d-N) [Split $100 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-tb-split?amount=10?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em20231022-tb-split-el&refcode2=524_8507_ZR4d-N&akid=524%2E8507%2EZR4d-N) [Other Amount ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-tb-split?amount=10&amount=30&refcode=em20231022-tb-split-el&refcode2=524_8507_ZR4d-N&akid=524%2E8507%2EZR4d-N)
---

Thank you for taking the time to read this message, and as always, thank you for your continued support.

— Tammy

And Feds See 75% Jump In Arrests Of Illegal Aliens On Terror Watchlist

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c671887%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qTU4t%2fybfd%2bIWqdhGID84g&sysid=1 Dems Slammed Trump For Trying To Top Off Strategic Oil Reserve. Now Biden Wants To Refill With Oil Prices 3X Higher

The Biden administration is aiming to refill the strategic petroleum reserve (SPR) at a price of $79 per barrel, a level more than three times higher than the price that the Trump administration had sought to replenish at in 2020.

The number of arrests made of illegal aliens on the terror watchlist has increased 75% since last year, according to U.S. Customs and Border Protection data. Border patrol encounters with illegal aliens on the watchlist at the southern and northern border jumped from 98 in 2022 to 172 in 2023, CBP’s data for the fiscal year shows.

Read more Dems Slammed Trump For Trying To Top Off Strategic Oil Reserve. Now Biden Wants To Refill With Oil Prices 3X Higher The Biden administration is aiming to refill the strategic petroleum reserve (SPR) at a price of $79 per barrel, a level more than three times higher than the price that the Trump administration had sought to replenish at in 2020. Border patrol encounters with illegal aliens on the watchlist at the southern and northern border jumped from 98 in 2022 to 172 in 2023, CBP’s data for the fiscal year shows. subject: We can't wait until 2024, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America This email was sent by Emerge America
body:
| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71983210/433898822/-1986725773?amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1345-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNkZDQ5MDllLWRiNzAtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sw8NtdPeGVSmIqRHKgtouS_rZYHj4-0oQXsOIz8Up9M=)
---
Peter, have you seen the latest chaos in the House? Extremist Jim Jordan – after three consecutive failed votes – is no longer the Republican nominee for House Speaker. What we’re witnessing here is a colossal breakdown of leadership at one of the highest levels of our government. Without a new speaker, the government might be open, but no meaningful work can get done. **That's why ******we can’t wait until next year to invest in defending our democracy and defe** ating the MAGA agenda in every state. **But the only way we can flip seats blue and build strong, lasting Democratic majorities at the local, state, and national level is by having the right candidates running in the right races at the right time.
**[If you’re up to date on Emerge’s strategy to change the face of politics, please chip in now so we can recruit, train, and empower more Democratic women to run for office and win.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71983211/433898823/-1986725773?amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1345-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNkZDQ5MDllLWRiNzAtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sw8NtdPeGVSmIqRHKgtouS_rZYHj4-0oQXsOIz8Up9M=) If not, please give us one minute to explain. **
**Here’s just a quick snapshot of what we’ve accomplished together in our fight to change the face of politics and win real representation for ALL our communities.**
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71983212/433898824/-1986725773?amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1345-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNkZDQ5MDllLWRiNzAtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sw8NtdPeGVSmIqRHKgtouS_rZYHj4-0oQXsOIz8Up9M=)
| | [SUPPORT EMERGE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71983213/433898825/-1986725773?amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1345-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNkZDQ5MDllLWRiNzAtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sw8NtdPeGVSmIqRHKgtouS_rZYHj4-0oQXsOIz8Up9M=)
---
You see, Peter, a winning strategy for Democrats MUST include building a bench of bold, community-driven candidates who can step up and seize opportunities to run, win, and expand our ranks at every level of government.**That’s exactly what we do at Emerge, and every year, we prove our strategy works.**
**Emerge delivers the recruitment and training programs that propel trailblazers like Gov. Katie Hobbs, Rep. Lucy McBath, Rep. Abigail Spanberger, Mayor Michelle Wu, and many more to win crucial races, fight for our communities, and protect our essential rights. **
[**But we need our top supporters (including you!) with us to keep our momentum going. So please, before midnight tonight,**** will you donate $10 or more to Emerge now to help recruit, train, and empower bold Democratic women to lead in 2024 and beyond?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71983214/433898826/-1986725773?amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1345-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNkZDQ5MDllLWRiNzAtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sw8NtdPeGVSmIqRHKgtouS_rZYHj4-0oQXsOIz8Up9M=)
| | [DONATE NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71983215/433898827/-1986725773?amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1345-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNkZDQ5MDllLWRiNzAtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sw8NtdPeGVSmIqRHKgtouS_rZYHj4-0oQXsOIz8Up9M=)

Instead, far-right extremists are using these calmer months to ensure that _as many_ voter suppression laws as possible are in place by 2024. **And their efforts have not gone in vain: During last year's midterm elections, voter suppression laws blocked more than 4.6 million people from voting. **
Peter, this is only the beginning. Republicans know they can't win in 2024 unless they suppress the will of the people, and that's _exactly_ what they're trying to do.
We must fight back against these voter suppression attempts – and to do that as effectively as possible, we need to know how top Democrats like _you_ prefer to vote.

body:
Do not underestimate them.
#

Look at these two, Peter.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-oct23.kRA6ky&refcode=em231022-1&t=1&akid=1360%2E734936%2EIhZYrr)
Two election deniers. Two conspiracy theorists. Two extremists. Two losers.
**But do not underestimate them.**
Because if we don’t make the most of every single day from now until Election Day, they could beat us.
They will do everything they can. They will spend millions of dollars in Arizona. They’ll lie, they’ll cheat, they’ll tear Ruben down in the press.
And if they’re successful, Trump could have a second term as President. Kari Lake could be our next Senator from Arizona.
That is why we’re writing to you today. To help out Ruben.
If a $3 donation meant Ruben could beat Kari Lake and help keep Trump out of the White House, wouldn’t you rush that $3?
It might be the best $3 you ever spent.
Now, the reality is that not everyone donates. We don’t expect you to donate to every email or every text we send. That would be ridiculous. But today, we’re hoping you’ll chip in that $3.
If you’re able, you can use this link: [**https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/10-22-23**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-oct23.kRA6ky&refcode=em231022-1&t=2&akid=1360%2E734936%2EIhZYrr)

body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis —

As you probably know, the team here at Our Revolution has been staffing up for the 2024 elections. We know that affecting real change in key districts and states will take serious organizing, and that’s exactly what we’re known for as the biggest progressive turnout organization in the country.

You’ll be hearing more about our 2024 plans soon, but after watching last week’s Republican chaos in the US House of Representatives, we decided that we absolutely *must* push up our plans for key house districts. We can’t afford to not win back the house, and we need to ramp up these programs ASAP.

Help us meet our $10,000 goal by midnight tonight, to make sure that we can hire more organizers to train volunteers and have crucial one-on-one conversations with 2024 voters. Rush a donation today. (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9838?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231022_fr_turnout_0_6MO_jg_na_na_turnout&t=1011&akid=4817%2E5885482%2EF-GWhM)

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.
CHIP IN $10 NOW » (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9839?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231022_fr_turnout_0_6MO_jg_na_na_turnout&t=1012&akid=4817%2E5885482%2EF-GWhM)
CHIP IN $27 NOW » (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9840?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231022_fr_turnout_0_6MO_jg_na_na_turnout&t=1013&akid=4817%2E5885482%2EF-GWhM)
CHIP IN $50 NOW » (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9841?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231022_fr_turnout_0_6MO_jg_na_na_turnout&t=1014&akid=4817%2E5885482%2EF-GWhM)
CHIP IN $100 NOW » (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9842?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231022_fr_turnout_0_6MO_jg_na_na_turnout&t=1015&akid=4817%2E5885482%2EF-GWhM)
CHIP IN $250 NOW » (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9843?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231022_fr_turnout_0_6MO_jg_na_na_turnout&t=1016&akid=4817%2E5885482%2EF-GWhM)
CHIP IN OTHER » (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9838?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231022_fr_turnout_0_6MO_jg_na_na_turnout&t=1017&akid=4817%2E5885482%2EF-GWhM)
I don’t like to brag, but our team is the best at ID-ing where we can make the biggest impact, and what voting blocs are both crucial to winning and the most important for us to communicate with. Then we tap into our local networks of grassroots volunteers and activists, and make sure that we activate voters ahead of time. This is a proven, winning method — but it takes resources. We can’t win without your help. We are still $3,450 away from our $10,000 goal that we need to raise by midnight tonight. Can you help us get there? (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9838?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231022_fr_turnout_0_6MO_jg_na_na_turnout&t=1018&akid=4817%2E5885482%2EF-GWhM)

When we organize, we win.

Joseph Geevarghese, Executive Director
Our Revolution

name: Team DeSantis
subject: Response Requested
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWIm7M8iNk

If you've got two minutes to spare, we want your response. The
first job of any presidential candidate is listening. Ron
DeSantis is rising to the occasion.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWIm7M8iNk

Friend,

Ron
DeSantis is coming up on TWO debates next month. One against the
Republican presidential field of candidates on November 8th, and
one against Democrat Governor of California Gavin Newsom on
November 30th.

As
a fighter for what YOU need, he wants to hear from you before he
gets ready to take the stage!

If
you're most concerned about the economy, the border, the woke mob
taking over your kids' lives... Ron DeSantis wants to know.

Take the Official Survey

Governor Ron DeSantis has always put the needs of the people he
serves above his own, and as President, this won't change. He
wants to make sure he has your top issues covered. Take the
survey today to let him know!

In
Freedom,

Team DeSantis

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

Ron DeSantis comes from
blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to
him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the
Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate
degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was
so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered
to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a
life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and
now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting
to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in
this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every
turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and
consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his
life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and
3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that
this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents
face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political
agenda down the throats of children.

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has
promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected
bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to
children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by
immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our
southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the
mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring
our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on
track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record
speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment,
politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the
legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his
leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has
stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next
President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill
for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for
President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the
decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for
another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act
is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as
charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.
Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without
"green cards"), federal government contractors, and national
banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best
efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address,
occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose
aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The
maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600
($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple
using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary &
$6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute
$10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident
(i.e., green card holder).

This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not
being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose
of making this contribution.

I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card
and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued
to another person.

I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this
contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization,
national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal
contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron
DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his
military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not
imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department
of Defense.

Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President

PO Box 3696

Tallahassee, FL 32315

body:
Voters will decide whether to guarantee the right to an abortion in the state constitution and whether to legalize recreational marijuana. And many communities have critical local elections that will have deeply felt effects on people’s lives, from schools and health care to the criminal legal system. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71989186/433918799/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20231022_f_ohioelections_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODkwYzg5Mi1lMzcwLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kLoM1t0hEEkk4MxHuY4hmrCbQBeMHZZhNNtpfN5lT7w=&emci=b8236ce1-6b6f-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=6890c892-e370-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277)

| | Early voting is happening right now in Ohio, and there’s a lot on the line. Voters will decide whether to guarantee the right to an abortion and whether to legalize recreational marijuana. And the outcomes of municipal elections will have profound effects on people’s lives — from schools and health care to the criminal legal system. But some extremist politicians want to stop eligible voters from casting their ballots and being able to help make those decisions. Earlier this year, Ohio Republicans enacted what has been referred to as the strictest voter ID law in the country — requiring photo IDs, such as passports or driver’s licenses, to vote while prohibiting the use of student IDs or county-issued veterans’ IDs. As a result, we saw an uptick in ballot rejections for the state’s special election in August. We can expect more anti-voter attacks like these ahead of the 2024 election cycle. But we’re fighting back. In Ohio, we’re training pro-democracy elected officials as part of our Fair Fight National Fellowship Program, providing them with the tools they need to protect the freedom to vote in their communities. And across the country, we’ll keep fighting to elect pro-voter candidates and defeat anti-democracy extremists. [**But none of this work would be possible without the dedicated support of activists like you. Will you pitch in any amount to help protect free and fair elections in 2023, 2024, and beyond?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71989188/433918801/1358700588?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20231022_f_ohioelections_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODkwYzg5Mi1lMzcwLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kLoM1t0hEEkk4MxHuY4hmrCbQBeMHZZhNNtpfN5lT7w=) Thank you for all of your support, The Fair Fight Team | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71989190/433918803/1358700588?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20231022_f_ohioelections_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODkwYzg5Mi1lMzcwLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kLoM1t0hEEkk4MxHuY4hmrCbQBeMHZZhNNtpfN5lT7w=)

name: Bob Casey via Alex-Padilla.com
subject: I’m writing to ask if you can make a donation to our campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
Bob Casey is running to keep Pennsylvania’s Senate seat — and the Senate itself — blue. But he’s up against millions of dollars in outside spending from Mitch McConnell and the GOP, so it’s important we all come together to support Bob. This is going to be one of the closest races in the country, and there’s too much at stake to sit this one out.
[**If you can, please split a $5 contribution between Bob Casey and Alex Padilla to keep PA and the Senate blue](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-oct23-casey.axoLDL&refcode=em231022-1-30&t=1&akid=1573%2E159979%2Eqxa33d)**. **
Thanks.
\- Team Padilla

Hello friend,
I’m writing to ask if you will make a donation to our campaign. I hope you will give me a minute to explain why this request is important -- [**but if you are ready to do your part right now, you can split a donation between Alex Padilla and my campaign at this link knowing how grateful I am for your support.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-oct23-casey.axoLDL&refcode=em231022-1-30&t=2&akid=1573%2E159979%2Eqxa33d)**
The truth is, defending this Senate seat isn’t only about ensuring we can keep fighting for Pennsylvania families in Washington, as important as that is.
This is also the race that could decide if Democrats hold our Senate majority. We know that, and Mitch McConnell knows it, too.
It is hard to understate the stakes, friend: Social Security, Medicare and Medicaid, women’s rights, LGBTQ+ equality, the right to vote, and more are on the line if Republicans flip the Senate next year.
We need to be able to fight back against the millions that McConnell and the GOP are going to spend here, which will hinge on our ability to meet each fundraising goal we set.
[**Can I count on you to split a contribution of $5 or more between Alex Padilla and my re-election campaign today, friend? We need your help to keep PA and the Senate blue.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-oct23-casey.axoLDL&refcode=em231022-1-30&t=3&akid=1573%2E159979%2Eqxa33d)**
**[DONATE NOW >>](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-oct23-casey.axoLDL&refcode=em231022-1-30&t=4&akid=1573%2E159979%2Eqxa33d)**
Thank you for your support,
Bob Casey

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=5&akid=1573%2E159979%2Eqxa33d)
clean_body: Bob Casey is running to keep Pennsylvania’s Senate seat — and the Senate itself — blue. But he’s up against millions of dollars in outside spending from Mitch McConnell and the GOP, so it’s important we all come together to support Bob. This is going to be one of the closest races in the country, and there’s too much at stake to sit this one out. . Thanks. \- Team Padilla Hello friend, I’m writing to ask if you will make a donation to our campaign. I hope you will give me a minute to explain why this request is important -- The truth is, defending this Senate seat isn’t only about ensuring we can keep fighting for Pennsylvania families in Washington, as important as that is. This is also the race that could decide if Democrats hold our Senate majority. We know that, and Mitch McConnell knows it, too. It is hard to understate the stakes, friend: Social Security, Medicare and Medicaid, women’s rights, LGBTQ+ equality, the right to vote, and more are on the line if Republicans flip the Senate next year. We need to be able to fight back against the millions that McConnell and the GOP are going to spend here, which will hinge on our ability to meet each fundraising goal we set. Thank you for your support, Bob Casey Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate

name: Colin Allred
subject: I took off my jacket and got ready to fight anyone who came through the door.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:

| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3c0cb184-913b-465a-b0d3-7fcff1a3f14b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| | | | | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tefda01a6-8352-499e-b0f7-adfcdb8ac030/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, I thought my days of putting people on the ground were over when I left the NFL. Then January 6th happened. I was on the House floor when rioters breached the Capitol, and I remember hearing the glass break and the shouts coming closer. As they pounded on the doors, I texted my wife Aly, who was seven months pregnant with our second son: “Whatever happens, I love you.” I took off my jacket and got ready to fight anyone who came through the door. Thankfully, it never came to that. And while I was barricaded on the House floor with my colleagues and our gas masks in hand, Ted Cruz – who had cheered on the mob earlier that day – hid in a supply closet. Ted Cruz’s false claims about the 2020 election helped incite the insurrection. That's Ted for you: All hat, no cattle. That day is one of many, many reasons I know Ted Cruz has got to go. People lost their lives, and our government came the closest it ever has to crumbling. His MAGA extremism is bad for Texas and our country, and it’s time to hold him accountable. [I’m running to replace Ted Cruz and give Texans the senator we deserve, and I hope you’ll help me do it, Peter. Will you donate now to me and Blue Amp Actin to help build our grassroots movement and defeat Ted Cruz once and for all? Any amount you can spare is truly appreciated. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te7a5313e-1650-4433-ac82-ee8217a30e9a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
