| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7e082ccc-5ab5-4d45-8b64-59b490786a1f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

subject: Jamie Raskin and Pete Buttigieg are calling on you

body:
don’t let this opportunity slip away
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=20319%2E4449941%2EiFda4_)
---
**WE TOLD YOU** Jamie Raskin called the Electoral College “a danger”
**WE TOLD YOU** Pete Buttigieg said it makes our society “less democratic”
**AND NOW WE’RE TELLING YOU** that we’re crucially behind on our goal... _**If we don’t fully fund our ads, we might lose our chance at getting rid of the Electoral College.**_

With experts saying Trump could win the presidency AGAIN while losing the popular vote, he’d be THRILLED if we missed our goal!

[**So we’re not too proud to beg: Chip in $7 before tomorrow’s deadline to fund our ads to abolish the Electoral College and support our work »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/32253?t=7&akid=20319%2E4449941%2EiFda4_) [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/32253?t=8&akid=20319%2E4449941%2EiFda4_) | [$12,000 GOAL TO FUND OUR ADS TO ABOLISH THE ELECTORAL COLLEGE AND SUPPORT OUR WORK: CHIP IN BEFORE TOMORROW NIGHT »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/32253?t=9&akid=20319%2E4449941%2EiFda4_)

name: Rashida Tlaib via Justice Democrats
subject: Ceasefire Now:
body:
We need legislation that saves as many lives as possible, no matter one’s faith or ethnicity.
#
Peter,
Over this past week, tens of thousands of people have rallied in cities across the U.S. for a ceasefire. Hundreds of Jewish Americans have been arrested while protesting to end the Israeli military’s unfolding genocide against Palestinians, and thousands blocked entrances to the White House on Monday calling for a ceasefire.
In Congress, I just joined 12 other Democrats to introduce the _Ceasefire Now Resolution_ , urging the Biden administration to call for an immediate de-escalation and ceasefire in Israel and occupied Palestine, and to send humanitarian aid and assistance to people under siege and trapped in Gaza.
**The collective punishment of Palestinian civilians is a war crime, a moral outrage, and an egregious violation of humanitarian law.**
[Please sign on now to become a grassroots co-sponsor of the _Ceasefire Now Resolution_.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140230?t=1&akid=31469%2E1203867%2EYnDG60)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140230?t=2&akid=31469%2E1203867%2EYnDG60)**
**We need legislation that saves as many lives as possible, no matter one’s faith or ethnicity.** So I’m joining some of my colleagues and a growing coalition of human rights advocates in calling for de-escalation, ceasefire, and a strong humanitarian response that prevents more devastating civilian casualties across the region.
The answer to war crimes is not war crimes.
Since Saturday October 7, Israel’s government has been dropping around a thousand bombs a day on 2.2 million trapped Palestinians—over half of whom are children. This includes white phosphorus bombs, an illegal incendiary weapon that burns through skin down to the bone.
As of Monday, October 16, the UN and the WHO reported that 1 million Palestinians have been displaced, and Israel’s military has targeted 111 medical facilities, killed 12 health care workers, and bombed 60 ambulances. Recent reports indicate hundreds have been killed in the bombing of a hospital sheltering thousands of civilians.
Calling Palestinians “animals,” Israeli politicians have openly broadcast their collective punishment of civilians. The Israeli government has cut off water, food, fuel, medicine, and electricity to Gaza, while refusing to accept Palestinian Americans from Gaza or to allow the delivery of humanitarian aid into Gaza.
As Jewish group IfNotNow said while supporting the _Ceasefire Now Resolution: “Even as Biden allows Israel's genocide of Palestinians, we will not allow more mass murder in our name.”_
**Unfortunately, many U.S. political leaders are supporting this violence and calling to send more weapons to Israel’s military, while dehumanizing and disregarding Palestinian civilians.** The Biden administration, most of Congress, and U.S. State Department officials have actively tried to silence calls for de-escalation and a ceasefire.
The hate and racist rhetoric coming out of Washington D.C. is pushing incendiary, hateful, and dehumanizing anti-Palestinian and anti-Muslim rhetoric that must be called out. A 6-year-old boy—Wadea Al-Fayoume—was stabbed to death in Chicago for being Palestinian American.
My colleagues are trying to silence me, the only Palestinian American in Congress, because I want the violence to stop—no matter whether it’s toward Israelis or toward Palestinians. I cannot believe I have to beg our country to value every human life, no matter their faith or ethnicity. We cannot lose sight of the humanity in each other.
[Please sign if you agree: The U.S. government must urgently save Palestinian, Israeli, and American civilian lives. We must bring Americans in Israel and occupied Palestine safely home, and we must push Israel’s government to stop the siege on Gaza and ensure humanitarian aid to Gaza.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140230?t=3&akid=31469%2E1203867%2EYnDG60)
**[SIGN NOW](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140230?t=4&akid=31469%2E1203867%2EYnDG60)**
Thank you for taking action.
Right now, we must keep showing massive public support for ending the violence. And in the long-term, we must keep building the movement to end the Israeli government’s apartheid system against Palestinians. Everyone in the region deserves to live safely, in freedom and with equal rights.
In solidarity,
Rep. Rashida Tlaib

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20231022-31469-footer&t=5&refcode2=31469_1203867_YnDG60&akid=31469%2E1203867%2EYnDG60)**
---

Federal candidates or officeholders mentioned above are not asking for more than $5,000 per calendar year from individuals or other federally permissible sources, nor are they asking for any funds from corporations, labor unions, or any other federally prohibited sources.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226, Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: [us@justicedemocrats.com](mailto:us@justicedemocrats.com)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=6&akid=31469%2E1203867%2EYnDG60)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=31469%2E1203867%2EYnDG60)

name: Bob Casey via Alex-Padilla.com
subject: I’m writing to ask if you can make a donation to our campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
Bob Casey is running to keep Pennsylvania’s Senate seat — and the Senate itself — blue. But he’s up against millions of dollars in outside spending from Mitch McConnell and the GOP, so it’s important we all come together to support Bob. This is going to be one of the closest races in the country, and there’s too much at stake to sit this one out.
[**If you can, please split a $5 contribution between Bob Casey and Alex Padilla to keep PA and the Senate blue](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-oct23-casey.axoLDL&refcode=em231022-1-60&t=1&akid=1574%2E159979%2EruG8Yk)**. **
Thanks.
\- Team Padilla

Hello friend,
I’m writing to ask if you will make a donation to our campaign. I hope you will give me a minute to explain why this request is important -- [**but if you are ready to do your part right now, you can split a donation between Alex Padilla and my campaign at this link knowing how grateful I am for your support.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-oct23-casey.axoLDL&refcode=em231022-1-60&t=2&akid=1574%2E159979%2EruG8Yk)**
The truth is, defending this Senate seat isn’t only about ensuring we can keep fighting for Pennsylvania families in Washington, as important as that is.
This is also the race that could decide if Democrats hold our Senate majority. We know that, and Mitch McConnell knows it, too.
It is hard to understate the stakes, friend: Social Security, Medicare and Medicaid, women’s rights, LGBTQ+ equality, the right to vote, and more are on the line if Republicans flip the Senate next year.
We need to be able to fight back against the millions that McConnell and the GOP are going to spend here, which will hinge on our ability to meet each fundraising goal we set.
[**Can I count on you to split a contribution of $5 or more between Alex Padilla and my re-election campaign today, friend? We need your help to keep PA and the Senate blue.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-oct23-casey.axoLDL&refcode=em231022-1-60&t=3&akid=1574%2E159979%2EruG8Yk)**
**[DONATE NOW >>](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-oct23-casey.axoLDL&refcode=em231022-1-60&t=4&akid=1574%2E159979%2EruG8Yk)**
Thank you for your support,
Bob Casey

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
body:
Thirty-one Senators, dozens of New Jersey leaders, and more than a thousand people like you have called on Senator Menendez to resign.

When we learned of his new foreign agent charges, leaders, including Andy, called for Menendez's expulsion from the US Senate.

But Senator Menendez pushed back, again insinuating that he's not going anywhere.

It's time New Jersey had trustworthy leadership in this Senate seat. Will you pitch in $3 and help build the movement for Andy? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim-ak4nj?refcode=2023-10-22-menendezbaddream&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=05c049e5-e870-ee11-b004-00224832eb73]

If Senator Menendez runs for reelection, as it seems he will, Democrats may lose the Senate majority.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim-ak4nj?refcode=2023-10-22-menendezbaddream&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=05c049e5-e870-ee11-b004-00224832eb73 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim-ak4nj?refcode=2023-10-22-menendezbaddream&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=05c049e5-e870-ee11-b004-00224832eb73]

---
Fellow Conservative, I’m not mincing words. I stand with Israel and I’m calling out the lunatic anti-Semite front.

The Kathy Barnette Show is Live on Apple Podcasts!
[| Why Won't Vivek Ramaswamy Criticize Donald Trump?The Kathy Barnette Show25:14
---|---](https://substack.com/redirect/7564263d-8fcb-42b8-b8a0-bc8a9d2d3e8c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Subscribe to The Kathy Barnette Show](https://substack.com/redirect/2f3e3d4e-80cf-4e6c-9069-52527e15c467?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Friends,

I recently had the honor of sitting down for an extended conversation with my dear friend and presidential candidate Vivek Ramaswamy for the first episode of the Kathy Barnette Podcast. Though we come from very different backgrounds and faiths - I'm a Christian, he's a Hindu - we have always found tremendous common ground in our deep love for America and desire to get our country back on track after years of decline.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/c2147784-d356-4085-81dc-eb2877f06ad4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
In today's highly divisive climate, many on the left seek to weaponize race, using it as a cudgel to silence dissenting voices. As a black woman who speaks boldly, I've experienced this censorship firsthand when my perspectives don't align with progressive narratives. Vivek emphasized the vital need for open, honest, and yes, uncomfortable conversations about race, rather than seeking to shut down certain voices and ideas because of the color of someone's skin. Real progress requires acknowledging humanity's flaws and shortcomings, while still calling people to live up to their highest values and ideals.

One theme that really stood out from this conversation with Vivek was the media's seeming obsession with trying to get him to directly criticize former President Donald Trump. While Vivek has policy differences with Trump on issues like trade and immigration, he refuses to pile on Trump or try to score easy political points given the truly unprecedented legal persecution Trump currently faces from prosecutors at the federal and state levels. Vivek aims to unite, not needlessly divide.

As Vivek insightfully notes, if we want to credibly lead the whole nation - not just our political tribe - we have to be willing to engage in good faith with fellow citizens we strongly disagree with, including those from ideological opposite media outlets. Vivek's approach shows courage and wisdom sorely lacking from most politicians today.

A major source of my enthusiasm for Vivek's candidacy is his steadfast confidence that America's best days can still be ahead of us if we make the right choices. He understands our freedoms come from God, not government. If we can re-embrace the bold, revolutionary spirit of 1776 exemplified by Jefferson, Franklin, and the other Founding Fathers, we can revive the flickering flame of the American Dream. But it requires moral courage, wise discernment, and a willingness to take personal responsibility - not expecting a political savior or relying on the failed status quo.

In Vivek Ramaswamy, I see a principled, intelligent leader ready to bravely take on the monumental challenges before us with integrity. Even when vilified by hostile media outlets, Vivek engages them in good faith, not retreating to defensive crouches or tribal echo chambers. His willingness to sacrifice and serve comes from a profound gratitude to America and the blessings of liberty. Vivek understands the presidency is not about vainglory but solemn duty. Friends, we desperately need more servant leaders like Vivek Ramaswamy if our Republic is to endure and thrive in the 21st century. I hope you enjoy this conversation with Vivek and please remember to subscribe to the Kathy Barnette Show!
[Subscribe to The Kathy Barnette Show](https://substack.com/redirect/2f3e3d4e-80cf-4e6c-9069-52527e15c467?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
In liberty,

Kathy

name: The GIFFORDS Team
subject: If you knew...
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Friends -
If you knew that your $5 had the power to save someone’s life, [**wouldn’t it be the best $5 you could ever spend?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-oct23.zcsGXG&refcode=em231022-1-60&amount=5&t=1&akid=6761%2E3935704%2ES6fcOc)
If you knew that your $5 could help get the next major gun safety law passed, [**wouldn’t you donate it right away?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-oct23.zcsGXG&refcode=em231022-1-60&amount=5&t=2&akid=6761%2E3935704%2ES6fcOc)
If you knew that your $5 went directly towards organizing, lobbying, education, advertising, research, and supporting gun safety candidates—all with a mission to end our nation’s gun violence epidemic--[**wouldn’t you chip in $5 right away?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-oct23.zcsGXG&refcode=em231022-1-60&amount=5&t=3&akid=6761%2E3935704%2ES6fcOc)
We know this all may sound like an exaggeration, but it’s the truth. People are alive today because of the lifesaving laws that GIFFORDS has helped pass at the federal level and in states nationwide.
But obviously, there’s still far more to be done. There have been over 500 mass shootings in our country this year. Gun violence is the leading cause of death for children in America. It doesn’t have to be this way. We can and must do better.
[**So please, contribute $5 today. Your support directly fuels our work toward a future free from gun violence.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-oct23.zcsGXG&refcode=em231022-1-60&amount=5&t=4&akid=6761%2E3935704%2ES6fcOc)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $5](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-oct23.j_Pk1L&amount=5&refcode=em231022-1-60&t=5&akid=6761%2E3935704%2ES6fcOc)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE OTHER](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-oct23.j_Pk1L&refcode=em231022-1-60&t=6&akid=6761%2E3935704%2ES6fcOc)**
---
****
Thank you for all that you do,
The GIFFORDS Team

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=6761%2E3935704%2ES6fcOc) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

Let’s get one thing straight, team: Our opponent, Rep. Anthony D’Esposito is an anti-choice extremist who wants to institute draconian abortion bans and control women’s bodies.
But don’t take our word for it. His track record says it all:
**❌ In one of his very first acts in Congress, D’Esposito voted to block critical legislation that would have codified reproductive freedom.

❌ D’Esposito also voted to pass anti-choice legislation that could imprison doctors who provide abortion care to their patients.

❌ He even admitted he would “probably” support a 15-week abortion ban nationally if he had the chance.

❌ And when State Senator Kevin Thomas and NY lawmakers codified _Roe v. Wade_ into state law after the Supreme Court overturned it, D’Esposito voiced his opposition loud and clear.**
The only way we can save abortion rights from anti-choice extremists like D’Esposito is if we work together to defeat them and flip the House blue by electing more pro-choice Democrats. **That starts with Kevin Thomas in NY-04.**
But we need to know where you stand at this critical moment, team. Before the end of today, tell us: **Do you want to defeat anti-choice House Republicans in 2024?**
[YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71994620/433937870/2029510721?noskip=true&refcode=ea.507868b0-eb70-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=ea.507868b0-eb70-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTU5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDc4NjhiMC1lYjcwLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mIXXHDJ3bBAjl_g3FHuxOk3IX3lQXi2sSm6_emKQHhU=) | [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71994621/433937871/2029510721?noskip=true&refcode=ea.507868b0-eb70-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=ea.507868b0-eb70-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTU5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDc4NjhiMC1lYjcwLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mIXXHDJ3bBAjl_g3FHuxOk3IX3lQXi2sSm6_emKQHhU=)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Re: Ohio
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| Since just last year, 14 states have effectively banned abortion, and several others have enacted laws and timelines so restrictive that they deny abortion access at 6 weeks, before most people even know they’re pregnant.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4264%2E5257348%2EXrkthd)
Derek —
Ever since Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell’s hand-picked Supreme Court majority overturned the constitutional right to an abortion when they ruled on _Dobbs v. Jackson_ — Republicans have waged relentless attacks on reproductive rights across the country.
Since just last year, **14 states have effectively banned abortion, and several others have enacted laws and timelines so restrictive that they deny abortion access at 6 weeks,** _before most people even know they’re pregnant._
And next month, a pivotal constitutional amendment is on the ballot in Ohio — one that would protect reproductive health care and contraception in the state’s constitution.
Far-right, anti-abortion groups are already spending millions of dollars to spread misinformation about this amendment, and Ohioans United for Reproductive Rights — the group leading the charge to pass this amendment — urgently needs our help to fight back.
**[I’m asking you to split a contribution between Ohioans United for Reproductive Rights and my campaign for U.S. Senate. The attacks on reproductive rights are coming from all sides. That’s why we need your help — today.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=oct2023_abs_em_ourr.X1Vf0a&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20231022_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=4264%2E5257348%2EXrkthd)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Adam Schiff and Ohioans United for Reproductive Rights will go through immediately:_
| [SPLIT $10 NOW](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=oct2023_abs_em_ourr.QGKSzj&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20231022_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=4264%2E5257348%2EXrkthd)
---
[SPLIT $25 NOW](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=oct2023_abs_em_ourr.OJJokw&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20231022_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=4264%2E5257348%2EXrkthd)
---
| [SPLIT $50 NOW](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=oct2023_abs_em_ourr.RatYpF&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20231022_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=7&akid=4264%2E5257348%2EXrkthd)
---
[SPLIT $100 NOW](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=oct2023_abs_em_ourr.4X_93l&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20231022_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=8&akid=4264%2E5257348%2EXrkthd)
---
| [SPLIT $250 NOW](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=oct2023_abs_em_ourr.GsGgt9&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20231022_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=9&akid=4264%2E5257348%2EXrkthd)
---
[SPLIT ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=oct2023_abs_em_ourr.X1Vf0a&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20231022_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=10&akid=4264%2E5257348%2EXrkthd)
---
I’m running for Senate because we are up against a radical and partisan Supreme Court hellbent on forcing a social agenda on a country that does not want it.
In the Senate, I will work to expand the Supreme Court and abolish the filibuster to protect reproductive freedom.
And in Ohio this year, just as we saw in Kansas, in Michigan, and in California last year, advocates for abortion access are mobilizing to protect reproductive freedom and defeat right-wing attacks on abortion access.
**This is an issue that affects all of us. When a country starts losing its rights, it starts losing its democracy. Access to abortion care is about human rights and fundamental freedoms.**
**[Please, split a contribution today in support of Ohioans United for Reproductive Rights and my campaign for U.S. Senate, so we can restore and protect abortion rights nationwide.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=oct2023_abs_em_ourr.X1Vf0a&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20231022_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=11&akid=4264%2E5257348%2EXrkthd)**
Thank you for your support in this important issue,
Adam
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=oct2023_abs_em_ourr.X1Vf0a&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20231022_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=12&akid=4264%2E5257348%2EXrkthd)

name: VoteVets.org
subject: Duty bound
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
No organization will outwork VoteVets.
#
Derek,
This chaos from the GOP — in the House AND Senate — doesn’t serve anyone. Least of all our Military.
We have men and women deployed to the Eastern Mediterranean to help keep the peace. Regional tensions are as high as they have been in our lifetime. Make no mistake — our Military is in harm’s way.
But instead of providing a united face to the world, supporting our Troops. Instead of funding our allies, from Ukraine to Israel. Instead of sending humanitarian aid that can save lives and forestall conflict. Instead of standing down and approving promotions for hundreds of honorable, decorated officers. Instead of doing their damn job, period...
The GOP is as deep in their own extremist politics as they have ever been.
There is only one solution here. We take back the House. We expand control in the Senate. We re-elect President Biden. And we get America back to work.
No organization will outwork VoteVets. That is our promise to you. Duty bound.
So today, we’re asking you to chip in and support our work towards those objectives.

clean_body: No organization will outwork VoteVets. Derek, This chaos from the GOP — in the House AND Senate — doesn’t serve anyone. Least of all our Military. We have men and women deployed to the Eastern Mediterranean to help keep the peace. Regional tensions are as high as they have been in our lifetime. Make no mistake — our Military is in harm’s way. But instead of providing a united face to the world, supporting our Troops. Instead of funding our allies, from Ukraine to Israel. Instead of sending humanitarian aid that can save lives and forestall conflict. Instead of standing down and approving promotions for hundreds of honorable, decorated officers. Instead of doing their damn job, period... The GOP is as deep in their own extremist politics as they have ever been. There is only one solution here. We take back the House. We expand control in the Senate. We re-elect President Biden. And we get America back to work. No organization will outwork VoteVets. That is our promise to you. Duty bound. So today, we’re asking you to chip in and support our work towards those objectives. Entries must be received between October 17, 2023, at 12:00 a.m. Eastern Time, and ends on October 23, 2023, at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time. Odds of winning depend on the number of eligible entries received. One (1) “Prize Winner” will receive a trip for two to a November 2, 2023 reception in Houston, Texas consisting of the following: (i) round-trip coach class airfare for the Prize Winner and one (1) guest to the event destination from the major U.S. airport nearest Prize Winner’s residence within the 48 contiguous United States; (ii) two (2) tickets to the reception featuring President Donald J. Trump; (iii) two (2) day one (1) night first class hotel accommodations (1 room, double occupancy); (iv) one (1) photograph of the Prize Winner and guest with President Trump; approximate retail value (“ARV”) of the Prize: $8,000. The Promotion is open only to U.S. citizens or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents (green card holders) of the 50 United States, Puerto Rico, and the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age (or the age of majority under applicable law). Winners must be 18 or older (or of majority under applicable law) and meet other requirements as described in the Official Rules. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility may apply. Visit for full details and Official Rules. Sponsor: Trump Save America, PO Box 13570, Arlington, VA 22219. Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and Save America.

name: Liz Walters
subject: We’re knocking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Will you answer the door?
|
Team, Chances are if you hear a knock on your front door in the next few weeks it’s one of Ohio Democrats’ dedicated volunteers. If it were humanly possible, _we’d knock on every single door in Ohio_. While that’s obviously not realistic, we’re sure as hell going to try, because that’s the mentality we need to have to turn out voters and win next month. But we need your help to give our volunteers the resources they need to try and make it happen. **[Can you chip in $5 to help our volunteers get out the vote ahead of the election in a few weeks?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71996877/433945352/1490322698?refcode=odp_em_231022_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODBkYThkZC1lZjcwLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AM3T29DJIJHw_NgYmOkcuUaKMkaK3f5MHvPNPbA86Uo=)** Think water bottles, food, pencils, clipboards – there are a lot of little things that our volunteers need to be successful. But there are big things too. Think literature on Issue 1 – we have to print hundreds upon hundreds of pages to arm our volunteers with the knowledge they need to talk to voters about what passing Issue 1 next month would mean for them. Your contribution does more than just give us the financial support we need to elect Democrats, it keeps our volunteers going and reinforces our ground game. And we know how important a strong ground game is. We saw it make the difference in the August special election. So let’s do it again. **[Please, donate anything you can today to aid our volunteers working around the clock these next few weeks to secure our right to reproductive freedom at the ballot box next month>>> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71996878/433945354/1490322698?refcode=odp_em_231022_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODBkYThkZC1lZjcwLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AM3T29DJIJHw_NgYmOkcuUaKMkaK3f5MHvPNPbA86Uo=)** Thank you, Liz Walters | **************A reproductive rights initiative is on the Ohio ballot this November. Can Ohio Democrats count on you to chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can to help fuel our fight to protect reproductive rights in our state constitution? →************** | ********[********](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71996879/433945356/1490322698?refcode=odp_em_231022_1&amount=5;email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODBkYThkZC1lZjcwLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AM3T29DJIJHw_NgYmOkcuUaKMkaK3f5MHvPNPbA86Uo=)****[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71996880/433945357/1490322698?refcode=odp_em_231022_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODBkYThkZC1lZjcwLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AM3T29DJIJHw_NgYmOkcuUaKMkaK3f5MHvPNPbA86Uo=) ************

name: Team Cooper
subject: We demand fair maps.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
It’s what our democracy calls for.
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71996887/433945391/823540626?refcode=ea.090da8dd-ef70-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=ea.090da8dd-ef70-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTBkYThkZC1lZjcwLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EMSKhVe0VrlhziHSC6fgybjdHvu-CIc__fNM6TiNm44=&emci=14eadd7b-576f-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=090da8dd-ef70-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)
**[NC voters deserve fair political maps. Tell NC legislators to REJECT new proposals for gerrymandered maps>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71996888/433945392/-2026699556?refcode=ea.090da8dd-ef70-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=ea.090da8dd-ef70-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTBkYThkZC1lZjcwLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EMSKhVe0VrlhziHSC6fgybjdHvu-CIc__fNM6TiNm44=&emci=14eadd7b-576f-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=090da8dd-ef70-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)** Peter, there are two principles that are the absolute bare minimum for a healthy democracy:
1. Voters should all have an equal voice in deciding who represents them.
2. Politicians should not get to choose their voters.

**But Republican legislators in North Carolina unveiled their new congressional and state legislature maps last week — and these maps are gerrymandering on steroids.** Here are the facts: North Carolina is a 50/50 state — with all statewide elections coming down to the margins. Our current congressional delegation is evenly divided between Republicans and Democrats. But under Republicans’ proposed maps, they could win as many as 11 of the 14 congressional districts and continue to hold a majority (and potentially their supermajorities) in both chambers of the state legislature. **It’s outrageous, and we won’t stand for it.** The legislator will vote on these gerrymandered maps next week. name: Jayapal HQ
subject: A cruel and inhuman immigration policy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We’re proud to know that Pramila is continuing to stand up for immigrant justice in Congress and in our communities.
#
Peter,
Last week, the Biden Administration reached a historic settlement to protect families affected by the Trump Administration's family separation policy.
In 2018, Pramila was the first Member of Congress to visit a federal facility to speak directly with the mothers and fathers who had been separated from their children. Some as young as just a few months old.
Pramila will never forget their stories.
**Pramila is continuing to stand up for immigrant justice in Congress and in our communities.** And we know she won't rest until these cruel, unjust, and inhuman policies are stripped from our government so we can finally heal our country.
[**Contribute today to power our movement as Pramila fights to create an immigration system that is rooted in empathy and humanity. No matter the size of your donation, your support will make an impact.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/46483?refcode=em20231022-3068&t=1&akid=3068%2E420207%2En90Wcc)
**[Donate ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/46483?refcode=em20231022-3068&t=20&akid=3068%2E420207%2En90Wcc)**
Together,
Jayapal HQ

clean_body: | = Peter, We noticed that you haven’t yet claimed your “I’m voting for equality” sticker! = Stick it on your car, your laptop, or wherever you want - and it’ll be a continued sign of support in our fight to flip CA-41. = | = At a time when Ken Calvert and Republicans are attacking the LGBTQ+ community, there’s never been a better time to show off your pride AND your support for the future first openly gay member of Congress to represent Palm Springs. The best part is that each donation goes directly back into our effort to turn out as many supporters as possible here in CA-41 next fall. = = Thank you, Will Rollins HQ P.S. If you’ve already claimed your sticker and are receiving this email, don’t worry! | | ATTN: Patriot,

---
President Donald J. Trump is extremely grateful for all of the Founding Members of “ _**THE PRESIDENT’S TRUST**_ ” – which was authorized earlier this year to defend our movement from the never-ending witch hunts.

---
With the witch hunts taking a very dark turn recently, President Trump is extremely grateful to know that the many, many patriots who chose to become Founding Members have his back.

---
But for President Trump, it’s not enough to say thank you, he wants to show it...

---
That’s why he came up with the idea of giving all NEW Founding Members of the TRUST a “NEVER SURRENDER” Mugshot Mug for FREE.

---
_In order to express his deepest gratitude, all Founding Members who accept their invitations **TODAY will receive a “Never Surrender” Mugshot Mug for FREE.**

Trump Save America JFC, PO Box 13570, Arlington, VA 22219

We believe this is an important way to reach our grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information regarding President Trump, and we’re glad you’re on our team. If you want to ensure our emails always go to your inbox, please add [contact@victory.donaldjtrump.com](mailto:contact@victory.donaldjtrump.com) to your address book.

Thank you for joining Team Trump. It’s because of grassroots supporters like YOU that we’ve been able to consistently call out the Fake News media EVERY SINGLE TIME they try to spread misinformation or outright LIES about the important work President Trump is doing to SAVE AMERICA. Reaching grassroots supporters directly is CRITICAL if we’re going to Save America from Joe Biden and the Left. But, in order to do that we need to provide supporters with the most up-to-date information on all of our efforts.

**TEXT TRUMP to 88022** to start receiving text messages from President Trump.

It’s because of the commitment and support from real Patriots, like YOU, that we will SAVE AMERICA! Thank you again for your generous support. But for President Trump, it’s not enough to say thank you, he wants to show it... That’s why he came up with the idea of giving all NEW Founding Members of the TRUST a “NEVER SURRENDER” Mugshot Mug for FREE. name: Mondaire Jones (personal)
subject: This election is personal
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
From Rockland to Lewisboro, everyday people are reminding me how high the stakes are
Team—I cannot thank you enough for the incredible support these past few months since launching my campaign to retake our majority.

Being out on the campaign trail, I’ve met so many people from Rockland to Lewisboro who remind me just how high the stakes are. From steep housing and child care costs to deep fears about climate change and what’s happening overseas—this election is deeply personal for so many.

That’s why I’m running. I’m ready to bring serious leadership back to the people of NY-17—but it won’t be easy. We can’t waste a single day if we’re going to flip this seat and retake the House majority.

Chip in $5 or any amount to flip NY-17 and take back our House majority. Here’s a personal link for you: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-q4-email?refcode2=dpwillis67@gmail.com**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72003785/433960977/-1250271359?refcode=em23_231022_MM2_fndd_gq_act___MJ_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231022_MM2_fndd_gq_act___MJ_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=1c495974-fc70-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzQ5NTk3NC1mYzcwLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yMXrGGD-W8iLFtw_NLggCec5wXyJmrrCgf8QVi7k_KU=)

The people of NY-17 deserve leaders who understand the stakes and are ready to work hard to make progress. Sadly, Mike Lawler and his Republican Party continue to play petty political games that prevent our government from functioning while people in our district struggle to make ends meet.

We have a chance to retake control of the House and focus on the issues that matter most—and that fight starts here in NY-17. _Roll Call_ and _Daily Kos_ have called Mike Lawler the second most beatable House Republican in America, and election experts are already predicting this race will be a “toss-up.”

I can’t flip this seat alone, which is why I’m asking: Will you chip in $5 or any amount so we can flip NY-17 and retake the House majority? I’m grateful for any amount you can give.

Here’s that link one more time: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-q4-email?refcode2=dpwillis67@gmail.com**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72003786/433960978/-1250271359?refcode=em23_231022_MM2_fndd_gq_act___MJ_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231022_MM2_fndd_gq_act___MJ_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=1c495974-fc70-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzQ5NTk3NC1mYzcwLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yMXrGGD-W8iLFtw_NLggCec5wXyJmrrCgf8QVi7k_KU=)

Yours in the fight,

Mondaire

---

P.O. BOX #873, SLEEPY HOLLOW, NY 10591

Thank you for standing with us in this crucial fight. — Fairness Project Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at the Fairness Project has won over 30 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 18 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. Your support allows us to make this progress possible.** = = Contributions or gifts to the Fairness Project are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: The American people deserve better
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| If you agree that it’s time for DeJoy to go, add your name to our petition today.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1372%2E35263%2EGVPeBV)
Peter, Time and again, I hear Wisconsinites express their concerns about the future of our postal service with Louis DeJoy as Postmaster General. I want you to know that I hear you, Peter, and I’m prepared to take action to defend the USPS and the critical services it provides from DeJoy’s negligent leadership. **Enough is enough** — it’s time for Louis DeJoy to be removed as Postmaster General before he causes any further detriment to the USPS. The American people deserve better. **[Stand with me in calling for the removal of Louis DeJoy as Postmaster General by adding your name to our petition:](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2310_USPS_petition_copy?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20231022_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1372%2E35263%2EGVPeBV)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2310_USPS_petition_copy?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20231022_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=1372%2E35263%2EGVPeBV)
---
Millions of Americans rely on the postal service for access to medicine, paychecks, ballots, and so much more — but since Donald Trump appointed him in 2020, DeJoy has more than proved how little he cares about the future of the USPS.
It’s clear as day that we can only protect the USPS and ensure it works at its highest capacity for every American by removing DeJoy and implementing new leadership.
**[If you agree that it’s time for DeJoy to go, add your name today to our petition to call for his removal from office as soon as possible.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2310_USPS_petition_copy?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20231022_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=1372%2E35263%2EGVPeBV)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2310_USPS_petition_copy?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20231022_PM1_V1_S1&t=7&akid=1372%2E35263%2EGVPeBV)
---
Thank you for making your voice heard.
— Tammy
P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701
**[www.tammybaldwin.com](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=2&akid=1372%2E35263%2EGVPeBV) | [INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM](mailto:INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=3&akid=1372%2E35263%2EGVPeBV)**
PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
---

name: Our Revolution
subject: LIVE Healthcare for All Town Hall with Barbara Lee, Pramila Jayapal, Ro Khanna and more!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis, big news!

On Tuesday (Oct. 24th), Our Revolution will hold a LIVE Healthcare for All Town Hall with Reps. Barbara Lee, Ro Khanna and Pramila Jayapal, the chair of the Congressional Progressive Caucus, along with CA Assemblyman Ash Kalra.

https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10284?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231022_INV_healthcaretownhall_0_6MO_ourrevolution_na_na_healthcaretownhall&t=1011&akid=4816%2E5885482%2EGM2mCz

RSVP (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10284?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231022_INV_healthcaretownhall_0_6MO_ourrevolution_na_na_healthcaretownhall&t=1012&akid=4816%2E5885482%2EGM2mCz)

We’ll talk about CalCare single payer healthcare in California and the path to national Medicare for All, as well as medical debt, drug prices, and how we can chart a path to healthcare justice in America.

RSVP here to be part of the conversation! The Live Town Hall event kicks off at 6pm Pacific/9pm Eastern on Tuesday! (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10284?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231022_INV_healthcaretownhall_0_6MO_ourrevolution_na_na_healthcaretownhall&t=1013&akid=4816%2E5885482%2EGM2mCz)

We are thrilled to have this powerful lineup of healthcare justice champions working alongside Our Revolution and our progressive movement for universal healthcare in California and beyond.

Healthcare is a human right, and it’s long past time for America to adopt a single payer system. Winning CalCare would be a huge step forward in advancing the fight for Medicare for All nationwide.

Join Barbara Lee, Ro Khanna, Pramila Jayapal, Ash Kalra, and our progressive coalition for this LIVE Healthcare for All town hall! (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10284?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231022_INV_healthcaretownhall_0_6MO_ourrevolution_na_na_healthcaretownhall&t=1014&akid=4816%2E5885482%2EGM2mCz)

Hope to see you there!

When we organize, we win

Our Revolution

clean_body: We have exactly 16 days until Election Day. If we want any chance of securing victory, we need to heed President Biden’s call and get the job done. So, can you chip in? | | | | | ---|--- 🚨 There are 16 days until Election Day 🚨 16 days – that’s all we have left to make an impact on Election Day. And President Joe Biden knows this, so he’s calling on each member of this grassroots team to support our movement to elect state Democrats: Republicans just funneled a staggering $4.4 million into Virginia, making this an even tougher battle to win. We’re heeding President Biden’s call, and we need you to stand with him, too – there’s a hell of a lot more to do. Here’s our to-do list to secure Democratic victory this November: Strategize with our candidates in these final weeks Mobilize resources to push our state Democrats across the finish line Invest in pivotal races like Virginia to ensure every vote counts Engage voters through door-knocking and phone banking To check off all our boxes, we’re going to need grassroots supporters like you, to be the driving force that pushes Democrats to victory. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Thank you for being a crucial part of this team, Team DLCC | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Paid for by DLCC PAC. We know she will bring her dedication to hard work, independent leadership, and fighting for real results to DC on behalf of the people of Oregon's 5th District. Thank you! The Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. name: Lucas K.
subject: I want to take back power for everyday Missourians
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Here’s what that means to me:
#
Peter — I’m running for U.S. Senate to replace Josh Hawley and take back power for everyday Missourians. Here’s what that means to me:
**Standing up for working families:** Workers are tired of corporate elites and frauds like Josh Hawley calling the shots in our country. I’ll always stand on the side of working people by continuing to fight for the right to organize and pushing back against anti-union “Right-to-Work” scams in Missouri + all across the country.
**Investing in our communities:** DC politicians spent decades wasting trillions of dollars on pointless forever wars. Now, it’s time to invest in the workers and communities that make our country strong so we can rebuild our forgotten towns and cities, and finally start making stuff in America again.
**Putting people in charge of their own lives:** Politicians like Josh Hawley have spent years using their power to control our lives. I’m committed to overturning the filibuster so we can protect abortion access in all 50 states — and finally give people the power to make decisions about their own bodies, families, and economic opportunities.
**Holding our politicians accountable:** Too many of our leaders have been bought off by the same massive corporations that have spent decades stripping our communities for parts. That’s why I’m fighting to ban insider trading for members of Congress and to outlaw ALL corporate PAC donations to campaigns.
**I’m ready to represent Missouri and stand up for everyday people in the U.S. Senate — but I need your help to get there.[So Peter, will you make your first donation of $10 or more to my campaign today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38656?refcode=em20231022-4029&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4029%2E614464%2ESYE6sb)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38657?refcode=em20231022-4029&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=2&akid=4029%2E614464%2ESYE6sb) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38657?refcode=em20231022-4029&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=3&akid=4029%2E614464%2ESYE6sb) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38657?refcode=em20231022-4029&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=4&akid=4029%2E614464%2ESYE6sb) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38657?refcode=em20231022-4029&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=5&akid=4029%2E614464%2ESYE6sb) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38657?refcode=em20231022-4029&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=6&akid=4029%2E614464%2ESYE6sb) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38657?refcode=em20231022-4029&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=7&akid=4029%2E614464%2ESYE6sb) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38656?refcode=em20231022-4029&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=4029%2E614464%2ESYE6sb)

With your help, we can accomplish all this and more.
Thanks for helping us get it done,
Lucas Kunce

name: Republican Congresswoman
subject: I’m taking on the “socialist" squad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salazar for Congress
body:
| | | Fellow American, it’s Republican Rep. Maria Elvira Salazar. When I see Democrats like AOC, Ilhan Omar, and Rashida Tlaib support socialism - I am angry, hurt, and saddened. My family escaped Cuba under Fidel Castro’s regime. They had NO freedom, watched as citizens became prisoners for speaking out, and lived with fear because they had NO say over their own lives - that’s what my parents lived with, and that is socialism. I have dedicated my life to exposing the horrors of socialism, first as a journalist, and now, as a Member of Congress. **To the socialist “squad” in DC, I ask, do you know the REAL horrors of socialism.... or is this an opportunity to consolidate your own power and control over your constituents? Fidel Castro took that opportunity and we have seen where that led Cuba.** **I am taking on these Democrats who champion socialism. I owe it to my parents and MANY others who have fled their homes for America.[Can I count on your support in my fight?](http://links.electsalazar.com/u/click?_t=efb87ae1dcc34914b1524d5a4e324c41&_m=c71e4d880c184923a5cbcad93c19ffe2&_e=i7fzZBucMpkb-s66eeAO_xXyzzMVzzZJ9rXNmisCp1biJRw9BZvad8f3bFmr0Un5ZHQid13I5DkfsBkKRFdh5EvtBQue388tzX3vR_o-qM6QDbVc6y8v_nAICu98nAY78vpwOtguAd8kq-PdXUe9IwxKf_ShOXTUqE7d4XkIRDessZeMsPeZQaggqUINzCfB4oCNWZyIjgl4cd00kmCV4wVvwVcOZ9-f1Ca8yuglXoIjsUVsOhPc5C9X2bcNFruWON2FkchXxLSysnuuAIzBeTs9Ha05LNktjp1yomMBD0K6VsOerYoZMPR2TtzwtL_RUhwxpS-alodOhQuulbPPJM96POjM3hW820Yvdg871vVJrce1RmCdC_tZxdztfSt1)** This won't be easy. They are going to come after me, Fellow American. I need you NOW more than ever. **[Help me fight for FREEDOM against the Democratic squad like AOC, Ilhan Omar, and Rashida Tlaib.](http://links.electsalazar.com/u/click?_t=efb87ae1dcc34914b1524d5a4e324c41&_m=c71e4d880c184923a5cbcad93c19ffe2&_e=i7fzZBucMpkb-s66eeAO_xXyzzMVzzZJ9rXNmisCp1biJRw9BZvad8f3bFmr0Un5ZHQid13I5DkfsBkKRFdh5EvtBQue388tzX3vR_o-qM6QDbVc6y8v_nAICu98nAY78vpwOtguAd8kq-PdXUe9IwxKf_ShOXTUqE7d4XkIRDessZeMsPeZQaggqUINzCfB4oCNWZyIjgl4cd00kmCV42Nyra4BOgOQe55KfyceZLEenDbsY0M7HeVEfFWpdNRI0jG_w8KfgrKwzuiZegLORjEGh5QwXyXpYDAKbdd-4hHKaMsDU2qK-WLIXXWbwFLab3XtaRaGBhQkCxgVX-tcZyj_5VQelzBLNVbkaS51TCdxNuqb3NDxp7ddx1SsgEBY)**

name: Andy Beshear
subject: 💬Quick message

name: Allred HQ
subject: The odds are stacked against us.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Friend – when Colin ran for Congress in 2018, the odds were stacked against him.
His opponent was a Republican Congressman who had held his seat for 11 terms. Colin and our team put everything we had into the campaign – but just 48 days from the election, the polls gave Colin a 10% chance of winning, and the district was leaning Republican.
In the last days of the campaign, Colin worked day and night to connect with Texans and earn their votes. He slowly chipped away at his opponent's lead as voters got to know him.
By Election Day, he had a 37% chance of victory. And when the numbers finally came in, he won with 52% of the vote.
[Split a donation between Serve America and Colin Allred to defeat Ted Cruz →] [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
Friend, this time around we're facing an even bigger opponent: Ted Cruz. But we're starting this race with much better odds. Polls show Colin just 5 points down with 14% of voters undecided.
What's more, Ted Cruz only won reelection by 2.6% last time.
We have a clear path to victory, and all it's going to take is connecting with enough undecided voters. That's why Colin is on the road traveling to every corner of Texas, shaking every hand he can and listening to what voters have to say.
But voter outreach on this massive scale is expensive. That's why Colin's counting on grassroots supporters like you to help him do it, so please: Can you split a donation of $25 between Colin and Serve America before our midnight fundraising deadline to help us reach the undecided voters we need to fire Ted Cruz? → [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
- Team Allred

Your personal endorsement shows Gloria – and the country – just how strong our movement is.
It’s an endorsement in favor of protecting women’s reproductive rights, passing legislation to prevent gun violence, strengthening access to affordable and accessible health care, expanding child care for hardworking families in Tennessee, and so much more.
**_[So please, will you take just 30 seconds to add your name to Gloria’s list of grassroots endorsements?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72013619/433969383/41746097?refcode=ea.0afa0dd3-0471-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=ea.0afa0dd3-0471-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWZhMGRkMy0wNDcxLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J39lttF6OyvEzAVGLvrHbWCmi0WUfsWfb9PODlW92Sc=&emci=27ab5f23-806f-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=0afa0dd3-0471-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=46764483)_**
Thank you,
Team Gloria
| Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care.

For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors.

Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights.

[There’s a movement afoot for change — join us.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72013621/433969391/-849459103?refcode=ea.0afa0dd3-0471-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=ea.0afa0dd3-0471-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWZhMGRkMy0wNDcxLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J39lttF6OyvEzAVGLvrHbWCmi0WUfsWfb9PODlW92Sc=&emci=27ab5f23-806f-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=0afa0dd3-0471-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=46764483) | [**DONATE TODAY**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72013623/433969394/209297649?amount=25&refcode=ea.0afa0dd3-0471-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=ea.0afa0dd3-0471-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWZhMGRkMy0wNDcxLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J39lttF6OyvEzAVGLvrHbWCmi0WUfsWfb9PODlW92Sc=)

clean_body: A small thing you can do today that costs no money and has a big impact. | We say this a lot because it’s the honest truth: This is a grassroots-powered campaign – built by and for the great people of Tennessee. Your ideas and values drive this campaign, and we can’t tell you how much it means to Gloria to have you on this team. | Your personal endorsement shows Gloria – and the country – just how strong our movement is. It’s an endorsement in favor of protecting women’s reproductive rights, passing legislation to prevent gun violence, strengthening access to affordable and accessible health care, expanding child care for hardworking families in Tennessee, and so much more. Thank you, Team Gloria | Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors. Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights. | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee Contributions or gifts to Gloria for Tennessee are not tax deductible. body:

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SPIRIT OF VIRGINIA
body:
Join The Winning Team

| [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=9e253128839947e28ca639de97467f8f&_e=TaGvShpC5Z-IekyPU5KCgd1ChkJ9T8HSUAJCfYJHC70yfipP0CjQB74sYcG-BL9Vv9Q-hiMKH5Cs0n7bMnI6inBQ-hp881RLoSb_jeiZgwon2l-nAu_1fVkbCFRW0xxHfIhDLpi3Xv0FUwUhwFvN7hvVm80Z8yOPDaccLpBR77PKsjLec9jK3inez1o1n7Z9YVAI1XQXKUO8GT9XNowPx3GyNA-XJv6p69I8xCU62BCWr2LhiCOnOXtDrbbVepeZ2CIqS-H18dkrfi6Ar4cwUnfMMZsjMYei8vM815xNBfPEYT8bq3cagKU7hq3Amgwiz-uKKZSrzCCgjmzdGkHbQTfRqyPlJnRPpHadRKj3GCiuSywu-YENRHsfDGgGpjlc)
---
Friend,

**It 's game time.**

Virginians are now voting in what could be the most consequential election in our Commonwealth's history.

_**I truly believe this is the most important election in America.**_ We have a chance to prove to the entire country that a state that was completely controlled by out-of-touch Democrats can change direction and succeed under commonsense, conservative governance.

| [ **GET IN THE GAME** ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=9e253128839947e28ca639de97467f8f&_e=TaGvShpC5Z-IekyPU5KCgd1ChkJ9T8HSUAJCfYJHC70yfipP0CjQB74sYcG-BL9Vv9Q-hiMKH5Cs0n7bMnI6inBQ-hp881RLoSb_jeiZgwon2l-nAu_1fVkbCFRW0xxHfIhDLpi3Xv0FUwUhwFvN7hvVm80Z8yOPDaccLpBR77PKsjLec9jK3inez1o1n7Z9YVAI1XQXKUO8GT9XNowPx4fvidKeiTNwRm9Qkibq7UVjz4YDe6BVkqUV44nEmS54xpE4ch-6MXu95z8TYJPXHfPtOU2RWWxi2tmC_9mlwJHe914fQrWKBTv6KGo9pp2lFVkTb5PkQx3LDlrdG0FRYkzOFBKllhTuZbit1-H_jf5ZVZT2EQS8LwBDBC-1817Q)

Joe Biden, the DNC, and extreme political groups recognize the importance of these elections too. _They are pouring millions of dollars into Virginia to take our Commonwealth back to the failed policies of the past._

| | | **BREAKING: The Supreme Court could be leaning AGAINST a ruling that would "threaten to END" Social Security, _but we need to make our voices heard before it's too late!_**

---

Urgent update, team: The Supreme Court just heard a case that could "threaten to end" Social Security, but reports from the courthouse say the justices could be leaning AGAINST a ruling that could gut this vital program!

**We need to make our voices heard and make it clear that Americans _support_ Social Security -- _before_ the Court changes its mind and jeopardizes key benefits for 65 million people.**

We’ve launched an urgent Live Poll to PROVE that the American people are steadfast in their support of this _essential_ program -- but we still need 48 more responses from Pennsylvania! **This is our chance to make a _real difference_ , so tell us before the midnight deadline:**

**Before midnight, please tell us where you stand:****Should the Supreme Court UPHOLD the constitutionality of Social Security?**

| | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/15933?ask=5&t=15&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231022-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF4V2-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231022-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF4V2-Pros-sl1&akid=12320%2E9716520%2EAXesDP)

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Virginia abortion ban
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
Virginians will soon cast their ballots in one of the most important elections in the country this year. Virginia is the ONLY southern state that hasn’t banned abortion since the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade — and that will change if Republicans take control of the state legislature on November 7.

|
---
Dear Derek, Virginians will soon cast their ballots in one of the most important elections in the country this year. Virginia is the ONLY southern state that hasn’t banned abortion since the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade _— and that will change if Republicans take control of the state legislature on November 7. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72015151/433975028/-1558086765?refcode=dpva-em-102223&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGVhMTM2MS0wYzcxLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q2mHaouk9bOu0seQSlaY6_I27zgx7aNYvFtcg-bq4es=) Virginia Republicans already control the governorship and the state House. The meager Democratic majority in the Senate is the only stopgap preventing a statewide abortion ban that Governor Youngkin has said he would “gleefully” sign into law. If Republicans secure a trifecta in the upcoming election, Virginia could become the latest state to ban abortion and embolden extremists across the country as we head into the 2024 elections that will decide whether Republicans gain enough power to pass a nationwide abortion ban. name: Elections Alert via Courier Newsroom
subject: Abortion rights are taking center stage
body:
This isn’t pretty for anti-abortion Republicans.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72015375/433975716/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjM3YmI3NWItMGQ3MS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=grZSMEeaMiLz3aaSwuxWxMRyyl-lgVmQWgoiS1SO4vE=&emci=ab7bb75b-0d71-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=b37bb75b-0d71-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=14016711)
Peter,
Abortion rights are taking center stage this election cycle, from Ohio to Kentucky to Virginia.
**Before we dive deeper into the importance of local elections this November, you should know that Courier’s newsrooms in nine battleground states have been diligently covering the fight for abortion rights, but they can’t do their work without your support.[Will you pitch in anything you can to help fund reliable journalism like ours?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72015376/433975717/641188569?refcode=em20231022&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjM3YmI3NWItMGQ3MS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=grZSMEeaMiLz3aaSwuxWxMRyyl-lgVmQWgoiS1SO4vE=)**
**[Donate ➡️](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72015377/433975718/641188569?refcode=em20231022&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjM3YmI3NWItMGQ3MS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=grZSMEeaMiLz3aaSwuxWxMRyyl-lgVmQWgoiS1SO4vE=)**
Since _Roe v. Wade_ was overturned by the Supreme Court’s conservative majority, right-wing Republicans in states across the country are dead set on passing extreme abortion bans.
But here’s the good news: we’ve seen what happens when voters head to the polls armed with the truth about reproductive rights — and it’s not pretty for anti-abortion Republicans.
Last year in Michigan, voters overwhelmingly approved Proposal 3 to establish the right to reproductive freedom in the state constitution. **And a novel experiment found that Michiganders were more likely to oppose abortion bans after reading reports from _The Gander_ , our local Michigan newsroom, like this one:**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72015378/433975719/641188569?refcode=em20231022&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjM3YmI3NWItMGQ3MS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=grZSMEeaMiLz3aaSwuxWxMRyyl-lgVmQWgoiS1SO4vE=)
We’re continuing this work in important states like Virginia, where Republicans promised to implement an **abortion ban in the _only_ remaining safe haven for abortion care in the entire South** should they win control of the General Assembly this November.
Our reporters at _Dogwood_ have jumped right in pushing eye-catching, straightforward news pieces to outline what’s at stake in this important election:

clean_body: This isn’t pretty for anti-abortion Republicans. Peter, Abortion rights are taking center stage this election cycle, from Ohio to Kentucky to Virginia. Before we dive deeper into the importance of local elections this November, you should know that Courier’s newsrooms in nine battleground states have been diligently covering the fight for abortion rights, but they can’t do their work without your support.= = Since Roe v. Wade was overturned by the Supreme Court’s conservative majority, right-wing Republicans in states across the country are dead set on passing extreme abortion bans. But here’s the good news: we’ve seen what happens when voters head to the polls armed with the truth about reproductive rights — and it’s not pretty for anti-abortion Republicans. Last year in Michigan, voters overwhelmingly approved Proposal 3 to establish the right to reproductive freedom in the state constitution. And a novel experiment found that Michiganders were more likely to oppose abortion bans after reading reports from The Gander , our local Michigan newsroom, like this one: = We’re continuing this work in important states like Virginia, where Republicans promised to implement an abortion ban in the only remaining safe haven for abortion care in the entire South should they win control of the General Assembly this November. Our reporters at Dogwood have jumped right in pushing eye-catching, straightforward news pieces to outline what’s at stake in this important election: = The work of our newsrooms — the articles, the amplified posts, and the ad placements — is only possible with support from people like you. That’s why we’ve set a $10,000 end-of-month goal to ensure they have all the resources they need ahead of consequential elections this November and beyond. = = Thanks for your support, Everyone at Courier Newsroom Email us: mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com

body:
After it was leaked in a secret meeting...
| | Friend,
---
We’re now in the final few days of the RINOs’ 60-day plot to try and destroy our movement and put the GOP back under “establishment” control.
And just in time for their plot to end, a new poll came out showing that _**EVERY**_ other Republican candidate is now in the **SINGLE DIGITS.**
**“Trump primary challengers dwindle to the single digits in new poll”**
[SOURCE: _Washington Examiner_]
I think we can all agree that their plot to destroy the MAGA movement has been an unmitigated disaster.
_**BUT**_ I will not claim victory until the 60 days have officially passed.
I know these turncoat RINOs all too well. They may have terrible policies. They may be terrible at standing up to the Democrats. But they are extraordinary when it comes to stabbing me (and voters like YOU) in the back!
That’s why I will continue to sleep with one eye open until the 60 days are over.
These are people who cheered when I was wrongfully arrested, parroted talking points from Nancy Pelosi and Adam Schiff when I was illegally indicted, and attacked me so much that they even started to be featured in Biden ads!
Who knows what they can concoct in a secret meeting in the final few days of their plot to try and bring us down...
But time and time again, these special interest RINOs fail to remember who they’re up against.
I’m not talking about _me_. I’m talking about YOU...
...The 74 million (which is _now much higher_) Americans who are the heart and soul of the MAGA movement.
While we may not be lined with special interest Super PAC money, we do have MILLIONS of grassroots donors giving even just $1 to SAVE AMERICA!
And when you add it all up, we have even TRIPLED the amount raised by these RINO sell-outs.
Now, with 2 days left in their timeline to defeat us, it’s time to GO BIG!
Let’s give it all we’ve got during these final 48 hours to send a message loud and clear: THE GOP WILL NEVER GO BACK TO THE DAYS BEFORE “TRUMP” AND THE MAGA MOVEMENT.
_(But if you’re doing poorly right now due to all of the many villains destroying our country, please do not even think about donating. I mean it!)_

clean_body: After it was leaked in a secret meeting... | | Friend, We’re now in the final few days of the RINOs’ 60-day plot to try and destroy our movement and put the GOP back under “establishment” control. And just in time for their plot to end, a new poll came out showing that EVERY other Republican candidate is now in the SINGLE DIGITS. “Trump primary challengers dwindle to the single digits in new poll” [SOURCE: Washington Examiner] I think we can all agree that their plot to destroy the MAGA movement has been an unmitigated disaster. BUT I will not claim victory until the 60 days have officially passed. I know these turncoat RINOs all too well. They may have terrible policies. They may be terrible at standing up to the Democrats. But they are extraordinary when it comes to stabbing me (and voters like YOU) in the back! That’s why I will continue to sleep with one eye open until the 60 days are over. These are people who cheered when I was wrongfully arrested, parroted talking points from Nancy Pelosi and Adam Schiff when I was illegally indicted, and attacked me so much that they even started to be featured in Biden ads! Who knows what they can concoct in a secret meeting in the final few days of their plot to try and bring us down... But time and time again, these special interest RINOs fail to remember who they’re up against. I’m not talking about me. I’m talking about YOU... ...The 74 million (which is now much higher) Americans who are the heart and soul of the MAGA movement. While we may not be lined with special interest Super PAC money, we do have MILLIONS of grassroots donors giving even just $1 to SAVE AMERICA! And when you add it all up, we have even TRIPLED the amount raised by these RINO sell-outs. Now, with 2 days left in their timeline to defeat us, it’s time to GO BIG! Let’s give it all we’ve got during these final 48 hours to send a message loud and clear: THE GOP WILL NEVER GO BACK TO THE DAYS BEFORE “TRUMP” AND THE MAGA MOVEMENT. (But if you’re doing poorly right now due to all of the many villains destroying our country, please do not even think about donating. I mean it!) | Thank you, | Donald J. # Announcing The Overwhelming Support of our Democrats in Assembly District 72!!!!
---
| |
---
| |
### You don't want to miss this news!!!
### Dom has won nearly 90% of the vote from our incredible and engaged delegates in AD72!!!
---
| | Dear Esteemed Democratic Delegates and Supporters of Assembly District 72, With boundless joy and gratitude, I pen this message to express my deepest thanks for the overwhelming endorsement you have bestowed upon me. Your resounding support, with over 87% of the vote, is a testament to the shared vision we hold for a brighter future on the Orange County coastline. Together, we embark on a journey to champion women's rights, fortify our economy, safeguard our environment, promote equity in our institutions, and foster a united and engaged community. This momentous endorsement is not just a vote of confidence; it is a powerful declaration that we stand united in our pursuit of progress.I am profoundly humbled by this honor and accept this leadership role with a heart full of determination and a mind brimming with passion. Together, we shall flip this seat and pave the way for a future that echoes with the voices of those who yearn for positive change. Our journey is marked by love, care, and a resolute voice that resonates with every corner of our community. Let us march forward, knowing that we are the champions of a cause greater than ourselves, and let our collective strength be the beacon that guides others to join us in this noble endeavor.With heartfelt thanks and a profound sense of purpose,Dom Jones
---

Every Monday, I have a finance check-in with Andrea to update her on our fundraising progress and our ability to invest in critical voter outreach programs.

Well, I just ran the numbers ahead of tomorrow’s meeting ... and things aren’t looking good.

I really don’t want to deliver bad news to Andrea or entertain budget cuts, but if things don’t improve in the next 24 hours, I won’t have a choice.

body:
Derek, did you see
Tony's note?

The future of American democracy depends on winning Wisconsin and
defeating an extreme Republican Party that wants to end fair elections and
take away abortion rights.

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2166?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_TE_20231022_FR_mmfr_0_3MO_TeamEvers_NA_NA_mmfr.2.9&t=1001&akid=6444%2E1827488%2EKO4LI5 ]Can Tony count on you to rush a donation to help us raise the $5,827 we
need to close our budget gap before our deadline at midnight tonight?

— Begin Forwarded Message —

Derek,

Extreme Republicans in the state legislature are dead set on rolling back
our fundamental rights and freedoms. That’s why they’re attacking voting
rights, reproductive rights, and vulnerable communities across Wisconsin
among others.

We’re better than this, and I need your help to keep making critical
investments across Wisconsin ahead of next year’s elections.

$10,592 budget gap before my fundraising deadline at midnight? Every
