| | Peter,

My name is Kimberly Pope Adams and I am running for Virginia House of Delegates District 82. **[I'd like to introduce myself and ask for your support to win the most competitive seat in Virginia this year.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72016901/433981211/-708090357?sourceid=1052166&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0M2IxZDNlMS0xNTcxLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g4G_S20h4Pp4jyFTvc27u-DnO0MOSJ2_XJy8b4aAV_c=)**

I'm a single mom born and raised in Hopewell, Virginia. My daddy was a union worker at Hercules and my mom was my school crossing guard. They taught me what hard work looks like and about the importance of supporting your community. I've spent my career as an accountant and auditor finding ways to cut wasteful spending and fight against fraud and abuse. That's exactly what I'll continue doing as delegate, _**but I need your help.**_

In 2021, Republicans won this seat by _only 512 votes_. _Together, we can take it back by storm._ My team has been working hard to reach everyone across the district. We understood from the beginning this race would be a fight to the finish line, but some things are absolutely worth fighting for. Things like:
* **Education:** Every child has the right to a free, quality public school education. I understand the need to adequately fund K-12 schools and pay teachers what they deserve. As delegate I will be an advocate for public education in District 82.
* **Economic Development:** Taxpayers deserve a voice when deciding how their community thrives. Economic developments should benefit each citizen as well as the locality.
* **Addressing Food Insecurity:** Food insecurity is an undeniable fact for many residents across the 82nd District. Ironically, these food deserts exist in communities where agriculture is a vital component of the local economy. As delegate I will actively pursue solutions to incentivize local farmers to donate to community food banks, promote initiatives where local farmers sell their produce directly to public schools, and encourage traditional grocery store retailers to invest in our community.

__Our race will be extremely close._ **Every donation allows us to reach more people for the opportunity to win their vote.**_ We always knew we would be the fundraising underdog, but we will not be outworked. **Will you split a donation between my campaign and EMILYs List to help make sure our district, our children, and our families have a commonsense problem-solver fighting for them in the General Assembly?** _If you have saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately._ | **[DONATE $15](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72016902/433981212/-708090357?expresslane=true&amount=15&sourceid=1052166&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0M2IxZDNlMS0xNTcxLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g4G_S20h4Pp4jyFTvc27u-DnO0MOSJ2_XJy8b4aAV_c=)** | **[DONATE $35](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72016903/433981213/-708090357?expresslane=true&amount=35&sourceid=1052166&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0M2IxZDNlMS0xNTcxLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g4G_S20h4Pp4jyFTvc27u-DnO0MOSJ2_XJy8b4aAV_c=)**

clean_body: Split a donation between our campaign and EMILYs List >> | | | Peter, My name is Kimberly Pope Adams and I am running for Virginia House of Delegates District 82. = I'm a single mom born and raised in Hopewell, Virginia. My daddy was a union worker at Hercules and my mom was my school crossing guard. They taught me what hard work looks like and about the importance of supporting your community. I've spent my career as an accountant and auditor finding ways to cut wasteful spending and fight against fraud and abuse. That's exactly what I'll continue doing as delegate, but I need your help. In 2021, Republicans won this seat by only 512 votes. Together, we can take it back by storm. My team has been working hard to reach everyone across the district. We understood from the beginning this race would be a fight to the finish line, but some things are absolutely worth fighting for. Things like: Education: Every child has the right to a free, quality public school education. I understand the need to adequately fund K-12 schools and pay teachers what they deserve. As delegate I will be an advocate for public education in District 82. Economic Development: Taxpayers deserve a voice when deciding how their community thrives. Economic developments should benefit each citizen as well as the locality. Addressing Food Insecurity: Food insecurity is an undeniable fact for many residents across the 82nd District. Ironically, these food deserts exist in communities where agriculture is a vital component of the local economy. As delegate I will actively pursue solutions to incentivize local farmers to donate to community food banks, promote initiatives where local farmers sell their produce directly to public schools, and encourage traditional grocery store retailers to invest in our community. Our race will be extremely close. Every donation allows us to reach more people for the opportunity to win their vote. We always knew we would be the fundraising underdog, but we will not be outworked. Will you split a donation between my campaign and EMILYs List to help make sure our district, our children, and our families have a commonsense problem-solver fighting for them in the General Assembly? If you have saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately. | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Let's turn HD-82 blue! Kimberly Pope Adams = ** Our candidates have the power of our five-million-person movement behind them. 100% of your donation will go directly to their campaigns. | Paid for by EMILYs List and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Gloucester County GOP
subject: Final Call for Tickets to have dinner and cigars with Sheriff David A. Clarke!
body:
Get your tickets! October 26 - 5:30 PM
| | | |

SHERIFF JONATHAN M. SAMMONS, COMMISSIONER CHRISTOPHER KONAWEL, JR. AND COMMISSIONER NICHOLAS DESILVIO
---
| cordially invite you to their Cigars and Dinner Event with special guest
---
| "America's Sheriff" Sheriff David A. Clarke, Jr.
---
| VIP Cigars and Meet & Greet with Sheriff Clarke will start at 5:30 PM. There are very limited spots for the VIP Cigars and Meet & Greet, so get your tickets now!
Dinner will start at 6:45PM.
We are offering a Discounted ticket to Law Enforcement Officers and Military Personnel for the Dinner portion of this event. Please provide proof of LEO/Military.
Tickets will not be sold at the door.
All check payments must be accompanied by the Donation Form found [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011njbxY5HVEb0pU3gHep5cBhd4kRx7MzHSHgfBD69_duhcNiM88ZLh0EYrujW5issdnnZMBOQP6GyvVuzLnOsLNNvi6LRCMBX5-VKZTE81pJnyo_npQoIeuN7DOPGSUg3pttiZaNUaUwWxKWQelgzpzUjK2BVRbE8DiM8jYoSwahETBEY9zSQqbmzVhTO_S1TY71H5Jg0lmBRxoStY9rR-HhE_sRS8NVRrQa278OjbJidVgFzvkxiYw==&c=Xkpbg-nT0Z18SNBZlT5XMUmA5wORuI_g4w_4aGEuz5UTWTXNtlQk1w==&ch=-DkoZ3C3FKSh1d5O9hoMZrYZBfim9lbd559ngMGXVuMdmh5o4xevKw==).
Tickets can be purchased online [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011njbxY5HVEb0pU3gHep5cBhd4kRx7MzHSHgfBD69_duhcNiM88ZLh0EYrujW5isseaRGXEMFPHysNKXYYYnVap_lC_YcLKA1uA3DWpB7dJ1Zp9hHOLLmpcdePrm9E-fC5881LKcZ067aC195My8dadOqY8MKidZCUSOkpz9h-cFLEgIHiLecMx2ayPiCJ03iPsFR02nzGTE=&c=Xkpbg-nT0Z18SNBZlT5XMUmA5wORuI_g4w_4aGEuz5UTWTXNtlQk1w==&ch=-DkoZ3C3FKSh1d5O9hoMZrYZBfim9lbd559ngMGXVuMdmh5o4xevKw==),
Sponsorships must be in by October 23, 2023.
If you have any questions, please reach out to Samantha Sammons at stsammons@gmail.com) or 856-535-7113.

| [GET TICKETS NOW](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011njbxY5HVEb0pU3gHep5cBhd4kRx7MzHSHgfBD69_duhcNiM88ZLh0EYrujW5isseaRGXEMFPHysNKXYYYnVap_lC_YcLKA1uA3DWpB7dJ1Zp9hHOLLmpcdePrm9E-fC5881LKcZ067aC195My8dadOqY8MKidZCUSOkpz9h-cFLEgIHiLecMx2ayPiCJ03iPsFR02nzGTE=&c=Xkpbg-nT0Z18SNBZlT5XMUmA5wORuI_g4w_4aGEuz5UTWTXNtlQk1w==&ch=-DkoZ3C3FKSh1d5O9hoMZrYZBfim9lbd559ngMGXVuMdmh5o4xevKw==)

| | |
---
|
### About Sheriff David A. Clarke, Jr.

After nearly four decades in law enforcement, Sheriff David Clarke has found innovative ways to serve the public that gives him the freedom to reach millions of Americans with his message, unfiltered by the confines of holding an elected office. In addition to his dedication and focus as the Sheriff of a large metropolitan county, Clarke developed a passion for political commentary. He is fondly referred to as the "America's Sheriff" after being given that name by Sean Hannity because he has the natural ability to explain complicated national controversies in a way that everyday people can understand. He is the keynote speaker at countless events across the country, where the audience praises his no-nonsense way of promoting conservative values. He truly enjoys mobilizing everyday Americans to become more politically active and civically engaged. Clarke has ramped up his massive social media activism, including regular communication with his nearly one million followers. In 2017, he became Spokesman and Senior Advisor to America First Action, dedicated to supporting the Trump-Pence Administration. Sheriff Clarke is President of America's Sheriff LLC, President of Rise Up Wisconsin Inc, best selling author, host of Straight Talk With America's Sheriff David Clarke Podcast, and has signed with TruBlu Streaming Service to host, COPS Under Fire, coming out later in 2023. He is also one of the country's most sought after keynote speakers and thought leaders in the conservative movement.
---
| | | | | | | Gloucester County GOP | PO Box 503, Woodbury, NJ 08096
---

We know we ask you to pitch into our campaign every so often, but do you know why?
It's because thousands of $5 donations from supporters like you helped Nikki win in 2022 and get to work delivering for the people of Central and Southern Illinois.
It was $5 donations that allowed Nikki to build bipartisan relationships to break through gridlock and deliver meaningful results for our families and communities.
And it was $5 donations that helped us secure more than $40 million in federal grants to improve our district’s infrastructure and public transportation so that every person, regardless of their income level, race, background, or zip code — can access every part of our region.
We know five bucks might not seem like a lot, especially when you compare it to National Republicans’ massive fundraising hauls. But every $5 donation truly makes a huge difference and will fuel our work to overcome outside spending, reelect Nikki, and take back the House majority.

clean_body: | Hey folks, we know it’s the weekend, so we’ll cut right to the chase: = | = We know we ask you to pitch into our campaign every so often, but do you know why? It's because thousands of $5 donations from supporters like you helped Nikki win in 2022 and get to work delivering for the people of Central and Southern Illinois. It was $5 donations that allowed Nikki to build bipartisan relationships to break through gridlock and deliver meaningful results for our families and communities. And it was $5 donations that helped us secure more than $40 million in federal grants to improve our district’s infrastructure and public transportation so that every person, regardless of their income level, race, background, or zip code — can access every part of our region. We know five bucks might not seem like a lot, especially when you compare it to National Republicans’ massive fundraising hauls. But every $5 donation truly makes a huge difference and will fuel our work to overcome outside spending, reelect Nikki, and take back the House majority. That’s why we’re asking: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = = Thanks, and we hope you enjoy the rest of your weekend. — Team Nikki = Nikki for Congress PO Box 5171 Springfield, IL 62705 United States ** | mailto:info@nikkiforcongress.com | Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress

Peter, it’s Hill’s finance team here with an update.

As you can see, we had a strong start at the beginning of the month, but our fundraising has slowed down.
Ups and downs are normal for any campaign, but we can’t afford to fall behind, Peter. [**Will you make a contribution right now to help us catch up?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20231022?amount=5&refcode=em20231022-469&refcode2=469_62735_iJVLVt&akid=469%2E62735%2EiJVLVt)
Our campaign isn’t powered by D.C. insiders and special interests — it’s powered by people like you. That means we’re going to have to work twice as hard to spread the word about Hill and our vision to transform our political system to work for ALL of us.
We know that this team has what it takes to keep up our campaign’s momentum. So as we prepare to go full speed ahead in 2024, we’re asking for your support.

Republicans have made it clear flipping Minnesota’s 2nd congressional district is key to their strategy to not just defend — _but expand_ — their House majority. If we’re going to take back the House in 2024, **it’s absolutely critical that we defend this seat.**
We are gearing up for a competitive, expensive race. After all, Republican groups spent **_more than $13.5 million_** to try to unseat me in the midterms. You can bet they’ll ramp up their spending this year with their House majority on the line.
We need to bring in resources now to gain a competitive edge against our opponents — who all represent the far-right ideologies of the Republican Party. My latest challenger even applauded the Supreme Court for overturning _Roe v. Wade_ and ripping away the right to an abortion from millions of women.
**[That’s why I’m asking you urgently: Can we count on you to be one of the 13 supporters we need from PA to split a donation of $10 or any amount between Tina Smith and me to the Challenger Response Fund today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72017383/433982909/-1567769373?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&amount=10&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_TAN_GEN_AC45_20231022_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGM0ZDc0OS0xZDcxLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TvueoRnYuZIjiF21h2pACNtI2TSpqHiOKw5V6cC18xU=)**
Thank you for showing up for this campaign at this critical moment. We know from experience that when we come together, we win.
Rep. Angie Craig
Minnesota’s 2nd Congressional District
Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: National Food Day Petition: Sign now to demand humane treatment of farm animals
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2066223?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Defend organic farmers and farm animals from Big Ag’s corporate greed!** [**Take action now >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2066224?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) The **Organic Livestock & Poultry Standards rule** (OLPS) would codify federal animal welfare standards in organic agriculture to ensure the humane treatment of livestock. But Big Ag succeeded in getting the rule quashed in 2017 and has been skirting past organic animal welfare regulations that would ensure that animals have access to fresh air, sunlight, enough space to move around, and are free from _**unnecessary physical alterations.**_ Fortunately, the USDA approved the reinstatement of the rule last year. __**Here’s the problem though, Friend:**__ **It hasn’t been enacted yet.** Every moment that goes by without the OLPS rule could mean another defenseless farm animal enduring abuse. [**Will you do something right now to protect ALL organic farm animals and the organic farm industry from Big Ag’s corporate greed?**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2066225?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2066226?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
_**National Food Day is approaching, Friend -- so what better time to defend organic farming?**_ Organic agriculture is a response to public demands for a healthier, safer, and more transparent food system -- including livestock that are treated with respect and dignity. Just to be clear, Friend, most organic farmers already meet the high expectations that come with the organic label.
But the true organic farmers that already follow these high-quality guidelines are losing crucial business to large ag companies that have found loopholes in the system and are more concerned with their bottom line than the humane treatment of animals or the integrity that comes with the organic label.
That’s why Friends of the Earth is helping organic farmers, consumers, and animal welfare activists stand up to Big Ag. We’re calling on **3,814 more environmentalists** like you to demonstrate strong public support for this critical organic animal welfare rule. **[Will you add your name now to tell the USDA to enact the OLPS rule _immediately_? Please add your name before our 11:59 P.M. petition deadline! >>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2066227?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2066226?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thanks for your support,
Friends of the Earth**

| Hey Peter:
---
| | Tiger Helgelien here. I had to take a moment to share something that's filled me with immense pride.

[Although it doesn’t surprise me at all. My perfect wife Elizabeth is not just leading in the NV-03 race; she's setting the pace!](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=d205f07209&e=54a81bd33c)

Despite RINO Heidi Kasama getting backed by the establishment with their deep pockets, Elizabeth has surged ahead, raising a remarkable $154,547.54.
---
| [ ](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=4310c62fc6&e=54a81bd33c)
---
| In comparison, Kasama, with all her establishment endorsements (including disgraced Former Speaker McCarthy), managed $136,874.79. It's clear where the hearts of true conservatives lies.

Every day, I see Elizabeth's unwavering commitment to our conservative values. Her dedication is not just as a candidate but as a wife, a mother, and a true patriot. And now, seeing her hard work getting such recognition, I couldn't be prouder.

But here's the thing: we can't let up now. The establishment will double down, and we need to be ready. If you believe in Elizabeth's vision for a stronger, conservative NV-03, would you consider making a donation? Whether it's [$5, $50, or $500](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=be35b91201&e=54a81bd33c), every bit helps us keep the momentum.

Thank you for standing with us. With your support, we're not just running a campaign; we're starting a conservative movement.

Best,

Tiger Helgelien

---

The latest poll shows Adam with a narrow lead – 50% to 48% – but Lauren Boebert’s Super PACs are already on the attack. We need to raise another $150,000 before our weekly fundraising deadline to counter their lies and hold Boebert accountable, and we cannot afford to fall even one dollar short – not if we want to win. The only way Adam can finally send Boebert packing is if grassroots donors like you give right now:= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = We are about to enter the next phase of this campaign, and your continued support is absolutely critical. Adam is not taking money from corporate PACs like Boebert is, so anything you can afford to give goes a long way. We are so eternally grateful for everything you do, Team Frisch ** Paid for by Adam for Colorado. Adam for Colorado PO Box 1240 Glenwood Springs, CO 81602 United States Contributions or gifts to Adam for Colorado are not tax deductible.

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: the odds are stacked against me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Hi, friend, it's Sen. Sherrod Brown. In a minute, I'm going to ask you to [split a contribution of $10 between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project to help me reach my $25,000 midnight fundraising goal](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/55484?t=6&akid=11372%2E878179%2EqKTQE3) – but first, I wanted to tell you why this race is so important.

I'm fighting for the Dignity of Work in the Senate, and that means all work. Whether you punch a clock or swipe a badge, earn a salary or make tips, raise children or care for an aging parent, I've got your back.

The thing is, **the odds are stacked against me in this race:** My ultra-wealthy Republican opponents are writing their campaigns huge, million-dollar checks to buy this seat. And, a Trump-allied dark-money group is running attack ads against me because they know this seat will determine which party wins Senate control!

I know what it takes to beat the odds and win because I've fought tough races before, so believe me when I say that grassroots fundraising will make or break this campaign. **$10 might not sound like much, but when hundreds of dedicated Democrats donate, it adds up quickly.**

**That's where you come in. If you – and everyone reading this email – split just $10 now between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project, I can reach my midnight goal and have the resources to fight back against the GOP's vicious attacks.**

[So please, I'm personally asking: Will you split $10 or more right now between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project – every dollar you can spare – so we can reach our goal, win in Ohio, and defend the Senate?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/55484?t=7&akid=11372%2E878179%2EqKTQE3) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Sherrod Brown and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/55485?t=8&akid=11372%2E878179%2EqKTQE3)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/55486?t=9&akid=11372%2E878179%2EqKTQE3)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/55487?t=10&akid=11372%2E878179%2EqKTQE3)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/55488?t=11&akid=11372%2E878179%2EqKTQE3)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/55484?t=12&akid=11372%2E878179%2EqKTQE3)
With gratitude,

Sherrod Brown
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=11372%2E878179%2EqKTQE3). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=11372%2E878179%2EqKTQE3).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=11372%2E878179%2EqKTQE3) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=11372%2E878179%2EqKTQE3). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=11372%2E878179%2EqKTQE3)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=11372%2E878179%2EqKTQE3)

body:
The growth of the police state is a threat to our Constitutional rights. | | |
---
| |
---
| |
# Party of the Constitution
---
| [WATCH POLICE STATE TRAILER](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=21fda6ba65&e=a2af77507c)
---
The **growth of the police state** is a threat to our Constitutional rights.
Dinesh D’Souza’s new film Police State documents this growing threat to our freedom.
**Knowing the threat is not enough.**
The Michigan Republican Party isn’t just committed to you understanding the threat but wants to empower you with ways to stop it.
The Good Neighbor Program is a critical component of the Michigan Republican Party’s strategy for winning elections and saving our nation from the growing police state.
We **must** recruit more Michiganders to Constitutionalism if we are going to save state and nation.
**Join us tomorrow, Monday, October 23rd,** at the AMC theater in Auburn Hills at Great Lakes Crossing Mall!
* 6 pm Good Neighbor Program discussion inside Bar Louie (appetizers and cash bar)
* 7 pm Police State Movie Premier

Watch the trailer for police state above and purchase your tickets below.
| [PURCHASE POLICE STATE TICKETS HERE](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=d1b05fd700&e=a2af77507c)

I'm hosting a special MAGA reception in Houston, Texas in just a few weeks and I can't think of anyone better to join me as my VIP Guest than a loyal grassroots supporter of our movement like YOU. I'll even fly you out! So please, use the password below and follow this secure link to access your personal invitation to enter to be my VIP: Thank you for all your support! | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States | NO PURCHASE, PAYMENT, CONTRIBUTION, OR TEXT MESSAGE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN. Contributing or sending a text message will not improve your chances of winning. Void where prohibited. You may enter by contributing to Save America JFC by clicking . Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by clicking or by texting "HOUSTON" to 88022 for one (1) entry. By sending a text message from your mobile phone, you are providing your written consent to receive calls and SMS/MMS messages, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number from the Save America JFC. Text message and data rates may apply. Consent is not required as a condition of entry. Text STOP to 88022 to opt out. Entries must be received between October 17, 2023, at 12:00 a.m. Eastern Time, and ends on October 23, 2023, at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time. Odds of winning depend on the number of eligible entries received. One (1) "Prize Winner" will receive a trip for two to a November 2, 2023 reception in Houston, Texas consisting of the following: (i) round-trip coach class airfare for the Prize Winner and one (1) guest to the event destination from the major U.S. airport nearest Prize Winner's residence within the 48 contiguous United States; (ii) two (2) tickets to the reception featuring President Donald J. Trump; (iii) two (2) day one (1) night first class hotel accommodations (1 room, double occupancy); (iv) one (1) photograph of the Prize Winner and guest with President Trump; approximate retail value ("ARV") of the Prize: $8,000. The Promotion is open only to U.S. citizens or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents (green card holders) of the 50 United States, Puerto Rico, and the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age (or the age of majority under applicable law). Winners must be 18 or older (or of majority under applicable law) and meet other requirements as described in the Official Rules. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility may apply. Visit for full details and Official Rules. Sponsor: Trump Save America, PO Box 13570, Arlington, VA 22219. Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and Save America. clean_body: We hope you’ll join us today. | | | Peter, $25. That’s the donation we’re asking you to make to help reelect Joe Biden and Kamala Harris next November. When you support our campaign, you’ll join the almost 200,000 donors whose dollars have gone towards making sure that Joe and Kamala can keep making progress for the future – so that Americans everywhere can live safely in their communities, access the health care they need, build economic prosperity, and more. Grassroots supporters like you have made a huge difference, and we know that you can too. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | We need your support now more than ever. Our Republican opponents are spending millions of dollars attacking Joe and touting their extreme MAGA policies that will pull our country backward and erase the progress we’ve made. And we know this is just the beginning of what will be a tough race. It’s going to take a BIG grassroots team for Joe and Kamala to secure four more years in the White House. So, we’re asking: Thank you for your ongoing support. Your donation helps ensure that we can finish the job. \-- Team Biden-Harris

body:
#
**In case you missed it →** George Santos was asked about Zak Malamed. Here is what he had to say:

[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2310-mm?amount=10?source=em231022-90do&refcode2=525_8507_eecivg&akid=525%2E8507%2Eeecivg)Thanks, George. While we will not be paying you back in compliments any time soon, we can agree with you on this one thing:

**Our team has the energy to mobilize a new generation of voters in New York – and we intend to use that energy to defeat George Santos and his brand of corrupt politics once and for all.**

[Support Zak for Congress](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2310-mm?amount=10?amount=25&refcode=em20231022-el&refcode2=525_8507_eecivg&akid=525%2E8507%2Eeecivg)
Zak is an energetic, common-sense Democrat with a history of organizing young voters, defeating MAGA extremists, and building teams of activists to tackle today’s most pressing issues.

**We agree._That is very, very interesting!_**

[If you want to move beyond the national embarrassment that is George Santos and his old-school type of politics, then we invite you to join our team today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2310-mm?amount=10?source=em231022-90do&refcode2=525_8507_eecivg&akid=525%2E8507%2Eeecivg)

Peter Willis —

As you probably know, the team here at Our Revolution has been staffing up for the 2024 elections. We know that affecting real change in key districts and states will take serious organizing, and that’s exactly what we’re known for as the biggest progressive turnout organization in the country.

You’ll be hearing more about our 2024 plans soon, but after watching last week’s Republican chaos in the US House of Representatives, we decided that we absolutely *must* push up our plans for key house districts. We can’t afford to not win back the house, and we need to ramp up these programs ASAP.

Help us meet our $10,000 goal by midnight tonight, to make sure that we can hire more organizers to train volunteers and have crucial one-on-one conversations with 2024 voters. Rush a donation today. (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9838?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231022_fr_turnout2.2_0_6MO_fieldteam_na_na_turnout&t=1015&akid=4818%2E5885482%2ENsKoEm)

We can’t win without your help. We are still $3,450 away from our $10,000 goal that we need to raise by midnight tonight. Can you help us get there? clean_body: [ stdin# ][IMG] Peter Willis — We’re just a few hours from our deadline. If you’ve been meaning to give before it’s too late, now is your chance. We want to make sure that we can fully fund our 2024 organizing program targeted on taking back the house after everything we saw over the last few weeks. If we have any chance of affecting real change for working people in our country, we have to have a working government. Can you chip in a few bucks now to help us make sure that happens? () If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Our Revolution will process immediately. DONATE $10 () DONATE $25 () DONATE $50 () Thanks — the whole team at Our Rev Begin forwarded message from Joseph Geevarghese: Peter Willis — As you probably know, the team here at Our Revolution has been staffing up for the 2024 elections. We know that affecting real change in key districts and states will take serious organizing, and that’s exactly what we’re known for as the biggest progressive turnout organization in the country. You’ll be hearing more about our 2024 plans soon, but after watching last week’s Republican chaos in the US House of Representatives, we decided that we absolutely must push up our plans for key house districts. We can’t afford to not win back the house, and we need to ramp up these programs ASAP. Help us meet our $10,000 goal by midnight tonight, to make sure that we can hire more organizers to train volunteers and have crucial one-on-one conversations with 2024 voters. Rush a donation today. () If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Our Revolution will process immediately. CHIP IN $10 NOW » () CHIP IN $27 NOW » () CHIP IN $50 NOW » () CHIP IN $100 NOW » () CHIP IN $250 NOW » () CHIP IN OTHER » () I don’t like to brag, but our team is the best at ID-ing where we can make the biggest impact, and what voting blocs are both crucial to winning and the most important for us to communicate with. Then we tap into our local networks of grassroots volunteers and activists, and make sure that we activate voters ahead of time. This is a proven, winning method — but it takes resources. We can’t win without your help. We are still $3,450 away from our $10,000 goal that we need to raise by midnight tonight. Can you help us get there? () When we organize, we win. name: Emily Feltz, Team ODP
subject: A mass of misinformation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
by the Ohio GOP
|
Team, The American Prospect says it best: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72018740/433987993/-2035502512?refcode=odp_em_231022_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTg2Zjc4ZC0yYTcxLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xaJtHxVDRVzpiezrKNV-tJ92mnWnzvTqDJ3PbBWjfo4=)
_The American Prospect, 10/13/23_ **[Rush $5 to support Ohio Democrats fighting to protect reproductive rights>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72018741/433987994/-2035502512?refcode=odp_em_231022_2&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTg2Zjc4ZC0yYTcxLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xaJtHxVDRVzpiezrKNV-tJ92mnWnzvTqDJ3PbBWjfo4=)** Every waking moment until the election, we’re mobilizing everyone here at Team Ohio Dems to get out on the ground and educate voters on exactly what our state’s Republicans have done in an attempt to mislead voters about the reproductive rights initiative on next month’s ballot. **Let’s recap:** In August, conservatives dove deep into their bag of tricks to try to make it harder to amend the state Constitution ahead of the November ballot measure to protect reproductive rights in the state Constitution – _and they snuck this change onto the August special election ballot knowing it has historically low turnout._ Then when you saw through their slimy efforts and stopped them, they doubled down and rewrote deceitful language for the amendment on the November ballot. They wrote it to intentionally mislead voters about exactly what the ballot measure would do. They made it as confusing as possible to try and make sure that you wouldn’t understand what rights it affects so that you’d vote against it. Well, team, we’re here to set the record straight. **Voting YES on Issue 1 next month means protecting the right to abortion, IVF, contraception – the full range of reproductive health care. It’s as simple as that.** So while Republicans resort to dirty tricks to win your vote, we’ll be hitting the ground throughout Ohio to ensure you know exactly what this election is about and what passing Issue 1 would mean for our state. ****[Can you support our efforts to clean up this confusing mess the GOP has put us in by donating $5 today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72018742/433987995/-2035502512?refcode=odp_em_231022_2&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTg2Zjc4ZC0yYTcxLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xaJtHxVDRVzpiezrKNV-tJ92mnWnzvTqDJ3PbBWjfo4=) ****Anything you give helps our work in these final weeks to talk to voters about what Issue 1 is really about: Protecting the right for Ohioans to make the reproductive decisions that are right for us, with no interference from politicians. Thank you, Emily Feltz, Team ODP | ****[******A reproductive rights initiative is on the Ohio ballot this November. Can Ohio Democrats count on you to chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can to help fuel our fight to protect reproductive rights in our state constitution? →******](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72018743/433987996/-2035502512?refcode=odp_em_231022_2&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTg2Zjc4ZC0yYTcxLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xaJtHxVDRVzpiezrKNV-tJ92mnWnzvTqDJ3PbBWjfo4=)**** | ****[********](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72018744/433987997/-2035502512?refcode=odp_em_231022_2&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTg2Zjc4ZC0yYTcxLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xaJtHxVDRVzpiezrKNV-tJ92mnWnzvTqDJ3PbBWjfo4=)****[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72018745/433987998/-2035502512?refcode=odp_em_231022_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTg2Zjc4ZC0yYTcxLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xaJtHxVDRVzpiezrKNV-tJ92mnWnzvTqDJ3PbBWjfo4=) ********

name: Rep. Joe Sweeney
subject: Together, We Can Win!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Granite Solutions, Joe Sweeney Chairman
body:
New Hampshire Needs Your Help
| | |
---
| | Dear Derek, Our team is working tirelessly to elect Republican leaders who will uphold the values that make New Hampshire great. With your support, we've achieved remarkable successes, but there's still much more to be done. I want to express my gratitude for your past contributions to Granite Solutions. Your generosity has powered our efforts, allowing us to invest in crucial campaign activities and reach more voters with our conservative message. As we look to the future, we face both challenges and opportunities. We must continue to expand our majority in the New Hampshire House and Senate, and with your continued support, I'm confident we can do just that. Our conservative values are worth fighting for, and together, we can secure victory. Now is the time to take action. [By making a contribution to Granite Solutions](https://link.emails.granitesolutions.), you'll be part of a winning team dedicated to protecting and advancing our conservative principles.

Thank you for your commitment to Granite Solutions and for standing with us as we work toward a brighter future for New Hampshire. Best, Rep. Joe Sweeney Chairman, Granite Solutions

Or if you knew that making a $3 donation today would help us meet our end-of-month goal and defend the Democratic Senate Majority, wouldn’t you be glad you took that step to keep Republicans out of power? $3 may not have sounded like much when you first opened this email, but we hope you have an idea of how impactful just a few bucks can be now. = | = Thank you for your support, Team Heinrich | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. **_BREAKING NEWS:_ The Supreme Court heard a case that could END Social Security! **
Friend, Republicans have spent years scheming to destroy Social Security. **And now, Trump's far-right majority on the Supreme Court could be preparing to OVERTURN this critical legislation.**
Over the past 88 years, Social Security has helped hundreds of millions of Americans pay their bills and retire with dignity. Today, 67 million people receive benefits — _that's 1 in every 5 Americans!_
Social Security is, without a doubt, one of the most important — and popular — pieces of legislation ever passed. **But now, the future of this vital program rests in the hands of far-right radicals on the Supreme Court. **
These extremists have already made it clear that they have no respect for precedent or the will of the American people. We cannot sit on the sidelines and watch as they strip away our benefits.**We have to make our voices heard NOW. Please, respond before 11:59 p.m. tonight to tell us:**
**Should the Supreme Court Protect Social Security?**

name: Priscilla, Communications Director
subject: Our Senate campaign wants YOU on our team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,

I’m reaching out today with a **[PERSONAL invitation from Team Rick Scott.](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=11161d022e4f4645b426eb2c2f506195&_e=ue0Ikoh7KYh0N37FeeYDZnO24MFzYsHEr5dVUUG-Sm5EZdtEME_qal5rwwKs7YEHuL2T_aEOcM-t2AnlSMCHpSf67HxX28pLwmQ2Z8_t6ovbqJKG0lH9ZsOcQxEahgACyxX76355dZIqvr33J4vw8rm6ga2eIQJPVX7xh9pDTSSjcSQVY_c101UplZ6GVLYmXGIlmlbKSXsPCftcy_O94Nh09XArYTHqY7yPdD1EIU2RWAg5aEXX-4OPj7DKFc9akTZ3Q3LjprQHyEb0fya2NzEx7GzfpC3DsR3oOo_FtLpAAT5noZOnk01hHc3yFB6HBu9ShkHdDcetrrlKpCTdePfxWWA6gGcd1753qfIhOz_PIhNu7L79bNpBO2VcywQP)**

As Rick’s communications director, it’s my job to make sure the word about our conservative vision gets out to voters across Florida.

**_But with millions of eligible voters in the Sunshine State, I can’t reach every single one of them alone._**

That’s why I’m reaching out to you today, Peter.

**For about every additional $10 we raise, we can reach an extra voter to let them know about all that Rick’s done to DEFEND our Florida freedom.**

**[Can you pitch in just $10 now to help us contact one more voter in Florida?](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=11161d022e4f4645b426eb2c2f506195&_e=ue0Ikoh7KYh0N37FeeYDZnO24MFzYsHEr5dVUUG-Sm5EZdtEME_qal5rwwKs7YEHuL2T_aEOcM-t2AnlSMCHpSf67HxX28pLwmQ2Z8_t6ovbqJKG0lH9ZsOcQxEahgACyxX76355dZIqvr33J4vw8rm6ga2eIQJPVX7xh9pDTSSjcSQVY_c101UplZ6GVLYmXGIlmlbKSXsPCftcy_O94BykwNRtx0J_pdYx5iUTWQ3hqb5ULJNhLSPxDUT_bxQGNKdhACSML8ERXRk0iho5ngW_lxG_BQ2Jp04Aj3ab95cGhGiDBgkizlNDdYDciClJY_6PjJh3bCKwfuCy6QlCOSed8Tc4UhDanlHdvkZnbrklfOcR0iYSe4_GID44YzEB)**

| | I know it may not seem like a lot, but every voter we reach will make a _major_ difference.

**Last election, Rick won by less than 1% of the vote.**

That means just a few voters decided the election - and if we didn’t reach those voters, who knows what would’ve happened.

_We’re not taking any chances, and that’s why I’m counting on dependable conservatives like you to help with this job._

**[Please, pitch in $10 now and help us reach an extra Florida voter!](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=11161d022e4f4645b426eb2c2f506195&_e=ue0Ikoh7KYh0N37FeeYDZnO24MFzYsHEr5dVUUG-Sm5EZdtEME_qal5rwwKs7YEHuL2T_aEOcM-t2AnlSMCHpSf67HxX28pLwmQ2Z8_t6ovbqJKG0lH9ZsOcQxEahgACyxX76355dZIqvr33J4vw8rm6ga2eIQJPVX7xh9pDTSSjcSQVY_c101UplZ6GVLYmXGIlmlbKSXsPCftcy_O94F59vzYgmypYOv0l70voqKnTdwlMnGbw16qoU3pixhEnK1BJLt2gfoD1H8634xyjaot9t7eSbas6-hmoqirLGOXCtrAlnLGPoOezxbxI8XSJigE1VvgG2YNJzWrTcel2lWZk5RUEiCmcofKLGN-xK_L3RD8y-csEJS8DQ7DlacQi)**

clean_body: | | | Peter, I’m reaching out today with a As Rick’s communications director, it’s my job to make sure the word about our conservative vision gets out to voters across Florida. But with millions of eligible voters in the Sunshine State, I can’t reach every single one of them alone. That’s why I’m reaching out to you today, Peter. For about every additional $10 we raise, we can reach an extra voter to let them know about all that Rick’s done to DEFEND our Florida freedom. | | I know it may not seem like a lot, but every voter we reach will make a major difference. Last election, Rick won by less than 1% of the vote. That means just a few voters decided the election - and if we didn’t reach those voters, who knows what would’ve happened. We’re not taking any chances, and that’s why I’m counting on dependable conservatives like you to help with this job. Hey Peter,

My team just checked our numbers, and we’re still a bit behind our end-of-month goal. That’s why I wanted to shoot you a quick personal message asking if you’d be willing to chip in any amount before our deadline next week . [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/htp-em-oct2023]

The good news is we’re not off track by much, your donation can help us close the gap of where we are and where we should be!

So I have a personal link for you to chip in and support amazing women and young people running in close races all over the country. You can use it right here:

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/htp-em-oct2023 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/htp-em-oct2023]

Every dollar helps, and I really mean that. Thanks in advance for your support!

— Katie

name: Emily W. (Team DMP)
subject: the number one item on my to-do list
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
👋 Hi there, friend!
| | |
---
👋 Hi there, friend!
My name is Emily, and I just joined Team Debbie as our digital director. It's my job to build out a digital strategy that will send Debbie to the Senate and Rick Scott packing! **As I get settled into this new role, reaching out to you is the number one item on my to-do list.**
As one of Debbie's earliest online supporters, you have incredibly valuable insights about this race, Debbie's campaign, and our digital strategy. Your feedback will be absolutely critical to my work from now all the way through to Election Day. That's why I've put together a special _Fourth Quarter Priorities Survey_ exclusively for top supporters like you.
**Please, will you take a moment to submit your responses before midnight tonight? Here's a personal survey link that I created for you:[surveys.signforgood.com/DMP-Oct-2023-Q4-Priorities-Survey-Email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72019725/433991561/-1186917683?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk211-su-nd&refcode=jtk211-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmQ0ZDY5YTItMzM3MS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=f9DVG4Cm189WekmQ8af4O7XoJKwuwDJOS57RsbKYkhM=&emci=3d038d01-ef6c-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=2d4d69a2-3371-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=3969733)**
If recent elections have proved anything, it's that digital activists are absolutely ESSENTIAL to a winning campaign. You made it possible for Democrats to defend our Senate majority against all the odds, even flipping a seat blue during one of the toughest election cycles in recent memory!
None of our victories in 2022 would have happened without your donations, survey responses, advocacy, and relentless belief in our candidates. Now, as we head into 2024, we'll need your help again.
All of us at Team Debbie understand just how critical you are to this campaign. That's why they hired me, and it's why I'm reaching out to you so early on. We can't do this without you, friend.**So please, will you help me build out a solid digital strategy by responding to our new survey before midnight tonight?****Here's that link again:[surveys.signforgood.com/DMP-Oct-2023-Q4-Priorities-Survey-Email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72019726/433991562/-1186917683?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk211-su-nd&refcode=jtk211-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmQ0ZDY5YTItMzM3MS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=f9DVG4Cm189WekmQ8af4O7XoJKwuwDJOS57RsbKYkhM=&emci=3d038d01-ef6c-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=2d4d69a2-3371-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=3969733)**
_I'm reviewing responses first thing tomorrow morning, so please be sure to get yours in ASAP!_

Thanks so much. I'll be in touch again soon.

Emily W.
Digital Director
Team Debbie
|

| | | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72019727/433991563/-31037693?code=jtk211-su-nd&refcode=jtk211-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmQ0ZDY5YTItMzM3MS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=f9DVG4Cm189WekmQ8af4O7XoJKwuwDJOS57RsbKYkhM=)

Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Mary Peltola
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
The last few weeks have made it abundantly clear that the Republican Party cannot be trusted with control of the U.S. House of Representatives.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=110%2E4032634%2EWx1wFw)
---
Nearly shutting down the government. Deposing a Speaker for the first time in history. Failing to pick a new leader so the chamber can do its job for the American people. The last few weeks have made it abundantly clear that the Republican Party cannot be trusted with control of the U.S. House of Representatives. **To make our government work for working people — to make it work AT ALL — Democrats must take back the House in 2024. That means we must re-elect vulnerable incumbents like Representative Mary Peltola.** Mary is a champion for Alaska families. Since joining Congress this year, she’s worked to put Washington on the side of working people, not powerful special interests. She won a tough fight to win this seat last year — and she’s got another hard battle in store in 2024. [**Can you split a donation of $28 or any amount between Mary’s campaign and our re-election?**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/822?amount=28&t=8&akid=110%2E4032634%2EWx1wFw)

---
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_ |
---
| [DONATE NOW: $3](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/822?t=22&express_lane=true&amount=3&akid=110%2E4032634%2EWx1wFw)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $15](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/822?t=24&express_lane=true&amount=15&akid=110%2E4032634%2EWx1wFw)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $28](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/822?t=26&express_lane=true&amount=28&akid=110%2E4032634%2EWx1wFw)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $50](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/822?t=28&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=110%2E4032634%2EWx1wFw)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $100](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/822?t=18&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=110%2E4032634%2EWx1wFw)
---
| [OTHER AMOUNT](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/822?t=20&express_lane=true&akid=110%2E4032634%2EWx1wFw)
---

---
Mary was born in Alaska, started fishing commercially when she was just six years old, served her community as a state legislator for 10 years, and became the first Alaska Native to ever get elected to Congress. I love the way she describes her agenda: “Pro-Fish, Pro-Family, and Pro-Freedom.” That’s more than a slogan. She has deep expertise advocating for fishing policies that ensure resilient food systems. She supports good-paying infrastructure jobs and affordable housing to make it easier for families to make ends meet. And she stands for freedom, including the right to an abortion. So let’s do everything we can to make sure she can keep up the fight. Grassroots supporters helped carry her to victory in 2022 and are poised to make all the difference in 2024, which is why I have to ask: [**If it makes sense for you right now, can you split a contribution of any amount between me and Mary Peltola? We won’t take back the House if we don’t protect front-line Democratic members like Mary.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/822?t=14&akid=110%2E4032634%2EWx1wFw) Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth
| | | |
---

name: Brandon Presley
subject: Here's my promise to you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brandon Presley Campaign
body:
It’s a big one. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72019781/433991793/17860314?refcode=ea.f9034673-3571-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=ea.f9034673-3571-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjkwMzQ2NzMtMzU3MS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=PVf_LJvsAb3FqGWtqKbTV3KgArUBfiIfDp_zOrCFYro=)
---
Peter, I want to make you a promise, right here, right now.

On DAY ONE of my governorship, I will roll up my sleeves and get to work for the good folks of Mississippi.

No gum-flapping. No shenanigans. No corrupt backroom deal-making with special interests. It will be nothing but results, results, and more results for everyday working people and families. I am ready to:

**🩺 Expand Medicaid to 220,000 working folks
💰 Fund our public schools and hospitals
🛒 Slash the most expensive grocery tax in the country
🚘 Cut car tag fees in half
📈 Build a booming economy
🌐 Bring high-speed internet to every Mississippi household
❌ Root out corruption in state politics**

And that will only be the beginning, Peter. The best part is we’re nearly two weeks out from making this a reality.

But I could really use your help. We need to raise $130,000 online before our make-or-break public filing deadline at the end of October to keep our GOTV efforts in full force. **We CANNOT afford to cut back our campaign plans this late into the race.

[In a race this competitive, our victory could come down to just a handful of votes. There’s no room for cutbacks, Peter. Every donation will help me defeat Tate Reeves and move Mississippi forward. Can I count on you to chip in a few dollars today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72019782/433991794/-935144756?refcode=ea.f9034673-3571-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=ea.f9034673-3571-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjkwMzQ2NzMtMzU3MS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=PVf_LJvsAb3FqGWtqKbTV3KgArUBfiIfDp_zOrCFYro=)** | **[Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72019783/433991795/-935144756?amount=5&refcode=ea.f9034673-3571-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=ea.f9034673-3571-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjkwMzQ2NzMtMzU3MS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=PVf_LJvsAb3FqGWtqKbTV3KgArUBfiIfDp_zOrCFYro=)** | **[Donate $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72019784/433991796/-935144756?amount=10&refcode=ea.f9034673-3571-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=ea.f9034673-3571-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjkwMzQ2NzMtMzU3MS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=PVf_LJvsAb3FqGWtqKbTV3KgArUBfiIfDp_zOrCFYro=)** | **[Donate $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72019785/433991797/-935144756?amount=25&refcode=ea.f9034673-3571-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=ea.f9034673-3571-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjkwMzQ2NzMtMzU3MS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=PVf_LJvsAb3FqGWtqKbTV3KgArUBfiIfDp_zOrCFYro=)**

clean_body: It’s a big one. | = Peter, I want to make you a promise, right here, right now. On DAY ONE of my governorship, I will roll up my sleeves and get to work for the good folks of Mississippi. No gum-flapping. No shenanigans. No corrupt backroom deal-making with special interests. It will be nothing but results, results, and more results for everyday working people and families. I am ready to: 🩺 Expand Medicaid to 220,000 working folks 💰 Fund our public schools and hospitals 🛒 Slash the most expensive grocery tax in the country 🚘 Cut car tag fees in half 📈 Build a booming economy 🌐 Bring high-speed internet to every Mississippi household ❌ Root out corruption in state politics And that will only be the beginning, Peter. The best part is we’re nearly two weeks out from making this a reality. But I could really use your help. We need to raise $130,000 online before our make-or-break public filing deadline at the end of October to keep our GOTV efforts in full force. We CANNOT afford to cut back our campaign plans this late into the race. = | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = God Bless, Brandon Presley = | | = = Follow along: Paid for by Brandon Presley Campaign Brandon Presley Campaign P.O. subject: NEVER back down.

body:
| | | Peter, _**We have to give our all to protect America from Joe Biden and Kamala Harris’ radical agenda.**_

It’s not just for our families today, but for our children and grandchildren's future.

For too long, we’ve let career politicians like Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer call the shots in our country.

__**Enough is enough.**_ _

I’m not working to be a voice for special interests. I’m working to be a voice for Missouri’s families feeling the heat from the Biden administration’s out-of-control inflation.

I know that in America, anything is possible, but if we keep Joe Biden in power, that possibility will slip away.

**[We can’t defend America’s future without taking back our Senate majority, and I need your help. Will you join me in this fight and help us WIN for America?](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=e621d3143f5643cd9c9f85d31ce951de&_e=0QKzs7zD_5dWNorFz6PEY4M8JixFqz9PisrA-4-oMuMCjJR160RSIqjRx09_6XiJ-PbvS9GoNJrhY8EbRYsj0tWcmP8fiNhnEOYsy9YI-2kZViA95TxGMcDjCm7azT8Opxgx_rbLApwFY9MW8UUU6wipM74vVEJXv5sjR3fuj700F_LfjYVkZyUay7YIV85Ju7ez3eM4UHTY0GQC1AdEhskfZ2Eou3GCOGkPw4F3dmQtFHcWlx6bT1-6EGVOd5nqxEoouxLkorIRieH2kRLBRfnp0J2TwUvcteGJCwVkVN_gh5CZmc11yLE5bweH5k_h9G0iLCglLiWTCEA-3m8Va_vW7d_d8ObdhQhQbk7YWYI4RYW32GJt4a4i3zcHrkaMoiyscN2qwQQSp5HVqQrdZA%3D%3D)**

Americans are _completely_ disillusioned with our government - and I understand why.

Our politicians are putting criminals before law abiding citizens.

Our own President is refusing to lay down the law at our southern border.

Egomaniacs in D.C.’s establishment are too busy protecting their positions of power, instead of fighting for the people of America.

The Democrat party is destroying the fibers of America, and it’s time to FIRE them.

I need your help to take back the Senate. _**[Can you spare just a few dollars today to fuel our fight?](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=e621d3143f5643cd9c9f85d31ce951de&_e=0QKzs7zD_5dWNorFz6PEY4M8JixFqz9PisrA-4-oMuMCjJR160RSIqjRx09_6XiJ-PbvS9GoNJrhY8EbRYsj0tWcmP8fiNhnEOYsy9YI-2kZViA95TxGMcDjCm7azT8Opxgx_rbLApwFY9MW8UUU6wipM74vVEJXv5sjR3fuj700F_LfjYVkZyUay7YIV85Ju7ez3eM4UHTY0GQC1AdEhskfZ2Eou3GCOGkPw4F3dmQ809ra-QfMgphapHGFSkBSRYpOXSmdmfKrVKsu7VDyF6n6v1GHaOqptFQQVlQpBfUzyBzrRfCqjACsQ_2gnxQ4DePtdUYsG7RAGuIGNb1-QAswUYLWjds0DtrBZlVlrOVd8UkCmck-R4ArNa6VAI80VZLQ15Mk339Fy60E3yFPTQ%3D%3D)**_
